arabicText: 3- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفُضَيْلِ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى أَمْ يَحْسُدُونَ النَّاسَ عَلَى مَا آتَاهُمُ اللَّهُ مِنْ فَضْلِهِ قَالَ نَحْنُ الْمَحْسُودُونَ.
thaqalaynSanad: 3. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated to us, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (the Exalted): "Or are they envying the people upon what Allah has Given them from His Grace?" (4:54).
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: '**We are the envied ones.**'

chapter: Chapter 17: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) and that Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted Obligated Obedience and Cordiality to Them (a.s.), and They (a.s.) are the Envied Ones Upon What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) of His (a.z.w.j.) Grace
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 4. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated to us, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Al Qasim Bin Muhammad and Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Aban Bin Usman, from Abu Al Sabbah Al Kinani, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) who said: '**O Abu Al Sabbah! We (a.s.) are the envied people**,' and he (a.s.) gestured with his hand to his chest.
arabicText: 4- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنِ الْقَاسِمِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ فَضَالَةَ بْنِ أَيُّوبَ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِي الصَّبَاحِ الْكِتَابِي عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: يَا أَبَا الصَّبَاحِ نَحْنُ النَّاسُ الْمَحْسُودُونَ وَ أَشَارَ بِيَدِهِ إِلَى صَدْرِهِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 4. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated to us, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Al Qasim Bin Muhammad and Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Aban Bin Usman, from Abu Al Sabbah Al Kinani, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) who said:
thaqalaynMatn: '**O Abu Al Sabbah! We (a.s.) are the envied people**,' and he (a.s.) gestured with his hand to his chest.

chapter: Chapter 17: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) and that Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted Obligated Obedience and Cordiality to Them (a.s.), and They (a.s.) are the Envied Ones Upon What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) of His (a.z.w.j.) Grace
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 5. Ibn Yazeed narrated, from Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ibn Uzina, from Bureyd, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "Or are they envying the people upon what Allah has Given them from His Grace?" (4:54): '**We (a.s.) are the people envied upon what Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Given us (a.s.) of the Imamate, above all the creatures of Allah (a.z.w.j.) altogether.**'
arabicText: 5- حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ يَزِيدَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنِ ابْنِ أُدَيْنَةَ عَنْ بُرَيْدٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى أَمْ يَحْسُدُونَ النَّاسَ على ما آتَاهُمُ اللهُ مِنْ فَضْلِهِ فَنَحْنُ النَّاسُ الْمَحْسُودُونَ عَلَى مَا آتَانَا اللهُ مِنَ الْإِمَامَةِ دُونَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ جَمِيعاً.
thaqalaynSanad: 5. Ibn Yazeed narrated, from Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ibn Uzina, from Bureyd, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "Or are they envying the people upon what Allah has Given them from His Grace?" (4:54):
thaqalaynMatn: '**We (a.s.) are the people envied upon what Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Given us (a.s.) of the Imamate, above all the creatures of Allah (a.z.w.j.) altogether.**'

chapter: Chapter 17: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) and that Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted Obligated Obedience and Cordiality to Them (a.s.), and They (a.s.) are the Envied Ones Upon What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) of His (a.z.w.j.) Grace
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 6. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein and Ibn Yazeed narrated together, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ibn Uzina, from Bureyd Al Ijaly, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "So We have Given the Progeny of Ibrahim, the Book and the Wisdom, and have Given them a grand kingdom" (4:54). He (a.s.) said: '**We (a.z.w.j.) Made the Messengers, the Prophets and the Imams (a.s.) to be from them. So, how come they are accepting regarding the Progeny of Ibrahim (a.s.) and are denying regarding the Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.)?**' I said: 'So what is the meaning of His (a.z.w.j.) Words: "and have Given them a grand kingdom"?' He (a.s.) said: '**The grand kingdom is that He Made Imams (a.s.) to be from them. One who obeys them (a.s.) obeys Allah (a.z.w.j.), and one who disobeys them (a.s.) disobeys Allah (a.z.w.j.). Thus it is the grand kingdom.**'
arabicText: 6- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ وَ ابْنُ يَزِيدَ مَعاً عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنِ ابْنِ أَذِيْنَةَ عَنْ بُرَيْدِ الْعِجْلِي عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى فَقَدْ آتَيْنَا آل إبراهيم الكتاب و الحِكْمَةَ وَآتَيْنَاهُمْ مُلكاً عَظِيماً فَجَعَلْنَا مِنْهُمُ الرُّسُلَ وَ الْأَنْبِيَاء وَ الْأَئِمَّةَ فَكَيْفَ يُقِرُّونَ فِي آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَ يُنْكِرُونَ فِي آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ص قلتُ فَمَا مَعْنَى قَوْلِهِ وَ آتَيْنَاهُمْ مُلكاً عَظِيماً قَالَ الْمُلْكُ الْعَظِيمُ أَنْ جَعَلَ فِيهِمْ أَئِمَّةً مَنْ أَطَاعَهُمْ أَطَاعَ اللَّهَ وَ مَنْ عَصَاهُمْ عَصَى اللَّهَ فَهُوَ الْمُلْكُ الْعَظِيمُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 6. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein and Ibn Yazeed narrated together, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ibn Uzina, from Bureyd Al Ijaly, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "So We have Given the Progeny of Ibrahim, the Book and the Wisdom, and have Given them a grand kingdom" (4:54).
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: '**We (a.z.w.j.) Made the Messengers, the Prophets and the Imams (a.s.) to be from them. So, how come they are accepting regarding the Progeny of Ibrahim (a.s.) and are denying regarding the Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.)?**' I said: 'So what is the meaning of His (a.z.w.j.) Words: "and have Given them a grand kingdom"?' He (a.s.) said: '**The grand kingdom is that He Made Imams (a.s.) to be from them. One who obeys them (a.s.) obeys Allah (a.z.w.j.), and one who disobeys them (a.s.) disobeys Allah (a.z.w.j.). Thus it is the grand kingdom.**'

chapter: Chapter 18: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) and That Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Paired Them (a.s.) With His (a.z.w.j.) Prophet (s.a.w.a.) Regarding the Questioning
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ibn Uzina, from Bureyd Al Ijaly who said: 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "And it is a Zikr for you and for your people, and soon you shall be Questioned" (43:44). He (a.s.) said: "**Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) and the People (a.s.) of his (s.a.w.a.) Household are the People of the Zikr, and they (a.s.) are the ones to be Asked.**"'
arabicText: 1- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرِ عَنِ ابْنِ أُذَيْنَةَ عَنْ بُرَيْدِ الْعِجْلِي قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَالَى وَ إِنَّهُ لَذِكْرٌ لَكَ وَ لِقَوْمِكَ وَ سَوْفَ تُسْأَلُونَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص وَ أَهْلُ بَيْتِهِ أَهْلُ الذِّكْرِ وَ هُمُ الْمَسْئُولُونَ.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ibn Uzina, from Bureyd Al Ijaly who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "And it is a Zikr for you and for your people, and soon you shall be Questioned" (43:44). He (a.s.) said: "**Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) and the People (a.s.) of his (s.a.w.a.) Household are the People of the Zikr, and they (a.s.) are the ones to be Asked.**"'

chapter: Chapter 18: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) and That Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Paired Them (a.s.) With His (a.z.w.j.) Prophet (s.a.w.a.) Regarding the Questioning
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 2. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein narrated, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Ibn Uzina, from Bureyd Bin Muawiya who said: 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "And it is a Zikr for you and for your people, and soon you shall be Questioned" (43:44). He (a.s.) said: "**Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) is the Zikr and the People (a.s.) of his (s.a.w.a.) Household are the ones to be Asked.**"'
arabicText: 2- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ يَحْيَى عَنِ ابْنِ أُذَيْنَةَ عَنْ بُرَيْدِ بْنِ مُعَاوِيَةَ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ إِنَّهُ لَذِكْرٌ لَكَ وَ لِقَوْمِكَ وَ سَوْفَ تُسْأَلُونَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص الذِّكْرُ وَ أَهْلُ بَيْتِهِ الْمَسْئُولُونَ.
thaqalaynSanad: 2. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein narrated, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Ibn Uzina, from Bureyd Bin Muawiya who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "And it is a Zikr for you and for your people, and soon you shall be Questioned" (43:44). He (a.s.) said: "**Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) is the Zikr and the People (a.s.) of his (s.a.w.a.) Household are the ones to be Asked.**"'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein narrated, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Mansour Bin Yunus, from Abu Bakr Al Hazramy who said: 'I was in the presence of Abu Ja'far (a.s.) and Al-Ward, brother of Al-Kumeyt, entered and said: "May Allah (a.z.w.j.) Make me to be sacrificed for you (a.s.)! I have chosen seventy questions and now not even one has presented itself to me." He (a.s.) said: "And not even one, O Ward?" He said: "Yes, one has presented itself to me." He (a.s.) said: "And what is it?" He said: "The Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted: 'therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know' (16:43)." He (a.s.) said: "**O Ward! Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted Commands you to ask us (a.s.), and for us (a.s.) is that if we (a.s.) so desire, we (a.s.) answer you, and if we (a.s.) so desire, we (a.s.) do not answer you.**"
arabicText: 1- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنْ مَنْصُورِ بْنِ يُونُسَ عَنْ أَبِي بَكْرِ الحَضْرَمِي قَالَ : كُنتُ عِنْدَ أَبي جَعْفَرٍ ع وَ دَخَلَ عَلَيْهِ الْوَرْدُ أَحُو الْكُمَيْتِ فَقَالَ جَعْلَنِي اللهُ فِدَاكَ اخْتَرْتُ لَكَ سَبْعِينَ مَسْأَلَهُ مَا يَحْضُرُنِي مَسْأَلَةٌ وَاحِدَةٌ مِنْهَا قَالَ وَ لَا وَاحِدَةٌ يَا وَرْدُ قَالَ بَلَى قَدْ حَضَرَنِي وَاحِدَةٌ قَالَ وَ مَا هي قَالَ قَوْلُ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَالَى فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ يَا وَرْدُ أَمَرَكُمُ اللهُ تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَالَى أَنْ تَسْأَلُونَا وَ لَنَا إِنَّ شِئْنَا أَجَبْنَاكُمْ وَ إِنْ شِئْنَا لَمْ نحبكم.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein narrated, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Mansour Bin Yunus, from Abu Bakr Al Hazramy who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I was in the presence of Abu Ja'far (a.s.) and Al-Ward, brother of Al-Kumeyt, entered and said: "May Allah (a.z.w.j.) Make me to be sacrificed for you (a.s.)! I have chosen seventy questions and now not even one has presented itself to me." He (a.s.) said: "And not even one, O Ward?" He said: "Yes, one has presented itself to me." He (a.s.) said: "And what is it?" He said: "The Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted: 'therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know' (16:43)." He (a.s.) said: "**O Ward! Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted Commands you to ask us (a.s.), and for us (a.s.) is that if we (a.s.) so desire, we (a.s.) answer you, and if we (a.s.) so desire, we (a.s.) do not answer you.**"'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 2. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Al Hussein, from Safwan, from Abu Usamah who said: 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**The Zikr is Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) and we (a.s.) are its people, the ones to be asked.**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 2- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ عَنْ أَبِي أُسَامَةَ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ الذِّكْرُ مُحَمَّدٌ ص وَ نَحْنُ أَهْلُهُ الْمَسْئُولُونَ.
thaqalaynSanad: 2. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Al Hussein, from Safwan, from Abu Usamah who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**The Zikr is Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) and we (a.s.) are its people, the ones to be asked.**"'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 3. Al Hussein Bin Muhammad narrated, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Abu Dawood Al Mustariq, from Muhammad Bin Marwan, from Fuzeyl Bin Yasar, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) is the Zikr and we (a.s.) are its people.**" [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 3- حَدَّثَنَا الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِي دَاوُدَ الْمُسْتَرِقِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مَرْوَانَ عَنْ فُضَيْلِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص الذِّكْرُ وَ نَحْنُ أَهْلُهُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 3. Al Hussein Bin Muhammad narrated, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Abu Dawood Al Mustariq, from Muhammad Bin Marwan, from Fuzeyl Bin Yasar, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43).
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) is the Zikr and we (a.s.) are its people.**"

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 4. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein narrated, from Nasr Bin Shuayb, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Abu Hamza, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding His (a.z.w.j.) saying: "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr.**" [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 4- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ نَصْرِ بْنِ شُعَيْبٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفُضَيْلِ عَنْ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فِي قَوْلِهِ فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ نَحْنُ أَهْلُ الذِّكْرِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 4. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein narrated, from Nasr Bin Shuayb, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Abu Hamza, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding His (a.z.w.j.) saying: "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43).
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr.**"

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 5. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein narrated, from Ibrahim Bin Abu Al Bilad, from his father, from Hammad Bin Abu Talha who said: 'Abu Abdullah (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr whom Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Commanded with asking them.**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 5- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ أَبِي الْبِلَادِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ أَبِي طَلْحَةَ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع نَحْنُ أَهْلُ الذِّكْرِ الَّذِينَ أَمَرَ اللَّهُ بِسُؤَالِهِمْ.
thaqalaynSanad: 5. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein narrated, from Ibrahim Bin Abu Al Bilad, from his father, from Hammad Bin Abu Talha who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Abu Abdullah (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr whom Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Commanded with asking them.**"'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 6. Salama narrated, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Amro Bin Ibrahim, from Asbat Bin Salim who said: 'I was in the presence of Abu Abdullah (a.s.) and a man asked him (a.s.) about the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**The Zikr is Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) and we (a.s.) are its people.**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 6- حَدَّثَنَا سَلَمَةُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَسْبَاطِ بْنِ سَالِمٍ قَالَ: كُنْتُ عِنْدَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع فَسَأَلَهُ رَجُلٌ عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ الذِّكْرُ مُحَمَّدٌ ص وَ نَحْنُ أَهْلُهُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 6. Salama narrated, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Amro Bin Ibrahim, from Asbat Bin Salim who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I was in the presence of Abu Abdullah (a.s.) and a man asked him (a.s.) about the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**The Zikr is Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) and we (a.s.) are its people.**"'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 7. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein narrated, from Ibrahim Bin Abu Al Bilad, from Hammad, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**They (a.s.) are the Progeny of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.). It is upon the people to ask them (a.s.), and it isn't upon them (a.s.) that they answer. That is up to them (a.s.). If they (a.s.) so desire, they (a.s.) answer, and if they (a.s.) so desire, they (a.s.) do not answer.**" [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 7- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ أَبِي الْبِلَادِ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ هُمْ آلُ مُحَمَّدٍ ص عَلَى النَّاسِ أَنْ يَسْأَلُوهُمْ وَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِمْ أَنْ يُجِيبُوهُمْ ذَلِكَ إِلَيْهِمْ إِنْ شَاءُوا أَجَابُوا وَ إِنْ شَاءُوا لَمْ يُجِيبُوا.
thaqalaynSanad: 7. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein narrated, from Ibrahim Bin Abu Al Bilad, from Hammad, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43).
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**They (a.s.) are the Progeny of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.). It is upon the people to ask them (a.s.), and it isn't upon them (a.s.) that they answer. That is up to them (a.s.). If they (a.s.) so desire, they (a.s.) answer, and if they (a.s.) so desire, they (a.s.) do not answer.**"

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 8. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein narrated, from Ibn Fazzal, from Sa'alba, from Zurara who said: 'I said to him (a.s.): "Can the Imam (a.s.) be such that he (a.s.) is asked about the Permissible(s) and the Prohibitions and there does not happen to be anything with him (a.s.) regarding it?" He (a.s.) said: "No." And he (a.s.) said: "Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted Said: 'therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr - they are the Imams (a.s.) - if you don't know' (16:43)." I said: "Who are they?" He (a.s.) said: "Us (a.s.)." I said: "So, who are the ones Commanded with the questioning?" He (a.s.) said: "You are." I said: "So, we have to ask you (a.s.)?" - and I thought that he (a.s.) would not refuse me when I came to him (a.s.) from this perspective. He (a.s.) said: "**But rather you are Commanded to be asking, and the answer isn't (Obligated) upon us (a.s.). But rather, that is up to us (a.s.).**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 8- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنَ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنِ ابْنِ فَضَالٍ عَنْ ثَعْلَبَةَ عَنْ زُرَارَهُ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع يَكُونُ الْإِمَامُ يُسْأَلُ عَنِ الحَلَالِ وَ الْحَرَامِ وَ لَا يَكُونُ عِنْدَهُ فِيهِ شَيْءٌ قَالَ لا فَقَالَ قَالَ اللهُ تَعَالَى فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ إِنْ كُنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ قُلْتُ مَنْ هُمْ قَالَ نَحْنُ قُلْتُ فَمَنِ الْمَأْمُورُ بِالْمَسْأَلَةِ قَالَ أَنْتُمْ قُلْتُ فَإِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ وَ قَدْ رُمْتُ أَنَّهُ لَا يَمنعُ مِنِّي إِذا أَتَيْتُهُ مِنْ هَذَا الْوَجْهِ قَالَ إِنَّمَا أُمِرْتُمْ أَنْ تَسْأَلُوا وَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْنَا الْجَوَابُ إِنَّمَا ذَلِكَ إِلَيْنَا.
thaqalaynSanad: 8. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein narrated, from Ibn Fazzal, from Sa'alba, from Zurara who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I said to him (a.s.): "Can the Imam (a.s.) be such that he (a.s.) is asked about the Permissible(s) and the Prohibitions and there does not happen to be anything with him (a.s.) regarding it?" He (a.s.) said: "No." And he (a.s.) said: "Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted Said: 'therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr - they are the Imams (a.s.) - if you don't know' (16:43)." I said: "Who are they?" He (a.s.) said: "Us (a.s.)." I said: "So, who are the ones Commanded with the questioning?" He (a.s.) said: "You are." I said: "So, we have to ask you (a.s.)?" - and I thought that he (a.s.) would not refuse me when I came to him (a.s.) from this perspective. He (a.s.) said: "**But rather you are Commanded to be asking, and the answer isn't (Obligated) upon us (a.s.). But rather, that is up to us (a.s.).**"'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 9. Al Sindy Bin Muhammad narrated, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Muslim, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr, and we (a.s.) are the ones to be asked.**" [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 9- حَدَّثَنَا السَّنْدِي بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَاصِمِ بْنِ حُمَيْدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللهِ فَسْئَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ نَحْنُ أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ وَ نَحْنُ الْمَسْئُولُونَ.
thaqalaynSanad: 9. Al Sindy Bin Muhammad narrated, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Muslim, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43).
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr, and we (a.s.) are the ones to be asked.**"

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 10. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein and Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar narrated, from Ibn Fazzal, from Sa'alba, from one of our companions, from Muhammad Bin Marwan, from Fuzeyl Bin Yasar, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) and the People (a.s.) of his (s.a.w.a.) Household are the People of the Zikr, and they (a.s.) are the Imams.**" [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 10- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ وَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْجَبَّارِ عَنِ الْابْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ ثَعْلَبَةَ عَنْ بَعْضٍ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مَرْوَانَ عَنِ الْفُضَيْلِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ص وَ أَهْلَ بَيْتِهِ هُمْ أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ وَ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 10. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein and Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar narrated, from Ibn Fazzal, from Sa'alba, from one of our companions, from Muhammad Bin Marwan, from Fuzeyl Bin Yasar, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43).
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) and the People (a.s.) of his (s.a.w.a.) Household are the People of the Zikr, and they (a.s.) are the Imams.**"

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 11. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Ibn Muskan, from Al Hassan Bin Abu Al A'la who said: 'I said to Abu Abdullah (a.s.): "The people claim that the Zikr are the People of the Book (Jews and Christians)." He (a.s.) said: "**How can it be, when Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Said: 'and whoever disbelieves in it, so those are the losers' (2:121). Then they would be calling you to their religion! But, we (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr.**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 11- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ فَضَالَةَ بْنِ أَيُّوبَ عَنِ ابْنِ مُسْكَانَ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ أَبِي الْعَلَاءِ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع أَنَّ النَّاسَ يَزْعُمُونَ أَنَّ الذِّكْرَ أَهْلُ الْكِتَابِ فَقَالَ ع كَيْفَ وَ قَدْ قَالَ اللَّهُ مَنْ كَفَرَ بِهِ فَأُولئِكَ هُمُ الْخاسِرُونَ إِذَا يَدْعُونَكُمْ إِلَى دِينِهِمْ وَ لَكِنْ نَحْنُ أَهْلُ الذِّكْرِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 11. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Ibn Muskan, from Al Hassan Bin Abu Al A'la who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I said to Abu Abdullah (a.s.): "The people claim that the Zikr are the People of the Book (Jews and Christians)." He (a.s.) said: "**How can it be, when Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Said: 'and whoever disbelieves in it, so those are the losers' (2:121). Then they would be calling you to their religion! But, we (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr.**"'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 12. Al Sindy Bin Muhammad narrated, from Safwan, from Abu Usamah who said: 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr.**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 12- حَدَّثَنَا السَّنْدِيُّ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ عَنْ أَبِي أُسَامَةَ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ نَحْنُ أَهْلُ الذِّكْرِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 12. Al Sindy Bin Muhammad narrated, from Safwan, from Abu Usamah who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr.**"'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 13. Muhammad Bin Abdul Hameed narrated, from Muhammad Bin Fuzeyl, from Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.) who said: 'I said: "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr and we (a.s.) are the ones to be asked.**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 13- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْحَمِيدِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ فُضَيْلِ عَنْ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ع قَالَ: قُلْتُ فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ نَحْنُ أَهْلُ الذِّكْرِ وَ نَحْنُ الْمَسْئُولُونَ.
thaqalaynSanad: 13. Muhammad Bin Abdul Hameed narrated, from Muhammad Bin Fuzeyl, from Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.) who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I said: "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr and we (a.s.) are the ones to be asked.**"'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 14. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Abu Nasr, from Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr and we (a.s.) are the ones to be asked.**" [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 14- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ أَبِي نَصْرٍ عَنْ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ نَحْنُ أَهْلُ الذِّكْرِ وَ نَحْنُ الْمَسْئُولُونَ.
thaqalaynSanad: 14. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Abu Nasr, from Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43).
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr and we (a.s.) are the ones to be asked.**"

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 15. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Safwan, from Abu Usman, from Al Moalla Bin Khuneys, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**They (a.s.) are the Progeny of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.).**" We mentioned the Hadeeth of Al-Kalby to him (a.s.) that he said it was regarding the People of the Book (Jews and Christians). He (a.s.) cursed him and belied him. [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 15- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ عَنْ أَبِي عُثْمَانَ عَنِ الْمُعَلَّى بْنِ حُنَيْسٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ هُمْ آلُ مُحَمَّدٍ ص فَذَكَرْنَا لَهُ حَدِيثَ الْكَلْبِيِّ أَنَّهُ قَالَ هِيَ فِي أَهْلِ الْكِتَابِ قَالَ فَلَعَنَهُ وَ كَذَّبَهُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 15. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Safwan, from Abu Usman, from Al Moalla Bin Khuneys, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43).
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**They (a.s.) are the Progeny of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.).**" We mentioned the Hadeeth of Al-Kalby to him (a.s.) that he said it was regarding the People of the Book (Jews and Christians). He (a.s.) cursed him and belied him.

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 16. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Abdullah Bin Muskan, from Bukeyr, from the one who narrated it, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**Us (a.s.).**" I said: "We are the ones Commanded that we ask you (a.s.)?" He (a.s.) said: "**Yes.**" [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 16- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مُسْكَانَ عَنْ بُكَيْرٍ عَمَّنْ رَوَاهُ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللهِ فَسْئَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ نَحْنُ قُلْتُ نَحْنُ الْمَأْمُورُونَ أَنْ نَسْأَلَكُمْ قَالَ نَعَمْ.
thaqalaynSanad: 16. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Abdullah Bin Muskan, from Bukeyr, from the one who narrated it, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43).
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**Us (a.s.).**" I said: "We are the ones Commanded that we ask you (a.s.)?" He (a.s.) said: "**Yes.**"

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 17. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein narrated, from Ali Bin Asbat, from his father who said: 'I said to Abu Ja'far (a.s.): "The saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): 'therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know' (16:43)." He (a.s.) said: "**The Zikr is the Quran and we (a.s.) are its people.**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 17- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَسْبَاطٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع قَوْلُ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ الذِّكْرُ الْقُرْآنُ وَ نَحْنُ أَهْلُهُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 17. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein narrated, from Ali Bin Asbat, from his father who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I said to Abu Ja'far (a.s.): "The saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): 'therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know' (16:43)." He (a.s.) said: "**The Zikr is the Quran and we (a.s.) are its people.**"'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 18. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Abu Nasr, from Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr and we (a.s.) are the ones to be asked.**" [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 18- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ أَبِي نَصْرٍ عَنْ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ نَحْنُ أَهْلُ الذِّكْرِ وَ نَحْنُ الْمَسْئُولُونَ.
thaqalaynSanad: 18. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Abu Nasr, from Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43).
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr and we (a.s.) are the ones to be asked.**"

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 19. Abdullah Bin Ja'far narrated, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Ismail Bin Jabir and Abdul Kareem, from Abdul Hameed, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**The Book of Allah (a.z.w.j.) is the Zikr and its people (a.s.) are the Progeny of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) whom Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Commanded with asking them (a.s.), and He (a.z.w.j.) did not command with asking the ignorant ones. And Allah (a.z.w.j.) named the Quran as Zikr, so He (a.z.w.j.) Said: 'and We Sent the Reminder to you in order to clarify to the people what has been Sent to them, and perhaps they would be thinking' (16:44).**" [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 19- حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ جَابِرٍ وَ عَبْدِ الْكَرِيمِ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْحَمِيدِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع في قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى فَسْئَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ كِتَابُ اللهِ الذَّكْرُ وَ أَهْلُهُ آلُ مُحَمَّدٍ الَّذِينَ أَمَرَ اللهُ بِسُؤَالِهِمْ وَ لَمْ يُؤْمَرُوا بِسُؤالِ الْجِهَالِ وَ سَمَّى اللَّهُ الْقُرْآنَ ذِكْرًا فَقَالَ وَ أَنْزَلْنَا إِلَيْكَ الذِّكْرَ لِتُبَيِّنَ لِلنَّاسِ مَا نُزِّلَ إِلَيْهِمْ وَلَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ.
thaqalaynSanad: 19. Abdullah Bin Ja'far narrated, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Ismail Bin Jabir and Abdul Kareem, from Abdul Hameed, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43).
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**The Book of Allah (a.z.w.j.) is the Zikr and its people (a.s.) are the Progeny of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) whom Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Commanded with asking them (a.s.), and He (a.z.w.j.) did not command with asking the ignorant ones. And Allah (a.z.w.j.) named the Quran as Zikr, so He (a.z.w.j.) Said: 'and We Sent the Reminder to you in order to clarify to the people what has been Sent to them, and perhaps they would be thinking' (16:44).**"

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 20. By the chain, from Al-Reza (a.s.) who said: 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Said: "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr" - and they (a.s.) are the Imams - "if you don't know" (16:43). So it is upon them (the people) that they ask them (a.s.), and it isn't upon them (a.s.) that they answer them. **If they (a.s.) so desire, they (a.s.) answer, and if they (a.s.) so desire, they (a.s.) do not answer.**' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 20- بِالْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الرِّضا ع قَالَ: قَالَ اللهُ فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ وَهُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ فَعَلَيْهِمْ أَنْ يَسْأَلُوهُمْ وَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِمْ أَنْ يُجِيبُوهُمْ إِنْ شَاءُوا أَجَابُوا وَ إِنْ شَاءُوا لَمْ يُجِيبُوا.
thaqalaynSanad: 20. By the chain, from Al-Reza (a.s.) who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Said: "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr" - and they (a.s.) are the Imams - "if you don't know" (16:43). So it is upon them (the people) that they ask them (a.s.), and it isn't upon them (a.s.) that they answer them. **If they (a.s.) so desire, they (a.s.) answer, and if they (a.s.) so desire, they (a.s.) do not answer.**'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 21. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Yaqteen, from one of our companions, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: '**It is upon you that you should be asking us (a.s.), and it isn't upon us (a.s.) that we (a.s.) answer you.**' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 21- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِيسَى عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ يَقْطِينٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ عَلَيْكُمْ أَنْ تَسْأَلُونَا وَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْنَا أَنْ نُجِيبَكُمْ.
thaqalaynSanad: 21. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Yaqteen, from one of our companions, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43).
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: '**It is upon you that you should be asking us (a.s.), and it isn't upon us (a.s.) that we (a.s.) answer you.**'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 22. It is narrated to us by Al Hussein Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Jamhour, from Sa'dan Bin Muslim, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: '**Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) is the Zikr and we (a.s.) are its people, the ones to be asked.**' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 22- حَدَّثَنَا الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ جُمْهُورٍ عَنْ سَعْدَانَ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص الذِّكْرُ وَ نَحْنُ أَهْلُهُ الْمَسْئُولُونَ.
thaqalaynSanad: 22. It is narrated to us by Al Hussein Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Jamhour, from Sa'dan Bin Muslim, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43).
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: '**Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) is the Zikr and we (a.s.) are its people, the ones to be asked.**'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 23. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Abu Al-Hazramy who said: 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr.**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 23- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبِ عَنْ أَبِي الْحَضْرَمِي قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ نَحْنُ أَهْلُ الذِّكْرِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 23. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Abu Al-Hazramy who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the people of the Zikr.**"'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 24. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Al Hajjal, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub who said: 'I said to Abu Abdullah (a.s.) that Allah (a.z.w.j.) Said: "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**The people of the Zikr are the Imams.**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 24- حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَجَّالِ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ يَعْقُوبَ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع إِنَّ اللَّهَ قَالَ فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ أَهْلُ الذِّكْرِ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 24. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Al Hajjal, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I said to Abu Abdullah (a.s.) that Allah (a.z.w.j.) Said: "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**The people of the Zikr are the Imams.**"'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 25. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Al Hajjal, from Ghalib Al Nahwy who said: 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**The Zikr is Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) and we (a.s.) are its people.**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 25- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنِ الْحَجَّالِ عَنْ غَالِبِ النَّحْوِي قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ الذِّكْرُ مُحَمَّدٌ ص وَ نَحْنُ أَهْلُهُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 25. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Al Hajjal, from Ghalib Al Nahwy who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about the saying of Allah (a.z.w.j.): "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: "**The Zikr is Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) and we (a.s.) are its people.**"'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 26. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Ja'far Bin Bashir, from Musanna Al Hannat, from Abdullah Bin Ajlan regarding His (a.z.w.j.) saying: "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He said: '**Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) and the People (a.s.) of his (s.a.w.a.) Household from the Imams (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr.**' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 26- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ بَشِيرٍ عَنْ مُثَنَّى الْخَنَّاطِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَجْلَانَ فِي قَوْلِهِ فَسَتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص وَ أَهْلَ بَيْتِهِ مِنَ الْأَئِمَّةِ هُمْ أَهْلُ الذِّكْرِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 26. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Ja'far Bin Bashir, from Musanna Al Hannat, from Abdullah Bin Ajlan regarding His (a.z.w.j.) saying: "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43).
thaqalaynMatn: He said: '**Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) and the People (a.s.) of his (s.a.w.a.) Household from the Imams (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr.**'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 27. It is narrated to us by Ibn Marouf, from Hammad, from Bureyd, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding His (a.z.w.j.) saying: "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). He (a.s.) said: '**The Zikr is the Quran and we (a.s.) are its people.**' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 27- حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ مَعْرُوفٍ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنْ بُرَيْدٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فِي قَوْلِهِ فَسْئَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لا تَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ الذِّكْرُ الْقُرْآنُ وَ نَحْنُ أَهْلُهُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 27. It is narrated to us by Ibn Marouf, from Hammad, from Bureyd, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding His (a.z.w.j.) saying: "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43).
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: '**The Zikr is the Quran and we (a.s.) are its people.**'

chapter: Chapter 19: Regarding Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), They (a.s.) are the People of the Zikr, Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Commanded with Asking Them (a.s.), and the Instructions are Up to Them, if They (a.s.) So Desire They Answer, and if They (a.s.) So Desires, They (a.s.) Do Not Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 28. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Ja'far, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Al Washa, from Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.) who said: 'From the Obligations upon the Imams (a.s.) what isn't upon their Shias, and upon our (a.s.) Shias is what isn't upon us (a.s.). Allah (a.z.w.j.) Commanded them to be asking us (a.s.), so He (a.z.w.j.) Said: "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). **He (a.z.w.j.) Commanded them that they should be asking us (a.s.) and the answer(ing) isn't (Obligated) upon us (a.s.). If we (a.s.) like we (a.s.) answer, and if we (a.s.) like, we (a.s.) withhold.**' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 28- حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيَّ الْوَشَاءِ عَنْ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ع قَالَ: عَلَى الْأَئِمَّةِ مِنَ الْفَرَائِضِ مَا لَيْسَ عَلَى شِيعَتِهِمْ وَ عَلَى شِيعَتِنَا مَا لَيْسَ عَلَيْنَا أَمَرَهُمُ اللَّهُ أَنْ يَسْأَلُونَا فَقَالَ فَسْتَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ فَأَمَرَهُمْ أَنْ يَسْأَلُونَا وَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْنَا الْجَوَابُ إِنْ شِئْنَا أَحَبَّنَا وَ إِنْ شِئْنَا أَمْسَكْنَا.
thaqalaynSanad: 28. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Ja'far, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Al Washa, from Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.) who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'From the Obligations upon the Imams (a.s.) what isn't upon their Shias, and upon our (a.s.) Shias is what isn't upon us (a.s.). Allah (a.z.w.j.) Commanded them to be asking us (a.s.), so He (a.z.w.j.) Said: "therefore ask the people of Al-Zikr if you don't know" (16:43). **He (a.z.w.j.) Commanded them that they should be asking us (a.s.) and the answer(ing) isn't (Obligated) upon us (a.s.). If we (a.s.) like we (a.s.) answer, and if we (a.s.) like, we (a.s.) withhold.**'

chapter: Chapter 20: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), There Happens to be with Them (a.s.), the Permissibles and the Prohibitions During All of the Situations, But They (a.s.) Don't Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. It is narrated to us by this chain, said: 'I said to Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.): "Can the Imam (a.s.) happen to be in such a state that he (a.s.) is asked about the Permissible(s) and the Prohibitions, and that which the people are needy to, and there does not happen to be anything with him (a.s.)?" He (a.s.) said: "**No, but it would happen to be with him (a.s.) and he (a.s.) may not answer.**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 1- حَدَّثَنَا بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي الْحَسَنِ يَكُونُ الْإِمَامُ فِي حَالٍ يُسْأَلُ عَنِ الحَلَالِ وَ الْحَرَامِ وَ الَّذِي يَحْتَاجُ النَّاسُ إِلَيْهِ فَلَا يَكُونُ عِنْدَهُ شَيْءٌ قَالَ لَا و لكِنْ قَدْ يَكُونُ عِنْدَهُ وَ لَا يُجِيبُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. It is narrated to us by this chain, said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I said to Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.): "Can the Imam (a.s.) happen to be in such a state that he (a.s.) is asked about the Permissible(s) and the Prohibitions, and that which the people are needy to, and there does not happen to be anything with him (a.s.)?" He (a.s.) said: "**No, but it would happen to be with him (a.s.) and he (a.s.) may not answer.**"'

chapter: Chapter 20: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), There Happens to be with Them (a.s.), the Permissibles and the Prohibitions During All of the Situations, But They (a.s.) Don't Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 2. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated to us, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman Al Nowfaly, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Rahman Al Asady and Al Hassan Bin Salih who said: 'A man from the Waqifites came to him (a.s.) and grabbed hold with the rein of his (a.s.) animal and said: "I want to ask you (a.s.)." He (a.s.) said: "Then I (a.s.) shall not answer." He said: "And why will you (a.s.) not answer me?" He (a.s.) said: "**Because that is up to me (a.s.). If I (a.s.) so desire I (a.s.) answer, and if I (a.s.) so desire, I (a.s.) will not answer you.**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 2- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ النَّوْفَلِي عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الْأَسَدِي وَ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ صَالِحٍ قَالَ: أَتَاهُ رَجُلٌ مِنَ الْوَاقِفَةِ وَ أَخَذَ بلحام دائتِهِ ع وَ قَالَ إِنِّي أُرِيدُ أَنْ أَسْأَلَكَ فَقالَ إذا لا أُجِيبُك فقال و لم لا تُحِيبُنِي قَالَ لِأَنَّ ذَاكَ إِلَيَّ إِنْ شِئْتُ أُجِيبُكَ وَ إِنْ شِئْتُ لَمْ أَجِبْكَ.
thaqalaynSanad: 2. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated to us, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman Al Nowfaly, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Rahman Al Asady and Al Hassan Bin Salih who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'A man from the Waqifites came to him (a.s.) and grabbed hold with the rein of his (a.s.) animal and said: "I want to ask you (a.s.)." He (a.s.) said: "Then I (a.s.) shall not answer." He said: "And why will you (a.s.) not answer me?" He (a.s.) said: "**Because that is up to me (a.s.). If I (a.s.) so desire I (a.s.) answer, and if I (a.s.) so desire, I (a.s.) will not answer you.**"'

chapter: Chapter 20: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), There Happens to be with Them (a.s.), the Permissibles and the Prohibitions During All of the Situations, But They (a.s.) Don't Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 3. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Abu Abdullah Al Nowfaly, from Al Qasim, from Jabir who said: 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about a questioning. He (a.s.) said: "When you meet Musa (a.s.), then ask him about it." I said: "Or you (a.s.) do not know it?" He (a.s.) said: "Yes (I do)." I said: "Then inform me with it." He (a.s.) said: "**There is no Permission (of Allah a.z.w.j.) for me (a.s.) regarding that.**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 3- أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ النَّوْفَلِي عَنِ الْقَاسِمِ عَنْ جَابِرٍ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع عَنْ مَسْأَلَةٍ أَوْ سُئِلَ فَقَالَ إِذَا لَقِيتَ مُوسَى فَاسْأَلْهُ عَنْهَا قَالَ فَقُلْتُ أَو لَا تَعْلَمُهَا قَالَ بَلَى قُلْتُ فَأَخْبِرْنِي بِمَا قَالَ لَمْ يُؤْدَنُ لِي فِي ذَلِكَ.
thaqalaynSanad: 3. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Abu Abdullah Al Nowfaly, from Al Qasim, from Jabir who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about a questioning. He (a.s.) said: "When you meet Musa (a.s.), then ask him about it." I said: "Or you (a.s.) do not know it?" He (a.s.) said: "Yes (I do)." I said: "Then inform me with it." He (a.s.) said: "**There is no Permission (of Allah a.z.w.j.) for me (a.s.) regarding that.**"'

chapter: Chapter 20: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), There Happens to be with Them (a.s.), the Permissibles and the Prohibitions During All of the Situations, But They (a.s.) Don't Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 4. Abbad Bin Suleyman narrated, from Sa'ad Bin Sa'ad, from Safwan Bin Yahya who said: 'I said to Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.): "Can the Imam (a.s.) happen to be in a state, he (a.s.) is asked about the Permissible or the Prohibition and that which the people are needy to, so there does not happen to be anything with him (a.s.)?" He (a.s.) said: "**No, but it would happen to be with him (a.s.), but he (a.s.) may not answer.**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 4- عَبَّادُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ يَحْيَى قَالَ: قُلْتُ لأبي الحسن ع يَكُونُ الْإِمَامُ فِي حَالٍ يُسْأَلُ عَنِ الحَلَالِ وَ الْحَرَامِ وَ الَّذِي يَحْتَاجُ النَّاسُ إِلَيْهِ فَلَا يَكُونُ عِنْدَهُ شَيْءٌ قَالَ لَا وَ لَكِنْ قَدْ يَكُونُ عِنْدَهُ وَ لَا يُجِيبُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 4. Abbad Bin Suleyman narrated, from Sa'ad Bin Sa'ad, from Safwan Bin Yahya who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I said to Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.): "Can the Imam (a.s.) happen to be in a state, he (a.s.) is asked about the Permissible or the Prohibition and that which the people are needy to, so there does not happen to be anything with him (a.s.)?" He (a.s.) said: "**No, but it would happen to be with him (a.s.), but he (a.s.) may not answer.**"'

chapter: Chapter 20: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), There Happens to be with Them (a.s.), the Permissibles and the Prohibitions During All of the Situations, But They (a.s.) Don't Answer
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 5. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein narrated, from Safwan, from Muhammad Bin Hakeem who said: 'I asked Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.) about the Imam (a.s.): "Can he (a.s.) be asked about something from the Permissible and the Prohibitions and that which the people are needy to and there does not happen to be anything with him (a.s.) regarding it?" He (a.s.) said: "**No, but it (answer) will be with him (a.s.) and he (a.s.) may not answer. That is up to him (a.s.), if he (a.s.) so desires to he (a.s.) answers, and if he (a.s.) so desires he (a.s.) does not answer.**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 5- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَكِيمٍ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبا الحسن ع عَنِ الْإِمَامِ هَلْ يُسْأَلُ عَنْ شَيْءٍ مِنَ الخَلالِ وَ الْحَرَامِ وَ الَّذِي يَحْتَاجُ إِلَيْهِ النَّاسُ وَ لَا يَكُونُ عِنْدَهُ فِيهِ شَيْءٌ قَالَ لَا وَ لَكِنْ يَكُونُ عِنْدَهُ وَ لَا يُجِيبُ ذَاكَ إِلَيْهِ إِنْ شَاءَ أَجَابَ وَإِنْ شَاءَ لَمْ يُجِبْ.
thaqalaynSanad: 5. Muhammad Bin Al Hussein narrated, from Safwan, from Muhammad Bin Hakeem who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I asked Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.) about the Imam (a.s.): "Can he (a.s.) be asked about something from the Permissible and the Prohibitions and that which the people are needy to and there does not happen to be anything with him (a.s.) regarding it?" He (a.s.) said: "**No, but it (answer) will be with him (a.s.) and he (a.s.) may not answer. That is up to him (a.s.), if he (a.s.) so desires to he (a.s.) answers, and if he (a.s.) so desires he (a.s.) does not answer.**"'

chapter: Chapter 21: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Inheritors of the Book and They (a.s.) are the Ones Preceding with the Goodness
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. Ahmad Bin Al Hassan Bin Fazzal narrated, from Humeyd Bin Al Musanna, from Abu Sallam Al Mar'ashy, from Sowrat Bin Kuleyb who said: 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about the Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants. So, for them is one who is unjust to himself, and from them is a moderate one, and from them is one who precedes with the deeds of goodness by the Permission of Allah" (35:32). He (a.s.) said: "**The one preceded with the deeds of goodness is the Imam (a.s.).**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 1- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ حُمَيْدِ بْنِ الْمُثَنَّى عَنْ أَبِي سَلَامِ الْمَرْعَشِيِّ عَنْ سَوْرَةَ بْنِ كُلَيْبٍ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى ثُمَّ أَوْرَثْنَا الْكِتَابَ الَّذِينَ اصْطَفَيْنَا مِنْ عِبَادِنَا فَمِنْهُمْ ظالم لِنَفْسِهِ وَ مِنْهُمْ مُقْتَصِدٌ وَ مِنْهُمْ سَابِقٌ بِالخَيْرَاتِ بِإِذْنِ اللَّهِ قَالَ السَّابِقُ بِالْخَيْرَاتِ الْإِمَامُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. Ahmad Bin Al Hassan Bin Fazzal narrated, from Humeyd Bin Al Musanna, from Abu Sallam Al Mar'ashy, from Sowrat Bin Kuleyb who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about the Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants. So, for them is one who is unjust to himself, and from them is a moderate one, and from them is one who precedes with the deeds of goodness by the Permission of Allah" (35:32). He (a.s.) said: "**The one preceded with the deeds of goodness is the Imam (a.s.).**"'

chapter: Chapter 21: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Inheritors of the Book and They (a.s.) are the Ones Preceding with the Goodness
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 2. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Al Nazar Bin Suweyd, from Yahya Al Halby, from Ibn Muskan, from Muyasser, from Sowrat Bin Kuleyb who said: 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants. So, for them is one who is unjust to himself, and from them is a moderate one, and from them is one who precedes with the deeds of goodness by the Permission of Allah" (35:32). He (a.s.) said: "**The one precedes with the good deeds is the Imam (a.s.).**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 2- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنِ النَّضْرِ بْنِ سُوَيْدٍ عَنْ يَحْيَى الْحَلَبِيِّ عَنِ ابْنِ مُسْكَانَ عَنْ مُيَسِّرٍ عَنْ سَوْرَةَ بْنِ كُلَيْبٍ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَالَى ثُمَّ أَوْرَثْنَا الْكِتَابَ الَّذِينَ اصْطَفَيْنَا مِنْ عِبَادِنَا فَمِنْهُمْ ظَالِمٌ لِنَفْسِهِ وَ مِنْهُمْ مُقْتَصِدٌ وَ مِنْهُمْ سَابِقٌ بِالْخَيْرَاتِ بِإِذْنِ اللَّهِ قَالَ السَّابِقُ بِالْخَيْرَاتِ الْإِمَامُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 2. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Al Nazar Bin Suweyd, from Yahya Al Halby, from Ibn Muskan, from Muyasser, from Sowrat Bin Kuleyb who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants. So, for them is one who is unjust to himself, and from them is a moderate one, and from them is one who precedes with the deeds of goodness by the Permission of Allah" (35:32). He (a.s.) said: "**The one precedes with the good deeds is the Imam (a.s.).**"'

chapter: Chapter 21: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Inheritors of the Book and They (a.s.) are the Ones Preceding with the Goodness
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 3. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Al Ahwazy, from Al Nazr, from Yahya Al Halby, from Ibn Muskan, from Muyassar, from Sowrat Bin Kuleyb, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding this Verse: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants" (35:32). He (a.s.) said: "**The one preceding with the good deeds is the Imam (a.s.), and it is regarding the sons (a.s.) of Ali (a.s.) and (Syeda) Fatima (a.s.).**"' [cite: 4684]
arabicText: 3- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْأَهْوَازِي عَنِ النَّصْرِ عَنْ يَحْيَى الْخَلْبِيِّ عَنِ ابْنِ مُسْكَانَ عَنْ مُيَسْرٍ عَنْ سَوْرَةَ بْنِ كُلَيْبٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع أَنَّهُ قَالَ: فِي هَذِهِ الْآيَةِ ثُمَّ أَوْرَثْنَا الْكِتَابَ الَّذِينَ اصْطَفَيْنَا مِنْ عِبَادِنَا الْآيَةَ قَالَ السَّابِقُ بِالْخَيْرَاتِ الإِمَامُ فَهِيَ فِي وُلْدِ عَلِيَّ وَ فَاطِمَةَ ع.
thaqalaynSanad: 3. Ahmad Bin Muhammad narrated, from Al Ahwazy, from Al Nazr, from Yahya Al Halby, from Ibn Muskan, from Muyassar, from Sowrat Bin Kuleyb, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding this Verse: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants" (35:32).
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**The one preceding with the good deeds is the Imam (a.s.), and it is regarding the sons (a.s.) of Ali (a.s.) and (Syeda) Fatima (a.s.).**"

chapter: Chapter 21: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Inheritors of the Book and They (a.s.) are the Ones Preceding with the Goodness
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 4. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar who said, 'It is narrated to us by Safwan Bin Yahya, from Yunus and Hisham, 'From Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza (a.s.), he (the narrator) said, 'I asked him (a.s.) about Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Mighty and Majestic: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants. So, for them is one who is unjust to himself, and from them is a moderate one, and from them is one who precedes with the deeds of goodness" [35:32], he (a.s.) said: "**The Imam (a.s.)**."
arabicText: 4- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْجَبَّارِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا صَفْوَانُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ يُونُسَ وَ هِشَامٍ عَنْ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَاعِ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَ ثُمَّ أَوْرَثْنَا الْكِتَابَ الَّذِينَ اصْطَفَيْنَا مِنْ عِبَادِنَا فَمِنْهُمْ ظَالِمٌ لِنَفْسِهِ وَ مِنْهُمْ مُقْتَصِدٌ وَ مِنْهُمْ سَابِقٌ بِالْخَيْرَاتِ قَالَ الْإِمَامُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 4. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar who said, 'It is narrated to us by Safwan Bin Yahya, from Yunus and Hisham, 'From Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza (a.s.), he (the narrator) said, 'I asked him (a.s.) about Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Mighty and Majestic: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants. So, for them is one who is unjust to himself, and from them is a moderate one, and from them is one who precedes with the deeds of goodness" [35:32],
thaqalaynMatn: he (a.s.) said: "**The Imam (a.s.)**."

chapter: Chapter 21: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Inheritors of the Book and They (a.s.) are the Ones Preceding with the Goodness
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 5. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Mansour Burzij, from Suleyman Bin Khalid who said, 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants. So, for them is one who is unjust to himself, and from them is a moderate one, and from them is one who precedes with the deeds of goodness" [35:32], he (a.s.) said: "**The Imam (a.s.)**."
arabicText: 5- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ بُرُزْجٍ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ خَالِدٍ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ثُمَّ أَوْرَثْنَا الْكِتَابَ الَّذِينَ اصْطَفَيْنا مِنْ عِبَادِنَا فَمِنْهُمْ ظالم لِنَفْسِهِ وَ مِنْهُمْ مُقْتَصِدٌ وَ مِنْهُمْ سَابِقٌ بِالْخَيْرَاتِ قَالَ الْإِمَامُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 5. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Mansour Burzij, from Suleyman Bin Khalid who said, 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants. So, for them is one who is unjust to himself, and from them is a moderate one, and from them is one who precedes with the deeds of goodness" [35:32],
thaqalaynMatn: he (a.s.) said: "**The Imam (a.s.)**."

chapter: Chapter 21: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Inheritors of the Book and They (a.s.) are the Ones Preceding with the Goodness
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 6. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from Abdul Kareem, from Suleyman Bin Khalid, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.), he (the narrator) said, 'I asked him (a.s.) about Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Mighty and Majestic: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants. So, for them is one who is unjust to himself, and from them is a moderate one, and from them is one who precedes with the deeds of goodness" [35:32]. He (a.s.) said: "**The ones preceded with the good deeds is the Imam (a.s.)**."
arabicText: 6- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْكَرِيمِ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَ ثُمَّ أَوْرَثْنَا الْكِتَابَ الَّذِينَ اصْطَفَيْنَا مِنْ عِبَادِنَا فَمِنْهُمْ ظَالِمٌ لِنَفْسِهِ وَ مِنْهُمْ مُقْتَصِدٌ وَ مِنْهُمْ سابق بالخيراتِ قَالَ السَّابِقُ بِالْخَيْرَاتِ الْإِمَامُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 6. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from Abdul Kareem, from Suleyman Bin Khalid, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.), he (the narrator) said, 'I asked him (a.s.) about Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Mighty and Majestic: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants. So, for them is one who is unjust to himself, and from them is a moderate one, and from them is one who precedes with the deeds of goodness" [35:32].
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**The ones preceded with the good deeds is the Imam (a.s.)**."

chapter: Chapter 21: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Inheritors of the Book and They (a.s.) are the Ones Preceding with the Goodness
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 7. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Musa, from Al Khashab, from Ali Bin Hassan, from Abdul Rahman Bin Kaseer, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding His (a.z.w.j.) Words: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance" [35:32] the Verse. He (a.s.) said: "**It means by the one preceding with the good deeds, the Imam (a.s.)**."
arabicText: 7- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُوسَى عَنِ الْخَشَابِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ حَسَّانَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ كَثِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع فِي قَوْلِهِ ثُمَّ أَوْرَثْنَا الْكِتَابَ الْآيَةَ قَالَ إِيَّانَا عَلَى السَّابِقُ بِالْخَيْرَاتِ الْإِمَامُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 7. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Musa, from Al Khashab, from Ali Bin Hassan, from Abdul Rahman Bin Kaseer, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding His (a.z.w.j.) Words: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance" [35:32] the Verse.
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**It means by the one preceding with the good deeds, the Imam (a.s.)**."

chapter: Chapter 21: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Inheritors of the Book and They (a.s.) are the Ones Preceding with the Goodness
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 8. It is narrated to us by Ibn Yazeed, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ibn Uzina, from Bukeyr, and Fuzeyl, and Bureyd, and Zurara, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding this Verse: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants" [35:32]. He (a.s.) said: "**The preceding one is the Imam (a.s.)**."
arabicText: 8- حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ يَزِيدَ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنِ ابْنِ أَذِيْنَةَ عَنْ بُكَيْرٍ وَ فُضَيْلٍ وَ بُرَيْدٍ وَ زُرَارَهُ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فِي هَذِهِ الْآيَةِ ثُمَّ أَوْرَثْنَا الْكِتَابَ الَّذِينَ اصْطَفَيْنَا من عِبَادِنَا قَالَ السَّابِقُ الْإِمَامُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 8. It is narrated to us by Ibn Yazeed, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ibn Uzina, from Bukeyr, and Fuzeyl, and Bureyd, and Zurara, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding this Verse: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants" [35:32].
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**The preceding one is the Imam (a.s.)**."

chapter: Chapter 21: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Inheritors of the Book and They (a.s.) are the Ones Preceding with the Goodness
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 9. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Al Hussein, from Ibn Uzina, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Muyassar who said, 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance" [35:32] the Verse. He (a.s.) said: "**The one preceding with the good deeds is the Imam (a.s.)**."
arabicText: 9- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ ابْنِ أُذَيْنَةَ عَنِ ابْنِ بُكَيْرٍ عَنْ مُيَسْرٍ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَالَى ثُمَّ أَوْرَثْنَا الْكِتَابَ الْآيَةَ قَالَ السَّابِقُ بِالخَيْرَاتِ الْإِمَامُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 9. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Al Hussein, from Ibn Uzina, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Muyassar who said, 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted: "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance" [35:32] the Verse.
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**The one preceding with the good deeds is the Imam (a.s.)**."

chapter: Chapter 21: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Inheritors of the Book and They (a.s.) are the Ones Preceding with the Goodness
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 10. It is narrated to us by Salama, from Al Hussein Bin Musa Al Asamm, from Al Hussein Bin Umar who said, 'I said to him (a.s.): "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants..." to the end of the Verse [35:32]. He (a.s.) said: "**We are the ones preceding with the good deeds.**"
arabicText: 10- حَدَّثَنَا سَلَمَةُ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ مُوسَى الْأَصَمِّ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عُمَرَ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لَهُ ثُمَّ أَوْرَثْنَا الْكِتَابَ الَّذِينَ اصْطَفَيْنَا مِنْ عِبَادِنَا إِلَى قَوْلِهِ وَ مِنْهُمْ سَابِقٌ بِالْخَيْرَاتِ قَالَ نَحْنُ السَّابِقُونَ بِالْخَيْرَاتِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 10. It is narrated to us by Salama, from Al Hussein Bin Musa Al Asamm, from Al Hussein Bin Umar who said, 'I said to him (a.s.): "Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants..." to the end of the Verse [35:32].
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**We are the ones preceding with the good deeds.**"

chapter: Rare from Chapter 21
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. [From Rare 1] And surely in the Book of Allah (a.z.w.j.), there is what any matter can be wanted with it if Allah (a.z.w.j.) Permits it... Then He (a.z.w.j.) Said: 'Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants' [35:32]. **Thus, we are those Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Chosen, and we (a.s.) have inherited this wherein is explanation of all things.**
arabicText: نادر من الباب: 1- ... ثُمَّ قَالَ ثُمَّ أَوْرَثْنَا الْكِتَابَ الَّذِينَ اصْطَفَيْنَا مِنْ عِبَادِنَا فَنَحْنُ الَّذِينَ اصْطَفَانَا اللَّهُ فَوَرَّبَّنَا هَذَا الَّذِي فِيهِ يَبْيَانُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. [From Rare 1] And surely in the Book of Allah (a.z.w.j.), there is what any matter can be wanted with it if Allah (a.z.w.j.) Permits it... Then He (a.z.w.j.) Said: 'Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those We Chose from among Our servants' [35:32].
thaqalaynMatn: **Thus, we are those Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Chosen, and we (a.s.) have inherited this wherein is explanation of all things.**

chapter: Chapter 22: Regarding the Imams (a.s.) and What Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) My (s.a.w.a.) Understanding and My (s.a.w.a.) Knowledge'
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Abdul Hameed, from Mansour Bin Yunus, from Sa'ad Bin Tareyf, 'Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One whom it cheers that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and die my (s.a.w.a.) passing away, and enters the Paradise which my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Promised, Garden of Eden as my (s.a.w.a.) dwelling, a branch from its branches my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Planted by His (a.z.w.j.) Hands. Then He (a.z.w.j.) Said to it: "Be!" So, it came into being, so let him have the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) from after me (s.a.w.a.) and the successors (a.s.) from after me (s.a.w.a.). **Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Given them (a.s.) my (s.a.w.a.) understanding and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge.** And I (s.a.w.a.) swear by Allah (a.z.w.j.)! They will be killing my (s.a.w.a.) (grand) son (a.s.). May Allah (a.z.w.j.) not Let them attain my (s.a.w.a.) intercession."
arabicText: 1- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْحَمِيدِ عَنْ مَنْصُورِ بْنِ يُونُسَ عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ طَرِيفٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يَحْيَا حَيَاتِي وَ يَمُوتَ ثَمَانِي وَ يَدْخُلَ الْجَنَّةَ الَّتِي وَعَدَنِي رَبِّي جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ مَنْزِلِي قَضِيبٌ مِنْ قُضْبَائِهَا غَرَسَهُ رَبِّي بِيَدِهِ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهُ كُنْ فَكَانَ فَلْيَتَوَلَّ عَلِيّاً مِنْ بَعْدِي وَ الْأَوْصِيَاءَ مِنْ ذُرِّيَّتِي أَعْطَاهُمُ اللَّهُ فَهْمِي وَ عِلْمِي وَ لَمُ اللَّهِ لَيَقْتُلُنَّ ابْنِي لَا أَنَاهُمُ اللَّهُ شَفَاعَتِي.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Abdul Hameed, from Mansour Bin Yunus, from Sa'ad Bin Tareyf, 'Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One whom it cheers that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and die my (s.a.w.a.) passing away, and enters the Paradise which my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.)
