Promised, Garden of Eden as my (s.a.w.a.) dwelling, a branch from its branches my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Planted by His (a.z.w.j.) Hands. Then He (a.z.w.j.) Said to it: "Be!" So, it came into being, so let him have the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) from after me (s.a.w.a.) and the successors (a.s.) from after me (s.a.w.a.). **Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Given them (a.s.) my (s.a.w.a.) understanding and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge.** And I (s.a.w.a.) swear by Allah (a.z.w.j.)! They will be killing my (s.a.w.a.) (grand) son (a.s.). May Allah (a.z.w.j.) not Let them attain my (s.a.w.a.) intercession."

chapter: Chapter 22: Regarding the Imams (a.s.) and What Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) My (s.a.w.a.) Understanding and My (s.a.w.a.) Knowledge'
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 2. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Isa, from Abu Abdullah Al Momin, from Abu Abdullah Al Haza'a, from Sa'ad Bin Tareyf, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One who cheers him that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and dies my (s.a.w.a.) passing away and enters a Garden of my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.), Garden of Eden, a branch from its branches my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Planted it with His (a.z.w.j.) Hands, Saying to it: "Be!", and it came into being, then let him be in the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) and the successors (a.s.) from after him (a.s.), and let him submit to their (a.s.) merits. **They (a.s.) are the satisfactory guides. They (a.s.) would be Given my (s.a.w.a.) understanding and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge, and they (a.s.) are my (s.a.w.a.) family from my (s.a.w.a.) blood and my (s.a.w.a.) flesh.** I (s.a.w.a.) complain to Allah (a.z.w.j.) of their enemies from my (s.a.w.a.) community, the deniers of their (a.s.) merits, the cutters of my (s.a.w.a.) connection regarding them (a.s.). By Allah (a.z.w.j.), they will be killing my (s.a.w.a.) sons (a.s.) and Allah (a.z.w.j.) will not let them avail of my (s.a.w.a.) intercession."
arabicText: 2- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِيسَى عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْمُؤْمِنِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْحَذَاءِ عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ طَرِيفِ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يَحْيَا حَيَاتِي وَ يَمُوتَ مِيتَنِي وَ يَدْخُلَ جَنَّةَ رَبِّي جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ فَضِيبٌ مِنْ قُضَبَاهَا غَرَسَهُ رَبِّي بِيَدِهِ فَقَالَ لَهُ كُنْ فَكَانَ فَلْيَتَوَلَّ عَلِيّاً عِ وَ الْأَوْصِيَاءَ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ وَ لْيُسَلِّمْ لِفَضْلِهِمْ فَإِنَّهُمُ الْهُدَاةُ الْمَرْضِيُّونَ أَعْطَاهُمْ فَهُمِي وَ عِلْمِي وَ هُمْ عِتْرَنِي مِنْ دَمِي وَ لَحَمِي أَشْكُو إِلَى اللَّهِ عَدُوَّهُمْ مِنْ أُمَّتِي الْمُنْكِرِينَ لِفَضْلِهِمْ الْقَاطِعِينَ فِيهِمْ صِلَتِي و اللَّهِ لَيَقْتُلُنَّ ابْنِي وَ لَا أَنَاهُمُ اللَّهُ شَفَاعَتِي.
thaqalaynSanad: 2. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Isa, from Abu Abdullah Al Momin, from Abu Abdullah Al Haza'a, from Sa'ad Bin Tareyf, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One who cheers him that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and dies my (s.a.w.a.) passing away and enters a Garden of my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.), Garden of Eden, a branch from its branches my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Planted it with His (a.z.w.j.) Hands, Saying to it: "Be!", and it came into being, then let him be in the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) and the successors (a.s.) from after him (a.s.), and let him submit to their (a.s.) merits. **They (a.s.) are the satisfactory guides. They (a.s.) would be Given my (s.a.w.a.) understanding and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge, and they (a.s.) are my (s.a.w.a.) family from my (s.a.w.a.) blood and my (s.a.w.a.) flesh.** I (s.a.w.a.) complain to Allah (a.z.w.j.) of their enemies from my (s.a.w.a.) community, the deniers of their (a.s.) merits, the cutters of my (s.a.w.a.) connection regarding them (a.s.). By Allah (a.z.w.j.), they will be killing my (s.a.w.a.) sons (a.s.) and Allah (a.z.w.j.) will not let them avail of my (s.a.w.a.) intercession."

chapter: Chapter 22: Regarding the Imams (a.s.) and What Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) My (s.a.w.a.) Understanding and My (s.a.w.a.) Knowledge'
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 3. It is narrated to us by Yaqoub Bin Yazeed, from Yahya Bin Al Mubarak, from Abdullah Bin Jabala, from Ibrahim Bin Mihrab Al Asady, from his father, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'The People (a.s.) of my (s.a.w.a.) Household are the guides after me (s.a.w.a.). **Allah (a.z.w.j.) will Give them (a.s.) my (s.a.w.a.) understanding and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge, and they (a.s.) are Created from my (s.a.w.a.) essence (clay).** So, woe be to the deniers of their (a.s.) rights from after me (s.a.w.a.), the cutters of my (s.a.w.a.) connection regarding them (a.s.). Allah (a.z.w.j.) will not let them avail of my (s.a.w.a.) intercession."
arabicText: 3- حَدَّثَنَا يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ الْمُبَارَكِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ جَبَلَةَ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ مِهْنَمِ الْأَسَدِي عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ إِنَّ أَهْلَ بَيْتِي الْهُدَاةُ بَعْدِي أَعْطَاهُمُ اللَّهُ فَهْمِي وَ عِلْمِي وَ خُلِقُوا مِنْ طِينَنِي فَوَيْلٌ لِلْمُنْكِرِينَ حَقَّهُمْ مِنْ بَعْدِي الْقَاطِعِينَ فِيهِمْ صِلَتِي لَا أَنَاهُمُ اللَّهُ شَفَاعَتِي.
thaqalaynSanad: 3. It is narrated to us by Yaqoub Bin Yazeed, from Yahya Bin Al Mubarak, from Abdullah Bin Jabala, from Ibrahim Bin Mihrab Al Asady, from his father, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'The People (a.s.) of my (s.a.w.a.) Household are the guides after me (s.a.w.a.). **Allah (a.z.w.j.) will Give them (a.s.) my (s.a.w.a.) understanding and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge, and they (a.s.) are Created from my (s.a.w.a.) essence (clay).** So, woe be to the deniers of their (a.s.) rights from after me (s.a.w.a.), the cutters of my (s.a.w.a.) connection regarding them (a.s.). Allah (a.z.w.j.) will not let them avail of my (s.a.w.a.) intercession."

chapter: Chapter 22: Regarding the Imams (a.s.) and What Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) My (s.a.w.a.) Understanding and My (s.a.w.a.) Knowledge'
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 4. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Abdul Hameed, from Mansour Bin Yunus, from Sa'ad Bin Tareyf, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One who cheers him that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and dies my (s.a.w.a.) passing away, and enter the Paradise which my Lord (a.z.w.j.) Promised me (s.a.w.a.), Garden of Eden my (s.a.w.a.) house, a branch from its branches my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Planted by His (a.z.w.j.) Hands, then Said to it: "Be!", so it came into being, then let him be in the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) from after me (s.a.w.a.) and the successors (a.s.) from my (s.a.w.a.) offspring. **Allah (a.z.w.j.) would Give them my (s.a.w.a.) understanding and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge, and I (s.a.w.a.) swear by Allah (a.z.w.j.), the killers of my (s.a.w.a.) sons (a.s.), Allah (a.z.w.j.) will not let them avail of my (s.a.w.a.) intercession.**"
arabicText: 4- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْحَمِيدِ عَنْ مَنْصُورِ بْنِ يُونُسَ عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ طَرِيفٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يَحْيَا حَيَاتِي وَ يَمُوتَ ثَمَانِي وَ يَدْخُلَ الْجَنَّةَ الَّتِي وَعَدَنِي رَبِّي جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ مَنْزِلِي قَضِيبٌ مِنْ قُضَبَائِهَا غَرَسَهُ رَبِّي بِيَدِهِ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهُ كُنْ فَكَانَ فَلْيَتَوَلَّ عَلِيّاً مِنْ بَعْدِي وَ الْأَوْصِيَاءَ مِنْ دريتي أَعْطَاهُمُ اللَّهُ فَهْمِي وَ عِلْمِي وَ اللهِ لَيَقْتُلُنَّ ابْنِي لَا أَنَا لَهُمُ اللَّهُ شَفَاعَتِي.
thaqalaynSanad: 4. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Abdul Hameed, from Mansour Bin Yunus, from Sa'ad Bin Tareyf, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One who cheers him that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and dies my (s.a.w.a.) passing away, and enter the Paradise which my Lord (a.z.w.j.) Promised me (s.a.w.a.), Garden of Eden my (s.a.w.a.) house, a branch from its branches my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Planted by His (a.z.w.j.) Hands, then Said to it: "Be!", so it came into being, then let him be in the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) from after me (s.a.w.a.) and the successors (a.s.) from my (s.a.w.a.) offspring. **Allah (a.z.w.j.) would Give them my (s.a.w.a.) understanding and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge, and I (s.a.w.a.) swear by Allah (a.z.w.j.), the killers of my (s.a.w.a.) sons (a.s.), Allah (a.z.w.j.) will not let them avail of my (s.a.w.a.) intercession.**"'

chapter: Chapter 22: Regarding the Imams (a.s.) and What Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) My (s.a.w.a.) Understanding and My (s.a.w.a.) Knowledge'
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 5. It is narrated to us by Ibrahim Bin Hussein (Wait, PDF snippet 14 sanad: Ibrahim Bin Hashim, from Ibn Fazzal, from Muhammad Bin Salim, from Aban Bin Taghlub). Ibrahim Bin Hashim narrated to us, from Ibn Fazzal, from Muhammad Bin Salim, from Aban Bin Taghlub who said, 'I heard Abu Abdullah (a.s.) saying: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One who wants to live my (s.a.w.a.) life and die my (s.a.w.a.) passing away and enter a garden of my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.), Garden of Eden Planted by His (a.z.w.j.) Hands, then let him be in the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) and befriend his (a.s.) friends and be inimical to his (a.s.) enemies, and take as Imams (a.s.) with the successors (a.s.) from after him (a.s.). **They (a.s.) are my (s.a.w.a.) family, from my (s.a.w.a.) flesh and my (s.a.w.a.) blood. Allah (a.z.w.j.) would Give them (a.s.) my (s.a.w.a.) understanding and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge.** I (s.a.w.a.) complain to Allah (a.z.w.j.) of my (s.a.w.a.) community, the deniers of their (a.s.) merits, the cutters of my (s.a.w.a.) connection regarding them (a.s.), and I swear by Allah (a.z.w.j.), they will be killing my (s.a.w.a.) son (a.s.). May Allah (a.z.w.j.) not avail them my (s.a.w.a.) intercession."
arabicText: 5- حَدَّثَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ هَاشِمٍ عَنِ ابْنِ فَضَالٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سَالِمٍ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ تَغْلِبَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللهِ ع يَقُولُ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ أَرَادَ أَنْ يحيا حياتي وَ يَمُوتَ ثَمَانِي وَ يَدْخُلَ جَنَّةَ رَبِّي جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ غَرَسَهَا بِيَدِهِ فَلْيَتَوَلَّ عَلِيّاً وَ لْيَتَوَلَّ وَلِيَّهُ وَلْيُعَادِ عَدُوَّهُ وَ لْيَأْتَمَّ بِالْأَوْصِيَاءِ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ فَإِنَّهُمْ عِتْرَتِي مِنْ لَحْمِي وَ دَمِي أَعْطَاهُمُ اللَّهُ فَهُمِي وَ عِلْمِي إِلى اللهِ أَشْكُو مِنْ أُمَّتِي الْمُنْكِرِينَ لِفَضَائِلِهِمُ الْقَاطِعِينَ فِيهِمْ صِلَتِي وَ لَكُمُ اللَّهِ لَيَقْتُلُنَّ ابْنِي لَا أَنَا هُمُ اللَّهُ شَفَاعَتِي.
thaqalaynSanad: 5. Ibrahim Bin Hashim narrated to us, from Ibn Fazzal, from Muhammad Bin Salim, from Aban Bin Taghlub who said, 'I heard Abu Abdullah (a.s.) saying:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One who wants to live my (s.a.w.a.) life and die my (s.a.w.a.) passing away and enter a garden of my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.), Garden of Eden Planted by His (a.z.w.j.) Hands, then let him be in the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) and befriend his (a.s.) friends and be inimical to his (a.s.) enemies, and take as Imams (a.s.) with the successors (a.s.) from after him (a.s.). **They (a.s.) are my (s.a.w.a.) family, from my (s.a.w.a.) flesh and my (s.a.w.a.) blood. Allah (a.z.w.j.) would Give them (a.s.) my (s.a.w.a.) understanding and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge.** I (s.a.w.a.) complain to Allah (a.z.w.j.) of my (s.a.w.a.) community, the deniers of their (a.s.) merits, the cutters of my (s.a.w.a.) connection regarding them (a.s.), and I swear by Allah (a.z.w.j.), they will be killing my (s.a.w.a.) son (a.s.). May Allah (a.z.w.j.) not avail them my (s.a.w.a.) intercession."

chapter: Chapter 22: Regarding the Imams (a.s.) and What Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) My (s.a.w.a.) Understanding and My (s.a.w.a.) Knowledge'
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 6. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Musa Bin Sa'dan, from Abdullah Bin Al Qasim, from Abdul Qahir, from Jabir Al Jufy, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One whom it cheers that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and dies my (s.a.w.a.) passing away and enters a garden of Eden, a branch my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Planted, then let him be in the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) and his (a.s.) successors (a.s.) from after me (s.a.w.a.). **They (a.s.) will not enter you in a door of straying nor exit you from a door of guidance, and do not (try to) teach them (a.s.) for they (a.s.) are more knowledgeable than you are**, and I (s.a.w.a.) did ask my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) there to be no separation between them (a.s.) and the Book until they return to me (s.a.w.a.) at the Fountain to be with me (s.a.w.a.) like this' - and he (s.a.w.a.) pressed between his (s.a.w.a.) fingers - 'Its width is what it between Sana'a (Yemen) up to Ab (Eilat). In it are cups of silver and gold the number of the stars."
arabicText: 6- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ مُوسَى بْنِ سَعْدَانَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الْقَاسِمِ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْقَاهِرِ عَنْ جَابِرٍ الْجُعْفِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يَحْيَا حَيَاتِي وَ يَمُوتَ مِيتَنِي وَ يَدْخُلَ جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ قَضِيبٌ غَرَسَهُ رَبِّي فَلْيَتَوَلَّ عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طَالِبٍ وَ أَوْصِيَاءَهُ مِنْ بَعْدِي فَإِنَّهُمْ لَا يُدْخِلُونَكُمْ فِي بَابِ ضَلَالٍ وَ لَا يُخْرِجُونَكُمْ مِنْ بَابِ هُدًى وَ لَا تُعَلِّمُوهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ أَعْلَمُ مِنْكُمْ وَ إِنِّي سَأَلْتُ رَبِّي أَنْ لَا يُفَرِّقَ بَيْنَهُمْ وَ بَيْنَ الْكِتَابِ حَتَّى يَرِدَا عَلَيَّ الْحَوْضَ مَعِي هَكَذَا وَ ضَمَّ بَيْنَ إِصْبَعَيْهِ وَ عَرْضُهُ مَا بَيْنَ صَنْعَاءَ إِلَى أَبِ فِيهِ قِدْحَانُ فِضَّةٍ وَ ذَهَبٍ عَدَدَ النُّجُومِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 6. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Musa Bin Sa'dan, from Abdullah Bin Al Qasim, from Abdul Qahir, from Jabir Al Jufy, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One whom it cheers that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and dies my (s.a.w.a.) passing away and enters a garden of Eden, a branch my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Planted, then let him be in the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) and his (a.s.) successors (a.s.) from after me (s.a.w.a.). **They (a.s.) will not enter you in a door of straying nor exit you from a door of guidance, and do not (try to) teach them (a.s.) for they (a.s.) are more knowledgeable than you are**, and I (s.a.w.a.) did ask my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) there to be no separation between them (a.s.) and the Book until they return to me (s.a.w.a.) at the Fountain to be with me (s.a.w.a.) like this' - and he (s.a.w.a.) pressed between his (s.a.w.a.) fingers - 'Its width is what it between Sana'a (Yemen) up to Ab (Eilat). In it are cups of silver and gold the number of the stars."

chapter: Chapter 22: Regarding the Imams (a.s.) and What Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) My (s.a.w.a.) Understanding and My (s.a.w.a.) Knowledge'
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 7. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hassan, from Yazeed Bin Sha'r, from Haroun Bin Hamza, from Abu Abdul Rahman, from Sa'ad Al Iskaf, from Muhammad Bin Ali Bin Umar, son of Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) having said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One whom it cheers that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and dies my (s.a.w.a.) passing away and enters the Paradise of my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) which He (a.z.w.j.) Promised me (s.a.w.a.), Garden of Eden as my (s.a.w.a.) dwelling, a branch from its branches my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted Planted by His (a.z.w.j.) Hand. He (a.z.w.j.) Said to it: "Be!" And it came into being, so let him have the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) and the successors (a.s.) from after him (a.s.). **They (a.s.) are the Imams (a.s.) from after me (s.a.w.a.), they (a.s.) are my (s.a.w.a.) family from my (s.a.w.a.) flesh and my (s.a.w.a.) blood. Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Graced them (a.s.) my (s.a.w.a.) merits, and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge**, and woe be unto the deniers from my (s.a.w.a.) community of their (a.s.) merits, the cutters of my (s.a.w.a.) connection. By Allah (a.z.w.j.)! They will be killing my (s.a.w.a.) (grand) son (a.s.). May Allah (a.z.w.j.) not Let them attain my (s.a.w.a.) intercession."
arabicText: 7- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ شَعِرٍ عَنْ هَارُونَ بْنِ حَمْزَةَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ سَعْدِ الْإِسْكَافِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ عُمَرَ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طالِبٍ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يَحْيَا حَيَاتِي وَ يَمُوتَ مِيتَنِي وَ يَدْخُلَ جَنَّةَ رَبِّيَ الَّتِي وَعَدَنِي جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ مَنْزِلِي قَضِيبٌ مِنْ قُضْبَائِهِ غَرَسَهُ رَبِّي تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَالَى بِيَدِهِ فَقَالَ لَهُ كُنْ فَكَانَ فَلْيَتَوَلَّ عَلِيَّ بن أبي طَالِبٍ ع وَ الْأَوْصِيَاء مِنْ ذُرِّيَّتِهِ إِنَّهُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ مِنْ بَعْدِي هُمْ عِتْرَنِي مِنْ حَمِي وَ دَمِي رَزَقَهُمُ اللَّهُ فَضْلِي وَ عِلْمِي وَوَيْلٌ لِلْمُنْكِرِينَ فَضْلَهُمْ مِنْ أُمَّتِي الْقَاطِعِينَ صِلَتِي وَ اللهِ لَيَقْتُلُنَّ ابْنِي لَا أَنَاهُمُ اللَّهُ شَفَاعَتِي.
thaqalaynSanad: 7. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hassan, from Yazeed Bin Sha'r, from Haroun Bin Hamza, from Abu Abdul Rahman, from Sa'ad Al Iskaf, from Muhammad Bin Ali Bin Umar, son of Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One whom it cheers that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and dies my (s.a.w.a.) passing away and enters the Paradise of my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) which He (a.z.w.j.) Promised me (s.a.w.a.), Garden of Eden as my (s.a.w.a.) dwelling, a branch from its branches my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted Planted by His (a.z.w.j.) Hand. He (a.z.w.j.) Said to it: "Be!" And it came into being, so let him have the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) and the successors (a.s.) from after him (a.s.). **They (a.s.) are the Imams (a.s.) from after me (s.a.w.a.), they (a.s.) are my (s.a.w.a.) family from my (s.a.w.a.) flesh and my (s.a.w.a.) blood. Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Graced them (a.s.) my (s.a.w.a.) merits, and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge**, and woe be unto the deniers from my (s.a.w.a.) community of their (a.s.) merits, the cutters of my (s.a.w.a.) connection. By Allah (a.z.w.j.)! They will be killing my (s.a.w.a.) (grand) son (a.s.). May Allah (a.z.w.j.) not Let them attain my (s.a.w.a.) intercession."

chapter: Chapter 22: Regarding the Imams (a.s.) and What Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) My (s.a.w.a.) Understanding and My (s.a.w.a.) Knowledge'
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 8. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein and Abdullah Bin Muhammad both together, from Ibn Mahboub, from Al A'ala, from Muhammad, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'But by Allah (a.z.w.j.)! Surely among the People (a.s.) of my (s.a.w.a.) Household from my (s.a.w.a.) family are Guided guides from after me (s.a.w.a.). **They (a.s.) will be Given my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge and my (s.a.w.a.) understand, and my (s.a.w.a.) forbearance, and my (s.a.w.a.) manners, and their (a.s.) clay (essence) is from my (s.a.w.a.) clay, the clean.** Woe be unto the deniers of their (a.s.) rights, the beliers of them (a.s.) from after me (s.a.w.a.), the cutters of my (s.a.w.a.) connection regarding them (a.s.), the ones ruling upon them, and seizing their (a.s.) rights from them (a.s.). Indeed! Allah (a.z.w.j.) will not avail them of my (s.a.w.a.) intercession."
arabicText: 8- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ وَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ جَمِيعاً عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبِ عَنِ العلا العلاء عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص أَمَا وَ اللَّهِ إِنَّ فِي أَهْلِ بَيْتِي مِنْ عِتْرَتِي هُدَاةً مُهْتَدِينَ مِنْ بَعْدِِي يُعْطِيهِمْ عِلْمِي وَ فَهْمِي وَ حِلْمِي وَ خُلُقِي وَ طِينَتُهُمْ مِنْ طِينَتِي الطَّاهِرَةِ فَوَيْلٌ لِلْمُتَّكِرِينَ لِحِقَّهِمُ الْمُكَذِّبِينَ لَهُمْ مِنْ بَعْدِي الْقَاطِعِينَ فِيهِمْ صِلَتِي الْمُسْتَوْلِينَ عَلَيْهِمْ وَ الْآخِذِينَ مِنْهُمْ حَقَّهُمْ أَلَا فَلَا أَنَاهُمُ اللَّهُ شَفَاعَتِي.
thaqalaynSanad: 8. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein and Abdullah Bin Muhammad both together, from Ibn Mahboub, from Al A'ala, from Muhammad, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'But by Allah (a.z.w.j.)! Surely among the People (a.s.) of my (s.a.w.a.) Household from my (s.a.w.a.) family are Guided guides from after me (s.a.w.a.). **They (a.s.) will be Given my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge and my (s.a.w.a.) understand, and my (s.a.w.a.) forbearance, and my (s.a.w.a.) manners, and their (a.s.) clay (essence) is from my (s.a.w.a.) clay, the clean.** Woe be unto the deniers of their (a.s.) rights, the beliers of them (a.s.) from after me (s.a.w.a.), the cutters of my (s.a.w.a.) connection regarding them (a.s.), the ones ruling upon them, and seizing their (a.s.) rights from them (a.s.). Indeed! Allah (a.z.w.j.) will not avail them of my (s.a.w.a.) intercession."

chapter: Chapter 22: Regarding the Imams (a.s.) and What Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) My (s.a.w.a.) Understanding and My (s.a.w.a.) Knowledge'
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 9. It is narrated to us by Al Sindy, from Safwan, from Abdullah Bin Sa'ad Al Iskaf, from Hareez, from Muhammad Bin Umar, from Al Hassan who said, 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One who cheers him that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and dies my (s.a.w.a.) passing away and enters the Paradise which my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) has Promised me (s.a.w.a.), a branch from its branches He (a.z.w.j.) Planted with His (a.z.w.j.) Hands, then Said to it: "Be!" So it came into being, then let him be in the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) from after me (s.a.w.a.), and the successors from my (s.a.w.a.) offspring, **for they (a.s.) will not exit you from guidance nor assist you in destruction, and do not (try to) teach them (a.s.), for they (a.s.) are more knowledgeable than you are**."
arabicText: 9- حَدَّثَنَا السَّنْدِيُّ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سَعْدِ الْإِسْكَافِ عَنْ حَرِيزٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عُمَرَ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يَحْيَا حَيَاتِي وَ يَمُوتَ مِيتَنِي وَ يَدْخُلِ الْجَنَّةَ الَّتِي وَعَدَنِي رَبِّي قَضِيبٌ مِنْ قُضَبَاتِهَا عَرَسَهُ بِيَدِهِ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهُ كُنْ فَكَانَ فَلْيَتَوَلَّ عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طَالِبٍ مِنْ بَعْدِي وَ الْأَوْصِيَاءَ مِنْ ذُرِّيَّتِي فَإِنَّهُمْ لَا يُخْرِجُونَكُمْ مِنْ هُدًى وَ لا يُعِيدُونَكُمْ فِي رَدَى وَ لا تُعَلَّمُوهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ أَعْلَمُ مِنْكُمْ.
thaqalaynSanad: 9. It is narrated to us by Al Sindy, from Safwan, from Abdullah Bin Sa'ad Al Iskaf, from Hareez, from Muhammad Bin Umar, from Al Hassan who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One who cheers him that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and dies my (s.a.w.a.) passing away and enters the Paradise which my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) has Promised me (s.a.w.a.), a branch from its branches He (a.z.w.j.) Planted with His (a.z.w.j.) Hands, then Said to it: "Be!" So it came into being, then let him be in the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) from after me (s.a.w.a.), and the successors from my (s.a.w.a.) offspring, **for they (a.s.) will not exit you from guidance nor assist you in destruction, and do not (try to) teach them (a.s.), for they (a.s.) are more knowledgeable than you are**."

chapter: Chapter 22: Regarding the Imams (a.s.) and What Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) My (s.a.w.a.) Understanding and My (s.a.w.a.) Knowledge'
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 10. It is narrated to us by Abdullah bin Aamir, from Al Hajjal, from Dawood Bin Abu Yazeed, 'From one of the two (5th or 6th Imam (a.s.)) having said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One whom it cheers that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and dies my (s.a.w.a.) passing away and enters a Garden of my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Garden of Eden He (a.z.w.j.) Planted by His (a.z.w.j.) Hands, then let him be in the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) and the successors (a.s.) from after him (a.s.). **For they (a.s.) are my (s.a.w.a.) flesh and my (s.a.w.a.) blood. Allah (a.z.w.j.) will Give them my (s.a.w.a.) understanding and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge.**"
arabicText: 10- حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عَامِرٍ عَنِ الْحَجَّالِ عَنْ دَاوُدَ بْنِ أَبِي يَزِيدَ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ص مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يَحْيَا حَيَاتِي وَ يَمُوتَ مِينَتِي وَ يَدْخُلَ جَنَّةَ رَبِّي جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ غَرَسَهَا بِيَدِهِ فَلْيَتَوَلَّ عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ع وَ الْأَوْصِيَاءَ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ فَإِنَّهُمْ لَحْمِي وَ دَمِي أَعْطَاهُمُ اللَّهُ فَهُمِي وَ عِلْمِي.
thaqalaynSanad: 10. It is narrated to us by Abdullah bin Aamir, from Al Hajjal, from Dawood Bin Abu Yazeed, 'From one of the two (5th or 6th Imam (a.s.)) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One whom it cheers that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and dies my (s.a.w.a.) passing away and enters a Garden of my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Garden of Eden He (a.z.w.j.) Planted by His (a.z.w.j.) Hands, then let him be in the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) and the successors (a.s.) from after him (a.s.). **For they (a.s.) are my (s.a.w.a.) flesh and my (s.a.w.a.) blood. Allah (a.z.w.j.) will Give them my (s.a.w.a.) understanding and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge.**"'

chapter: Chapter 22: Regarding the Imams (a.s.) and What Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) My (s.a.w.a.) Understanding and My (s.a.w.a.) Knowledge'
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 11. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Abu Al a'ala Al Khaffaf, from Al Asbagh Bin Nubata, 'From Amir Al-Momineen Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) having said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One who loved to live my (s.a.w.a.) life and die my (s.a.w.a.) passing away, and enters the Garden of Eden which my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Promised me (s.a.w.a.), a branch from its branch He (a.z.w.j.) Planted with His (a.z.w.j.) Hand, then Said to it: "Be!" So, it came into being, then let him have the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) and the successors (a.s.) from after him (a.s.). **For they (a.s.) will not throw you out from the guidance and will not enter you into any straying.**"
arabicText: 11- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي الْعَلَاءِ الْخَفَّافِ عَنِ الْأَصْبَعِ بْنِ نُبَاتَةَ عَنْ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ أَحَبَّ أَنْ يَحْيَا حَيَاتِي وَ يَمُوتَ ثَمَانِي وَ يَدْخُلَ جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ الَّتِي وَعَدَنِي رَبِّي قَضِيبٌ مِنْ قُضْبَانِهِ غَرَسَهُ بِيَدِهِ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهُ كُنْ فَكَانَ فَلْيَتَوَلَّ عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ع وَ الْأَوْصِيَاءَ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ فَإِنَّهُمْ لَا يُخْرِجُونَكُمْ مِنَ الْهُدَى وَ لَا يُدْخِلُونَكُمْ فِي ضَلَالَةٍ.
thaqalaynSanad: 11. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Abu Al a'ala Al Khaffaf, from Al Asbagh Bin Nubata, 'From Amir Al-Momineen Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One who loved to live my (s.a.w.a.) life and die my (s.a.w.a.) passing away, and enters the Garden of Eden which my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Promised me (s.a.w.a.), a branch from its branch He (a.z.w.j.) Planted with His (a.z.w.j.) Hand, then Said to it: "Be!" So, it came into being, then let him have the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) and the successors (a.s.) from after him (a.s.). **For they (a.s.) will not throw you out from the guidance and will not enter you into any straying.**"'

chapter: Chapter 22: Regarding the Imams (a.s.) and What Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) My (s.a.w.a.) Understanding and My (s.a.w.a.) Knowledge'
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 12. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Ibrahim Bin Muhammad Al Saqafi, from Ibrahim Bin Muhammad Bin Maymoun - similar to it.
arabicText: 12 حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ التَّقْفِي عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مَيْمُونٍ مِثْلَهُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 12. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Ibrahim Bin Muhammad Al Saqafi, from Ibrahim Bin Muhammad Bin Maymoun
thaqalaynMatn: similar to it.

chapter: Chapter 22: Regarding the Imams (a.s.) and What Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) My (s.a.w.a.) Understanding and My (s.a.w.a.) Knowledge'
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 13. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin ya'la Al Askam, from Ammar Bin Razeyn, from Abu Is'haq, from Ziyad bin Mutarif who said, 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One who wants to live my (s.a.w.a.) life and die my (s.a.w.a.) passing away and enter the Paradise which my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Promised me (s.a.w.a.), and it is a branch from its branches He (a.z.w.j.) Planted it with His (a.z.w.j.) Hand, and it is the Garden of eternity, then let him have the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) and his (a.s.) offspring from after him (a.s.). **For they (a.s.) will never exit him from a door of guidance and will never enter him into a door of straying.**"
arabicText: 13 - حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْلَى الْأَسْلَمُ عَنْ عَمَّارِ بْنِ رَزِينٍ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ عَنْ زِيَادِ بْنِ مُطَرِّفٍ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ أَرَادَ أَنْ يَحْيَا حَيَاتِي وَ يَمُوتَ مَمَاتِي وَ يَدْخُلَ الْجَنَّةَ الَّتِي وَعَدَنِي رَبِّي وَ هُوَ قَضِيبٌ مِنْ قُضْبَانِهِ غَرَسَهُ بِيَدِهِ وَ هِيَ جَنَّةُ الْخُلْدِ فَلْيَتَوَلَّ عَلِيّاً وَ ذُرِّيَّتَهُ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ فَإِنَّهُمْ لَنْ يُخْرِجُوهُ مِنْ بَابِ هُدًى وَ لَنْ يُدْخِلُوهُ فِي بَابِ ضَلَالٍ.
thaqalaynSanad: 13. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin ya'la Al Askam, from Ammar Bin Razeyn, from Abu Is'haq, from Ziyad bin Mutarif who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One who wants to live my (s.a.w.a.) life and die my (s.a.w.a.) passing away and enter the Paradise which my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Promised me (s.a.w.a.), and it is a branch from its branches He (a.z.w.j.) Planted it with His (a.z.w.j.) Hand, and it is the Garden of eternity, then let him have the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) and his (a.s.) offspring from after him (a.s.). **For they (a.s.) will never exit him from a door of guidance and will never enter him into a door of straying.**"'

chapter: Chapter 22: Regarding the Imams (a.s.) and What Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) My (s.a.w.a.) Understanding and My (s.a.w.a.) Knowledge'
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 14. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Aamir, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad Al Hajjal, from Dawood Bin Abu Yazeed, 'From one of the two (5th or 6th Imam (a.s.)) having said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One whom it cheers that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and dies my (s.a.w.a.) passing away, and enters a Garden of my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.), Garden of Eden He (a.z.w.j.) Planted by His (a.z.w.j.) Hand, then let him have the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) and the successors (a.s.) from after him (a.s.). **For they (a.s.) are my (s.a.w.a.) flesh and my (s.a.w.a.) blood. Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Given them (a.s.) my (s.a.w.a.) understanding and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge.**"
arabicText: 14- حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عَامِرٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْحَجَّالِ عَنْ دَاوُدَ بْنِ أَبِي يَزِيدَ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يَحْيَا حَيَاتِي وَ يمُوتَ مِيتَنِي وَ يَدْخُلَ جَنَّةَ رَبِّي جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ غَرَسَهَا بِيَدِهِ فَلْيَتَوَلَّ عَلِيَّ بن أبي طالِبٍ ع وَ الْأَوْصِيَاءَ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ فَإِنَّهُمْ حَمِي وَ دَمِي أَعْطَاهُمُ اللَّهُ فَهْمِي وَ علمي.
thaqalaynSanad: 14. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Aamir, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad Al Hajjal, from Dawood Bin Abu Yazeed, 'From one of the two (5th or 6th Imam (a.s.)) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One whom it cheers that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and dies my (s.a.w.a.) passing away, and enters a Garden of my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.), Garden of Eden He (a.z.w.j.) Planted by His (a.z.w.j.) Hand, then let him have the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) and the successors (a.s.) from after him (a.s.). **For they (a.s.) are my (s.a.w.a.) flesh and my (s.a.w.a.) blood. Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Given them (a.s.) my (s.a.w.a.) understanding and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge.**"'

chapter: Chapter 22: Regarding the Imams (a.s.) and What Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) My (s.a.w.a.) Understanding and My (s.a.w.a.) Knowledge'
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 15. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from al Hussein Bin Yasaar, 'From Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza (a.s.) having said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One who loves that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and dies my (s.a.w.a.) passing away and enters the Garden of Eden which my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Promised me (s.a.w.a.), a branch from its branches He (a.z.w.j.) Planted with His (a.z.w.j.) Hand, then Said to it: "Be!", so it came into being, then let him have the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) and the successors (a.s.) from after him (a.s.). **For they (a.s.) will neither exit you from guidance not enter you into a straying.**"
arabicText: 15 - حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ابْنِ الرِّضَاعَ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ أَحَبَّ أَنْ يَحْيَا حَيَاتِي و يموت ثماني وَ يَدْخُلَ جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ الَّتِي وَعَدَنِي رَبِّي قَضِيبٌ مِنْ قُضْبَانِهِ غَرَسَهُ بِيَدِهِ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهُ كُنْ فَكَانَ فَلْيَتَوَلَّ عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ع وَ الْأَوْصِيَاءَ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ فَإِنَّهُمْ لَا يُخْرِجُونَكُمْ مِنْ هُدًى وَ لَا يُدْخِلُونَكُمْ فِي ضَلَالَةٍ.
thaqalaynSanad: 15. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from al Hussein Bin Yasaar, 'From Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'One who loves that he lives my (s.a.w.a.) life and dies my (s.a.w.a.) passing away and enters the Garden of Eden which my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Promised me (s.a.w.a.), a branch from its branches He (a.z.w.j.) Planted with His (a.z.w.j.) Hand, then Said to it: "Be!", so it came into being, then let him have the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) and the successors (a.s.) from after him (a.s.). **For they (a.s.) will neither exit you from guidance not enter you into a straying.**"'

chapter: Chapter 22: Regarding the Imams (a.s.) and What Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) Said Regarding Them (a.s.), 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Given Them (a.s.) My (s.a.w.a.) Understanding and My (s.a.w.a.) Knowledge'
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 16. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Ibrahim Bin Muhammad, from Abdul Rahman Bin Abi Hashim, from Amro Bin Shimr, from Jabir, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) who said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: '...and the successors (a.s.) from after him (a.s.). **Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Given them (a.s.) my (s.a.w.a.) understanding and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge, and they (a.s.) are my (s.a.w.a.) family.**'"
arabicText: 16 حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي هَاشِمٍ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ شُمْرٍ عَنْ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص ... وَ الْأَوْصِيَاءَ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ أَعْطَاهُمُ اللَّهُ فَهْمِي وَ عِلْمِي وَ هُمْ عِتْرَتِي.
thaqalaynSanad: 16. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Ibrahim Bin Muhammad, from Abdul Rahman Bin Abi Hashim, from Amro Bin Shimr, from Jabir, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: '...and the successors (a.s.) from after him (a.s.). **Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Given them (a.s.) my (s.a.w.a.) understanding and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge, and they (a.s.) are my (s.a.w.a.) family.**'"

chapter: Chapter 23: Order of the Prophet (s.a.w.a.) with the Eman with Ali (a.s.) and the Imams (a.s.) from after him (a.s.), and what they (a.s.) have been given from the Knowledge, and the submission to them (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. [From Hadith 1] ...And from Al-Hussein (a.s.) would be the Imams (a.s.) of guidance. **Allah (a.z.w.j.) would Give them (a.s.) my (s.a.w.a.) understanding, and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge, so love them (a.s.), and befriend them (a.s.)**, and do not be taking any confidant from besides them (a.s.)...
arabicText: 1- ... و مِنَ الْحُسَيْنِ أَئِمَّةُ الْهُدَى أَعْطَاهُمُ اللَّهُ فَهُمِي وَ عِلْمِي فَأَحِبُوهُمْ وَ تَوَلَّوْهُمْ وَ لَا تَتَّخِذُوا وَلِيحَةً مِنْ دُونِهِمْ...
thaqalaynSanad: 1. [From Hadith 1] ...And from Al-Hussein (a.s.) would be the Imams (a.s.) of guidance.
thaqalaynMatn: **Allah (a.z.w.j.) would Give them (a.s.) my (s.a.w.a.) understanding, and my (s.a.w.a.) knowledge, so love them (a.s.), and befriend them (a.s.)**, and do not be taking any confidant from besides them (a.s.).

chapter: Chapter 23: Order of the Prophet (s.a.w.a.) with the Eman with Ali (a.s.) and the Imams (a.s.) from after him (a.s.), and what they (a.s.) have been given from the Knowledge, and the submission to them (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 3. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Al Nazr Bin Shuayb, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Abu Hamza Al Sumali who said, 'I heard Abu Ja'far (a.s.) saying: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted Said: "...**And they (a.s.) are the Imams (a.s.) of guidance from after you (s.a.w.a.). Your (s.a.w.a.) soul flows in them (a.s.) and their (a.s.) souls flow in you (s.a.w.a.) from your (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.), and they (a.s.) are your (s.a.w.a.) family from your (s.a.w.a.) clay, and your (s.a.w.a.) flesh and your (s.a.w.a.) blood.** Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Flowed your (s.a.w.a.) Sunnah and Sunnah of the Prophets (a.s.) from before you (s.a.w.a.) in them (a.s.), and they (a.s.) are treasurers upon My (a.z.w.j.) Knowledge from after you (s.a.w.a.)."'
arabicText: 3- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنِ النَّضْرِ بْنِ شُعَيْبٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفُضَيْلِ عَنْ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ الثَّمَالِي قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع يَقُولُ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَالَى يَقُولُ ... وَ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ الهُدَاهُ مِنْ بَعْدِكَ جَرَى فِيهِمْ رُوحُكَ وَ رُوحُهُمْ جَرَى فِيكَ مِنْ رَبِّكَ وَ هُمْ عِتْرَتُكَ مِنْ طِينَتِكَ وَ لَحْمُكَ وَ دَمُكَ قدْ أَجْرَى اللَّهُ فِيهِمْ سُنَّتَكَ وَ سُنَّةَ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ قَبْلَكَ وَ هُمْ خَزَانِي عَلَى عِلْمِي مِنْ بَعْدِكَ...
thaqalaynSanad: 3. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Al Nazr Bin Shuayb, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Abu Hamza Al Sumali who said, 'I heard Abu Ja'far (a.s.) saying:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted Said: "...**And they (a.s.) are the Imams (a.s.) of guidance from after you (s.a.w.a.). Your (s.a.w.a.) soul flows in them (a.s.) and their (a.s.) souls flow in you (s.a.w.a.) from your (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.), and they (a.s.) are your (s.a.w.a.) family from your (s.a.w.a.) clay, and your (s.a.w.a.) flesh and your (s.a.w.a.) blood.** Allah (a.z.w.j.) has Flowed your (s.a.w.a.) Sunnah and Sunnah of the Prophets (a.s.) from before you (s.a.w.a.) in them (a.s.), and they (a.s.) are treasurers upon My (a.z.w.j.) Knowledge from after you (s.a.w.a.)."'

chapter: Chapter 24: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted Said They (a.s.) Know, and Their Enemies are Those Not Knowing, and Their Shias are Ones of Understanding
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. It is narrated to me by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Ahwazy, from Al Nazar, from Al Qasim Bin Suleyman, from Jabir, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Mighty and Majestic: "Say: 'Are they equal, those who know and those do not know?' But rather, the ones of the understanding will heed" [39:9]. He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are those who know and our enemies are those not knowing, and our Shias are the ones of understanding.**"
arabicText: 1- حَدَّثني أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْأَهْوَازِي عَنِ النَّضْرِ عَنِ الْقَاسِمِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَ قُلْ هَلْ يَسْتَوِي الَّذِينَ يَعْلَمُونَ وَالَّذِينَ لا يَعْلَمُونَ إِنَّمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ أُولُوا الْأَلْبَابِ فَقَالَ نَحْنُ الَّذِينَ تَعْلَمُ وَعَدُونَا الَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ وَ شِيعَتُنَا أُولُو الْأَلْبَابِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. It is narrated to me by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Ahwazy, from Al Nazar, from Al Qasim Bin Suleyman, from Jabir, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Mighty and Majestic: "Say: 'Are they equal, those who know and those do not know?' But rather, the ones of the understanding will heed" [39:9].
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are those who know and our enemies are those not knowing, and our Shias are the ones of understanding.**"

chapter: Chapter 24: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), They (a.s.) are Those Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted Said They (a.s.) Know, and Their Enemies are Those Not Knowing, and Their Shias are Ones of Understanding
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 7. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Al Qasim Bin Muhammad, from Ali, from Abu Baseer who said, 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted: "Are they equal, those who know and those who do not know?" [39:9] - the Verse. He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are those who know, and our enemies are those who do not know, and our Shias are the ones of understanding.**"
arabicText: 7- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنِ الْقَاسِمِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَلِيَّ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى هَلْ يَسْتَوِي الَّذِينَ يَعْلَمُونَ وَ الَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ قَالَ نَحْنُ الَّذِينَ نَعْلَمُ وَ عَدُونَا الَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ وَ شِيعَتُنَا أُولُو الْأَلْبَابِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 7. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hussein Bin Saeed, from Al Qasim Bin Muhammad, from Ali, from Abu Baseer who said, 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted: "Are they equal, those who know and those who do not know?" [39:9] - the Verse.
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are those who know, and our enemies are those who do not know, and our Shias are the ones of understanding.**"

chapter: Chapter 1: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), they are the Mines of Knowledge, and the Tree of Prophet-hood, and the Keys of Wisdom, and the Place of Message, and the Interchange of Angels
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. He said, 'It is narrated to us by Ibn Hashim, from Ibn Al Mugheira, from Abdul Momin Al Ansari, from Humeyd Bin Musa, from the people of Al Basra, from Al Zahak Bin Muzahim Al Khurasani who said, 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: '**We are the People of the Household, and the People of the Household of Mercy, and the tree of Prophet-hood, and the place of the Message, and the interchange of the Angels, and the mine of the Knowledge.**' [cite: 778, 780]
arabicText: 1- قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ هَاشِمٍ عَنِ ابْنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْمُؤْمِنِ الْأَنْصَارِي عَنْ حُمَيْدِ بْنِ مُعَادٍ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْبَصْرَةِ عَنِ الصَّحَاكِ بْنِ مُزَاحِمِ الْحَرَاسَانِي قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَ إِنَّا أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ أَهْلُ بَيْتِ الرَّحْمَةِ وَ شَجَرَةُ النُّبُوَّةِ وَ مَوْضِعُ الرِّسَالَةِ وَ مُخْتَلَفُ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ مَعْدِنُ الْعِلْمِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. He said, 'It is narrated to us by Ibn Hashim, from Ibn Al Mugheira, from Abdul Momin Al Ansari, from Humeyd Bin Musa, from the people of Al Basra, from Al Zahak Bin Muzahim Al Khurasani who said:
thaqalaynMatn: Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: '**We are the People of the Household, and the People of the Household of Mercy, and the tree of Prophet-hood, and the place of the Message, and the interchange of the Angels, and the mine of the Knowledge.**'

chapter: Chapter 1: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), they are the Mines of Knowledge, and the Tree of Prophet-hood, and the Keys of Wisdom, and the Place of Message, and the Interchange of Angels
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 2. It is narrated to me by Al Abbas Bin Marouf, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Rabie, from Al Jaroud, and he is Abu Al Munzir who said, 'I entered to see Ali Bin Al-Hussein (a.s.) with my father. Ali Bin Al-Hussein (a.s.) said: 'Do not take revenge of the people from us! **We, by Allah, are the tree of Prophet-hood, and the House of Mercy, and place of the Message, and the mine of the Knowledge, and the interchange of Angels.**' [cite: 781, 785]
arabicText: 2- حَدَّثَنِي الْعَبَّاسُ بْنُ مَعْرُوفٍ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ رِبْعِيَّ عَنِ الْجَارُودِ وَ هُوَ أَبُو الْمُنْذِرِ قَالَ: دَخَلْتُ مَعَ أَبِي عَلَى عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ ع فَقَالَ عَلِيٌّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ع مَا تَنْقِمُ النَّاسُ مِنَّا نَحْنُ وَ اللَّهِ شَجَرَةُ النُّبُوَّةِ وَ بَيْتُ الرَّحْمَةِ وَ مَوْضِعُ الرِّسَالَةِ وَ مَعْدِنُ الْعِلْمِ وَ مُخْتَلَفُ الْمَلَائِكَةِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 2. It is narrated to me by Al Abbas Bin Marouf, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Rabie, from Al Jaroud, and he is Abu Al Munzir who said, 'I entered to see Ali Bin Al-Hussein (a.s.) with my father.
thaqalaynMatn: Ali Bin Al-Hussein (a.s.) said: 'Do not take revenge of the people from us! **We, by Allah, are the tree of Prophet-hood, and the House of Mercy, and place of the Message, and the mine of the Knowledge, and the interchange of Angels.**'

chapter: Chapter 1: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), they are the Mines of Knowledge, and the Tree of Prophet-hood, and the Keys of Wisdom, and the Place of Message, and the Interchange of Angels
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 3. It is narrated to us by Yaqoub Bin Is'haq and Muhammad Bin Hassan both said, 'We were informed by Abu Imran Al Armany, and he is Musa Bin Zanjawiya, from Aiz Bin Ismail, from the one who narrated it, from Khaysama, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said: '**We are the tree of Prophet-hood, and the house of Mercy, and the keys of wisdom, and the mine of knowledge, and place of the Message, and the interchange of Angels, and the place of secrets of Allah, and we are the depository of Allah among His creatures, and we are the greatest Sanctity of Allah, and we the Covenant of Allah. So the one who is loyal with our pact so he has been loyal with the Pact of Allah, and one who is loyal with our covenant so he has been loyal with the Covenant of Allah, and the one who breaks these, so he has broken a Pact of Allah and His Covenant.**' [cite: 786, 793, 795]
arabicText: 3- حَدَّثَنَا يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ وَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حَسَّانَ فَالا أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو عِمْرَانَ الْأَرْمَنِي وَ هُوَ مُوسَى بْنُ زَنْحَوَيْهِ عَنْ عَائِدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَمَّنْ حَدَّثَهُ عَنْ خَيْثَمَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: نَحْنُ شَجَرَةُ النُّبُوَّةِ وَ بَيْتُ الرَّحْمَةِ وَ مَفَاتِيحُ الْحِكْمَةِ وَ مَعْدِنُ الْعِلْمِ وَ مَوْضِعُ الرِّسَالَةِ وَ مُخْتَلَفُ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ مَوْضِعُ سِرِّ اللَّهِ وَ نَحْنُ وَدِيعَةُ اللَّهِ فِي عِبَادِهِ وَ نَحْنُ حَرَمُ اللَّهِ الْأَكْبَرُ وَ نَحْنُ عَهْدُ اللَّهِ فَمَنْ وَفَى بِذِمَّتِنَا فَقَدْ وَقَى بِذِمَّةِ اللَّهِ وَ مَنْ وَفَى بِعَهْدِنَا فَقَدْ وَلَى بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَ مَنْ خَفَرَهُمَا فَقَدْ خَفَرَ ذِمَّةَ اللَّهِ وَ عَهْدَهُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 3. It is narrated to us by Yaqoub Bin Is'haq and Muhammad Bin Hassan both said, 'We were informed by Abu Imran Al Armany, and he is Musa Bin Zanjawiya, from Aiz Bin Ismail, from the one who narrated it, from Khaysama, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: '**We are the tree of Prophet-hood, and the house of Mercy, and the keys of wisdom, and the mine of knowledge, and place of the Message, and the interchange of Angels, and the place of secrets of Allah, and we are the depository of Allah among His creatures, and we are the greatest Sanctity of Allah, and we the Covenant of Allah. So the one who is loyal with our pact so he has been loyal with the Pact of Allah, and one who is loyal with our covenant so he has been loyal with the Covenant of Allah, and the one who breaks these, so he has broken a Pact of Allah and His Covenant.**'

chapter: Chapter 1: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), they are the Mines of Knowledge, and the Tree of Prophet-hood, and the Keys of Wisdom, and the Place of Message, and the Interchange of Angels
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 4. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Al Hakam Bin Miskeen, from one of the companions of Al Amsh, from Al Amsh, raising the Hadeeth to Abu Zar, he said, 'When the people differed after Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.), Abu Zar said, '**The People of the household of your Prophet, they are the People of the house of the Prophet-hood, and place of the Message, and the interchange of Angels, and the house of Mercy, and the mine of the Knowledge.**' [cite: 796, 798]
arabicText: 4 حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنِ الْحَكَمِ بْنِ مِسْكِينِ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ رَفَعَ الحَدِيثَ إِلَى أَبِي ذَرُ رَحمَهُ اللَّهُ قَالَ: لَمَّا اخْتَلَفَ النَّاسُ بَعْدَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ص قَالَ أَبُو ذَرَ أَهْلُ بَيْتِ نَبِيِّكُمْ هُمْ أَهْلُ بَيْتِ النُّبُوَّةِ وَ مَوْضِعُ الرِّسَالَةِ وَ مُخْتَلَفُ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ بَيْتُ الرَّحْمَةِ وَ مَعْدِنُ الْعِلْمِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 4. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Al Hakam Bin Miskeen, from one of the companions of Al Amsh, from Al Amsh, raising the Hadeeth to Abu Zar, he said, 'When the people differed after Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.),
thaqalaynMatn: Abu Zar said, '**The People of the household of your Prophet, they are the People of the house of the Prophet-hood, and place of the Message, and the interchange of Angels, and the house of Mercy, and the mine of the Knowledge.**'

chapter: Chapter 1: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), they are the Mines of Knowledge, and the Tree of Prophet-hood, and the Keys of Wisdom, and the Place of Message, and the Interchange of Angels
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 5. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Suleyman Bin Ja'far, from Abdul A'la Bin Tameem mentioning it from Al Fuzeyl who said, 'Abu Ja'far (a.s.) said: 'O Fuzeyl! What are the people avoiding from us? By Allah! **We are the tree of Prophet-hood, and place of the Message, and the interchange of Angels, and the house of mercy, and the mine of the Knowledge.**' [cite: 799, 801-802]
arabicText: 5- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي بَحْرَانَ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى بْنِ تَمِيمٍ يَذْكُرُهُ عَنِ الْفُضَيْلِ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ع يَا فُضَيْلُ مَا يَنْقِمُ النَّاسُ مِنَّا فَوَ اللَّهِ إِنَّا لَشَجَرَةُ النُّبُوَّةِ وَ مَوْضِعُ الرِّسَالَةِ وَ مُختَلَفُ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ بَيْتُ الرَّحْمَةِ وَ مَعْدِنُ الْعِلْمِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 5. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Suleyman Bin Ja'far, from Abdul A'la Bin Tameem mentioning it from Al Fuzeyl who said,
thaqalaynMatn: 'Abu Ja'far (a.s.) said: 'O Fuzeyl! What are the people avoiding from us? By Allah! **We are the tree of Prophet-hood, and place of the Message, and the interchange of Angels, and the house of mercy, and the mine of the Knowledge.**'

chapter: Chapter 1: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), they are the Mines of Knowledge, and the Tree of Prophet-hood, and the Keys of Wisdom, and the Place of Message, and the Interchange of Angels
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 6. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Musa Al Khashab who said, 'It is narrated to us by our companions, from Khaysama Al Jufy who said, 'Abu Abdullah (a.s.) said to me: 'O Khaysama! **We are the tree of Prophet-hood, and the house of Mercy, and the keys of Wisdom, and the mine of Knowledge, and place of the Message, and the interchange of Angels, and the place of Secrets of Allah and we are the depository of Allah among His servants, and we are the greatest Sanctuary of Allah, and we are the Guarantee of Allah and we are the Pact of Allah. The one who is loyal with our guarantee, so he has been loyal with the Guarantee of Allah, and one who is loyal with our pact, so he has been loyal with the Pact of Allah, and one who breaks it, so he has broken the Guarantee of Allah and His Pact.**' [cite: 803, 805, 811-814]
arabicText: 6- حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مُوسَى الْخَشَابِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَصْحَابُنَا عَنْ خَيْثَمَةَ الْجُعْفِي قَالَ: قَالَ لِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع يَا خَيْثَمَهُ نَحْنُ شَجَرَةُ النُّبُوَّةِ وَ بَيْتُ الرَّحْمَةِ وَ مَفَاتِيحُ الحِكْمَةِ وَ مَعْدِنُ الْعِلْمِ وَ مَوْضِعُ الرِّسَالَةِ وَ مُخْتَلَفُ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ مَوْضِعُ سِرِّ اللَّهِ وَ نَحْنُ وَدِيعَةُ اللَّهِ فِي عِبَادِهِ وَ نَحْنُ حَرَمُ اللهِ الْأَكْبَرُ وَ نَحْنُ ذِمَّهُ اللَّهِ وَ نَحْنُ عَهْدُ اللَّهِ فَمَنْ وَفَا بِذِمَّتِنَا فَقَدْ وَفَا بِذِمَّةِ اللَّهِ وَ مَنْ وَفَا بِعَهْدِنَا فَقَدْ وَفَا بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَ مَنْ خَفْرَهَا فَقَدْ حَفَرَ ذِمَّةَ اللَّهِ وَ عَهْدَهُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 6. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Musa Al Khashab who said, 'It is narrated to us by our companions, from Khaysama Al Jufy who said,
thaqalaynMatn: 'Abu Abdullah (a.s.) said to me: 'O Khaysama! **We are the tree of Prophet-hood, and the house of Mercy, and the keys of Wisdom, and the mine of Knowledge, and place of the Message, and the interchange of Angels, and the place of Secrets of Allah and we are the depository of Allah among His servants, and we are the greatest Sanctuary of Allah, and we are the Guarantee of Allah and we are the Pact of Allah. The one who is loyal with our guarantee, so he has been loyal with the Guarantee of Allah, and one who is loyal with our pact, so he has been loyal with the Pact of Allah, and one who breaks it, so he has broken the Guarantee of Allah and His Pact.**'

chapter: Chapter 1: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), they are the Mines of Knowledge, and the Tree of Prophet-hood, and the Keys of Wisdom, and the Place of Message, and the Interchange of Angels
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 7. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from his father, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, from Ismail Bin Abu Ziyad Al Sakuny, from Ja'far, from his father, from Ali having said: '**We, People of the Household, are the tree of Prophet-hood, and place of the Message, and the interchange of Angels, and the house of kindness, and the mine of Knowledge.**' [cite: 815, 817]
arabicText: 7- حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ أَبِي زِيَادٍ السَّكُونِي عَنْ جَعْفَرٍ ع عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَلِيَّ عَ قَالَ: إِنَّا أَهْلَ بَيْتٍ شَجَرَةُ النُّبُوَّةِ وَ مَوْضِعُ الرِّسَالَةِ وَ مُخْتَلَفُ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ بَيْتُ الرَّأْفَةِ وَ مَعْدِنُ الْعِلْمِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 7. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from his father, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, from Ismail Bin Abu Ziyad Al Sakuny, from Ja'far, from his father, from Ali having said:
thaqalaynMatn: '**We, People of the Household, are the tree of Prophet-hood, and place of the Message, and the interchange of Angels, and the house of kindness, and the mine of Knowledge.**'

chapter: Chapter 1: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), they are the Mines of Knowledge, and the Tree of Prophet-hood, and the Keys of Wisdom, and the Place of Message, and the Interchange of Angels
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 8. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Ismail Al Alawy who said, 'It is narrated to us by Al Hassan Bin Amro Al Amraky, from Ali son of Ja'far, from his brother Musa Bin Ja'far, from his father having said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: '**We, People of the Household are the tree of Prophet-hood, and place of the Message, and the interchange of Angels, and the house of mercy, and the mine of Knowledge.**' [cite: 818, 820]
arabicText: 8- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ الْعَلَوِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَمْرٍو الْعَمْرَكِيُّ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ عَنْ أَخِيهِ مُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ ع عَنْ أَبِيهِ قالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص إِنَّا أَهْلَ بَيْتٍ شَحَرَهُ النُّبُوَّةِ وَ مَوْضِعُ الرِّسَالَةِ وَ مُخْتَلَفُ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ بَيْتُ الرَّحْمَةِ وَ مَعْدِنُ الْعِلْمِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 8. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Ismail Al Alawy who said, 'It is narrated to us by Al Hassan Bin Amro Al Amraky, from Ali son of Ja'far, from his brother Musa Bin Ja'far, from his father having said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: '**We, People of the Household are the tree of Prophet-hood, and place of the Message, and the interchange of Angels, and the house of mercy, and the mine of Knowledge.**'

chapter: Chapter 1: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), they are the Mines of Knowledge, and the Tree of Prophet-hood, and the Keys of Wisdom, and the Place of Message, and the Interchange of Angels
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 9. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ismail Bin Imran, from Hammad, from Rabie Bin Abdullah Bin Al Jaroud, from his grandfather Al Jaroud who said, 'I entered along with my father to see Ali Bin Al-Hussein Bin Ali Bin Abu Talib (a.s.), he said: 'The people will have no remorse from us, for **we, by Allah, are the tree of Prophet-hood, and the house of mercy, and place of the Message, and the interchange of Angels, and the mine of knowledge.**' [cite: 821, 824, 831]
arabicText: 9- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ عِمْرَانَ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنْ رِبْعِيِّ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الْجَارُودِ عَنْ جَدِّهِ الْجَارُودِ قَالَ دَخَلْتُ مَعَ أَبِي عَلَى عَلِيِّ بْنِ الحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ع فَقَالَ: مَا يَنْقِمُ النَّاسُ مِنَّا فَنَحْنُ وَ اللَّهِ شَجَرَةُ النُّبُوَّةِ وَ بَيْتُ الرَّحْمَةِ وَ مَوْضِعُ الرِّسَالَةِ وَ مُخْتَلَفُ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ مَعْدِنُ العلم.
thaqalaynSanad: 9. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ismail Bin Imran, from Hammad, from Rabie Bin Abdullah Bin Al Jaroud, from his grandfather Al Jaroud who said, 'I entered along with my father to see Ali Bin Al-Hussein Bin Ali Bin Abu Talib (a.s.),
thaqalaynMatn: he said: 'The people will have no remorse from us, for **we, by Allah, are the tree of Prophet-hood, and the house of mercy, and place of the Message, and the interchange of Angels, and the mine of knowledge.**'

chapter: Chapter 2: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), and that their example is an example of the tree which Allah the Exalted mentioned regarding them and regarding their knowledge
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. It is narrated to us by Al Khashab, from Amro Bin Usman, from Ibn Uzafir, from Al Sumaly, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.), he said, 'I asked him about Words of Allah the Exalted: **'like a good tree, its roots are stable and its branches are in the sky, Yielding its fruit in every season by the permission of its Lord?'** (14:24-25). He said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: '**I am its roots, and Ali its trunk, and the Imams its branches, and our knowledge is its fruit, and our Shias are its leaves.** O Abu Hamza! Do you see any extra in it?' I said, 'By Allah! I do not see any extra in it'. He said: 'O Abu Hamza! **By Allah! The new-born from our Shias is born, so a leaf sprouts from it, and he dies, so a leaf falls off from it.**' [cite: 839, 841, 843-844, 847-848]
arabicText: 1- حَدَّثَنَا الْخَشَابُ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنِ ابْنِ عُذَافِرٍ عَنِ الثَّمَالِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى كَشَجَرَةٍ طَيِّبَةٍ أَصْلُهَا ثابت و فَرْعُها فِي السَّماءِ تُؤْتِي أَكُلَهَا كُلَّ حِينٍ بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهَا فَقَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ص أَنَا أَصْلُهَا وَ عَلى فَرْعُهَا وَ الْأَئِمَّةُ أَغْصَانُهَا وَ عِلْمُنَا ثَمَرُهَا وَ شِيعَتُنَا وَرَقْهَا يَا أَبَا حَمْزَهُ هَلْ تَرَى فِيهَا فَضْلًا قَالَ قُلْتُ لَا وَ اللَّهِ مَا أَرَى فِيهَا فَضْلًا قَالَ فَقَالَ يَا أَبَا حَمْزَةَ وَ اللَّهِ إِنَّ الْمَوْلُودَ يُولَدُ مِنْ شِيعَتِنَا فَتُورِقُ وَرَقَةً مِنْهَا وَ يَمُوتُ فَتَسْقُطُ وَرَقَةٌ مِنْهَا.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. It is narrated to us by Al Khashab, from Amro Bin Usman, from Ibn Uzafir, from Al Sumaly, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.), he said, 'I asked him about Words of Allah the Exalted: 'like a good tree, its roots are stable and its branches are in the sky, Yielding its fruit in every season by the permission of its Lord?' (14:24-25).
thaqalaynMatn: He said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: '**I am its roots, and Ali its trunk, and the Imams its branches, and our knowledge is its fruit, and our Shias are its leaves.** O Abu Hamza! Do you see any extra in it?' I said, 'By Allah! I do not see any extra in it'. He said: 'O Abu Hamza! **By Allah! The new-born from our Shias is born, so a leaf sprouts from it, and he dies, so a leaf falls off from it.**'

chapter: Chapter 2: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), and that their example is an example of the tree which Allah the Exalted mentioned regarding them and regarding their knowledge
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 2. It is narrated to us by Ibn Yazeed, from ibn Mahboub, from Al Ahowl, from Sallam Bin Al Mustaneer who said, 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about Word of Allah Blessed and Exalted: **'like a good tree, its roots are stable and its branches are in the sky, Yielding its fruit in every season by the permission of its Lord?'** (14:24-25). He said: '**The tree is Rasool-Allah, his lineage stable in the Clan of Hashim, and the trunk of the tree is Ali, and a root of the tree is (Syeda) Fatima, and its branches are Imams, and its leaves are the Shias; and the (Shia) man dies, so a leaf falls off from it, and the (Shia) new-born is born, so a leaf sprouts.**' I said, 'May I be sacrificed for you! Words of the Exalted: **'Yielding its fruit in every season by the permission of its Lord?'**' He said: '**It is what comes out from the Imam, from the Permissible(s) and the Prohibition during every year to his Shias.**' [cite: 849, 851-853, 861-862]
arabicText: 2- حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ يَزِيدَ عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبِ عَنِ الْأَحْوَلِ عَنْ سَلَامِ بْنِ الْمُسْتَنِيرِ قَالَ سَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَالَى كَشَجَرَةٍ طَيِّبَةٍ أَصْلُهَا ثَابِتٌ و فَرْعُها في السَّماءِ تُؤْتِي أكلها كُلَّ حِينٍ بِإِذْنِ رَبِّما قَالَ الشَّجَرَهُ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص نَسَبُهُ ثَابِتٌ فِي بَنِي هَاشِمٍ وَ فَرْعُ الشَّجَرَةِ عَلِيٌّ وَ عُنْصُرُ الشَّجَرَةِ فَاطِمَةُ وَ أَغْصَانُهَا الْأَئِمَّةُ وَ وَرَقُهَا الشَّيعَةُ وَ إِنَّ الرَّجُلَ لَيَمُوتُ فَتَسْقُطُ مِنْهَا وَرَقَةٌ وَ إِنَّ الْمَوْلُودَ لَيُولَدُ فَتُورِقُ وَرَقَةً قَالَ قُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ قَوْلُهُ تَعَالَى تُؤْتِي أَكلها كُلَّ حِينٍ بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهَا قَالَ هُوَ مَا يَخْرُجُ مِنَ الْإِمَامِ مِنَ الحَلَالِ وَ الحَرَامِ فِي كُلِّ سَنَةٍ إِلَى شِيعَتِهِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 2. It is narrated to us by Ibn Yazeed, from ibn Mahboub, from Al Ahowl, from Sallam Bin Al Mustaneer who said, 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about Word of Allah Blessed and Exalted: 'like a good tree, its roots are stable and its branches are in the sky, Yielding its fruit in every season by the permission of its Lord?' (14:24-25).
thaqalaynMatn: He said: '**The tree is Rasool-Allah, his lineage stable in the Clan of Hashim, and the trunk of the tree is Ali, and a root of the tree is (Syeda) Fatima, and its branches are Imams, and its leaves are the Shias; and the (Shia) man dies, so a leaf falls off from it, and the (Shia) new-born is born, so a leaf sprouts.**' I said, 'May I be sacrificed for you! Words of the Exalted: 'Yielding its fruit in every season by the permission of its Lord?'' He said: '**It is what comes out from the Imam, from the Permissible(s) and the Prohibition during every year to his Shias.**'

chapter: Chapter 2: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), and that their example is an example of the tree which Allah the Exalted mentioned regarding them and regarding their knowledge
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 3. It is narrated to us by Ahmad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Momin Al Taq, from Sallam Bin Al Mustaneer who said, 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about Words of Allah the Exalted: **'like a good tree, its roots are stable and its branches are in the sky, Yielding its fruit in every season by the permission of its Lord?'** (14:24-25). He said: '**The tree is Rasool-Allah. He installed it firmly in the Clan of Hashim, and the root of the tree is (Syeda) Fatima, and the trunk of the tree is Ali Amir Al-Momineen, and branches of the tree and its fruits are the Imams, and leaves of the tree are the Shias, and that the new-born is born, so a leaf sprouts, and the man from the Shias dies, so a leaf falls off.**' I said, 'May I be sacrificed for you! **'Yielding its fruit in every season by the permission of its Lord?'**' He said: '**What Fatwas the Imams issue to their Shias during every Hajj and Umrah, from the Permissible(s) and the Prohibitions.**' [cite: 863, 865, 867-868, 871-873]
arabicText: 3- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبِ عَنْ مُؤْمِنِ الطَّاقِ عَنْ سَلَامِ بْنِ الْمُسْتَنِيرِ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى كَشَجَرَةٍ طَيِّبَةٍ أَصلها ثابت وفرعها في السَّماءِ تُؤْتِي أُكُلَهَا كُلَّ حِينٍ بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهَا قَالَ الشَّجَرَةُ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص نَسَبُهُ ثَابِتٌ فِي بَنِي هَاشِمٍ وَ عُنْصُرُ الشَّجَرَةِ فَاطِمَةُ وَ فَرْعُ الشَّجَرَةِ عَلِيٌّ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَ أَغْصَانُ الشَّجَرَةِ وَ ثَمَرُهَا الْأَئِمَّةُ وَ وَرَقُ الشَّجَرَةِ الشَّيعَةُ وَ إِنَّ الْمَوْلُودَ لَيُولَدُ فَتُورِقُ وَرَقَةً وَ إِنَّ الرَّجُلَ مِنَ الشَّيعَةِ لَيَمُوتُ فَتَسْقُطُ وَرَقَةٌ قَالَ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ تُؤْتِي أَكُلَهَا كُلَّ حِينٍ بِإِذْنِ رَبِّها قَالَ مَا يُفْتِي الْأَئِمَّةُ شِيعَتَهُمْ فِي كُلِّ حَجَّ وَ عُمْرَةٍ مِنَ الحَلَالِ وَ الحَرَامِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 3. It is narrated to us by Ahmad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Momin Al Taq, from Sallam Bin Al Mustaneer who said, 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about Words of Allah the Exalted: 'like a good tree, its roots are stable and its branches are in the sky, Yielding its fruit in every season by the permission of its Lord?' (14:24-25).
thaqalaynMatn: He said: '**The tree is Rasool-Allah. He installed it firmly in the Clan of Hashim, and the root of the tree is (Syeda) Fatima, and the trunk of the tree is Ali Amir Al-Momineen, and branches of the tree and its fruits are the Imams, and leaves of the tree are the Shias, and that the new-born is born, so a leaf sprouts, and the man from the Shias dies, so a leaf falls off.**' I said, 'May I be sacrificed for you! 'Yielding its fruit in every season by the permission of its Lord?'' He said: '**What Fatwas the Imams issue to their Shias during every Hajj and Umrah, from the Permissible(s) and the Prohibitions.**'

chapter: Chapter 2: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), and that their example is an example of the tree which Allah the Exalted mentioned regarding them and regarding their knowledge
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 4. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Sayf, from his father Sayf, from Umar Bin Yazeed Baya'a Al Sabiry who said, 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about the Words of Allah the Exalted: **'A tree, its roots are stable and its branches are in the sky'** (14:24). He said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: '**By Allah! I am its root, and Amir Al Momineen is its root, and the Imams from his offspring are its branches, and knowledge of the Imams is its fruit, and their Shias, the Momineen, are its leaves.** Do you see any extra in it, O Abu Ja'far?' I said, 'No, by Allah!' He said: '**The Momin is born, so a leaf sprouts, and the Momin dies, so a leaf falls off.**' [cite: 874, 876, 880-881, 884, 886-889]
arabicText: 4- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ سَيْفٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ سَيْفٍ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ يَزِيدَ بَيَّاعِ السَّائِرِي قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى شَجَرَةٍ أصلها ثابت وفرعها في السماء قالَ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ص وَ اللَّهِ جَذْرُهَا وَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ فَرْعُهَا وَ الْأَئِمَّةُ مِنْ ذُرِّيَّتِهَا أَغْصَانُهَا وَ عِلْمُ الْأَئِمَّةِ ثَمَرَهَا وَ شِيعَتُهُمُ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ وَرَقُهَا هَلْ تَرَى فِيهَا فَضْلًا يَا أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ قَالَ قُلْتُ لَا وَ اللَّهِ فَقَالَ وَ اللَّهِ إِنَّ الْمُؤْمِنَ يُولَدُ فَيُورِقُ وَرَقَةً وَ إِنَّ الْمُؤْمِنَ لَيَمُوتُ فَتَسْقُطُ وَرَقَتُهُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 4. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Sayf, from his father Sayf, from Umar Bin Yazeed Baya'a Al Sabiry who said, 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about the Words of Allah the Exalted: 'A tree, its roots are stable and its branches are in the sky' (14:24).
thaqalaynMatn: He said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: '**By Allah! I am its root, and Amir Al Momineen is its root, and the Imams from his offspring are its branches, and knowledge of the Imams is its fruit, and their Shias, the Momineen, are its leaves.** Do you see any extra in it, O Abu Ja'far?' I said, 'No, by Allah!' He said: '**The Momin is born, so a leaf sprouts, and the Momin dies, so a leaf falls off.**'

chapter: Rare from Chapter 2
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Al Mufazzal Bin Salih, from Muhammad Al Halby, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding Words of Allah Mighty and Majestic: **'a good word as being like a good tree, its roots are stable and its branches are in the sky'** (14:24). He said: '**The Prophet and the Imams, they are the stable roots, and the branches are the Wilayah for the ones who enters into it.**' [cite: 892-895]
arabicText: 1- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنِ الْمُفَضَّلِ بْنِ صَالِحٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ الْحَلَبِي عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَ كَلِمَةً طَيِّبَةً كَشَجَرَةٍ طيبة أصلها ثابت و فَرْعُها في السَّمَاءِ قَالَ النَّبِيُّ وَ الْأَئِمَّةُ هُمُ الْأَصْلُ الثَّابِتُ وَ الْفَرْعُ الْوَلَايَةُ لِمَنْ دَخَلَ فِيهَا.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Al Mufazzal Bin Salih, from Muhammad Al Halby, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding Words of Allah Mighty and Majestic: 'a good word as being like a good tree, its roots are stable and its branches are in the sky' (14:24).
thaqalaynMatn: He said: '**The Prophet and the Imams, they are the stable roots, and the branches are the Wilayah for the ones who enters into it.**'

chapter: Rare from Chapter 2
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 2. It is narrated to us by Musa Bin Ja'far who said, 'I found in the handwriting of my father reporting from Muhammad Bin Isa Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman Al Daylami, a slave of Abu Abdullah (a.s.), from Suleyman who said, 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about Words of Allah the Exalted: **'At the Lote Tree (Sidrat Al-Muntaha)'** (53:14). He said: **'its roots are stable and its branches are in the sky'** (14:24). **Rasool-Allah is its root, and Ali is its peak, and the Imams are its branches, and their Shias are its leaves.**' I said, 'May I be sacrificed for you! So, what is the meaning of 'Al-Muntaha'?' He said: '**By Allah! The Religion ends to it. One who does not happen to be from the tree, so he isn't a Momin, and he isn't a Shia of ours.**' [cite: 896, 898-901, 908-911]
arabicText: 2- حَدَّثَنَا مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ قَالَ وَجَدْتُ بِخَطْ أَبِي رِوَايَتَهُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى الْأَشْعَرِي عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ الدَّيْلَمِي مَوْلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ قالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللهِ تَعَالَى سِدْرَةِ الْمُنتَهى قَالَ أَصلها ثابت وفرعها في السَّماءِ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ص جَذْرُهَا وَ عَلِيٌّ عَ ذِرْؤُهَا وَ فَاطِمَةُ فَرْعُهَا وَ الْأَئِمَّةُ أَغْصَانُهَا وَ شِيعَتُهُمْ أَوْرَاقُهَا قَالَ قُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ فَمَا مَعْنَى الْمُنْتَهَى قَالَ إِلَيْهَا وَ اللَّهِ انْتَهَى الدِّينُ مَنْ لم يَكُن مِنَ الشَّجَرَةِ فَلَيْسَ بِمُؤْمِنٍ وَ لَيْسَ لَنَا شِيعَةً.
thaqalaynSanad: 2. It is narrated to us by Musa Bin Ja'far who said, 'I found in the handwriting of my father reporting from Muhammad Bin Isa Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman Al Daylami, a slave of Abu Abdullah (a.s.), from Suleyman who said, 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about Words of Allah the Exalted: 'At the Lote Tree (Sidrat Al-Muntaha)' (53:14).
thaqalaynMatn: He said: '**its roots are stable and its branches are in the sky**' (14:24). **Rasool-Allah is its root, and Ali is its peak, and the Imams are its branches, and their Shias are its leaves.**' I said, 'May I be sacrificed for you! So, what is the meaning of 'Al-Muntaha'?' He said: '**By Allah! The Religion ends to it. One who does not happen to be from the tree, so he isn't a Momin, and he isn't a Shia of ours.**'

chapter: Rare from Chapter 2
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 3. It is narrated to us by Ibrahim Bin Hashim, from Amro Bin Usman Al Khazaz, from Abdul Rahman Bin Hamad, from Umar Bin Yazeed who said, 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about Words of Allah the Exalted: **'its roots are stable and its branches are in the sky'** (14:24). He said: '**Rasool-Allah is its roots, and Amir Al-Momineen its peak, and (Syeda) Fatima its main branch (trunk), and the Imams from her offspring are its branches, and knowledge of the Imams are its fruits, and their Shias are its leaves. So, do you see any extra among them?**' I said, 'No'. He said: '**By Allah! The Momin dies, so a leaf falls from that tree, and he is born, so a leaf sprouts in it.**' I said, '**'Yielding its fruit in every season by the permission of its Lord?'** (14:25)'. He said: '**What comes out to the people from knowledge of the Imam during every season he is asked about.**' [cite: 912, 914-920]
arabicText: 3- حَدَّثَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ هَاشِمٍ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ عُثْمَانَ الْخَزَازِ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ حَمَّادٍ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ يَزِيدَ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى أصلها ثابت وفرعها في السماء فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ص جَذْرُهَا وَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ع دَرُوهَا وَ فَاطِمَةُ عَ فَرْعُهَا وَ الْأَئِمَّةُ مِنْ ذُرِّيَّتِهَا أَغْصَانُهَا وَ عِلْمُ الْأَئِمَّةِ ثَمَرُهَا وَ شِيعَتُهُمْ وَرَقُهَا فَهَلْ تَرَى فِيهِمْ فَضْلًا فَقُلْتُ لَا فَقَالَ وَ اللَّهِ إِنَّ الْمُؤْمِنَ لَيَمُوتُ فَتَسْقُطُ وَرَقَةٌ مِنْ تِلْكَ الشَّجَرَةِ وَ إِنَّهُ لَيُولَدُ فَتُورَقُ وَرَقَةٌ فِيهَا فَقُلْتُ قَوْلُهُ تُؤْتِي أكلها كُلَّ حِينٍ بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهَا فَقَالَ مَا يَخْرُجُ إِلَى النَّاسِ مِنْ عِلْمِ الْإِمَامِ فِي كُلِّ حِينٍ يُسْأَلُ عَنْهُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 3. It is narrated to us by Ibrahim Bin Hashim, from Amro Bin Usman Al Khazaz, from Abdul Rahman Bin Hamad, from Umar Bin Yazeed who said, 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about Words of Allah the Exalted: 'its roots are stable and its branches are in the sky' (14:24).
thaqalaynMatn: He said: '**Rasool-Allah is its roots, and Amir Al-Momineen its peak, and (Syeda) Fatima its main branch (trunk), and the Imams from her offspring are its branches, and knowledge of the Imams are its fruits, and their Shias are its leaves. So, do you see any extra among them?**' I said, 'No'. He said: '**By Allah! The Momin dies, so a leaf falls from that tree, and he is born, so a leaf sprouts in it.**' I said, ''Yielding its fruit in every season by the permission of its Lord?' (14:25)'. He said: '**What comes out to the people from knowledge of the Imam during every season he is asked about.**'

chapter: Chapter 3: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), they are the Divine Authorities of Allah, and the Door of Allah, and Masters of the Command of Allah, and the Face of Allah which He can be accessed, and Side of Allah, and Eye of Allah, and Treasurers of His Knowledge, Majestic is His Majesty, and the Givers of it
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from al Bazanty, from Muhammad bin Humran, from Aswad Bin Saeed who said, 'I was in the presence of Abu Abdullah (a.s.) and he composed saying initialling from without having been asked: '**We are the Divine Authorities of Allah, and we are the door of Allah, and we are the Tongue of Allah, and we are the Face of Allah, and we are the Eye of Allah among His creatures, and we are the Masters of the Commands of Allah among His servants.**' [cite: 101, 107]
arabicText: 1- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْبَزَنْطِيِّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حُمْرَانَ عَنْ أَسْوَدَ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ كُنتُ عِنْدَ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فَأَنشَأْ يَقُولُ ابْتِدَاءً مِنْ غَيْرِ أَنْ يُسْأَلَ نَحْنُ حُجَّةُ اللَّهِ وَ نَحْنُ بَابُ اللَّهِ وَ نَحْنُ لِسَانُ اللَّهِ وَ نَحْنُ وَجْهُ اللهِ وَ نَحْنُ عَيْنُ اللَّهِ فِي خَلْقِهِ وَ نَحْنُ وَلَاةُ أَمْرِ اللَّهِ فِي عِبَادِهِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from al Bazanty, from Muhammad bin Humran, from Aswad Bin Saeed who said, 'I was in the presence of Abu Abdullah (a.s.) and he composed saying initialling from without having been asked:
thaqalaynMatn: '**We are the Divine Authorities of Allah, and we are the door of Allah, and we are the Tongue of Allah, and we are the Face of Allah, and we are the Eye of Allah among His creatures, and we are the Masters of the Commands of Allah among His servants.**'

chapter: Chapter 3: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), they are the Divine Authorities of Allah, and the Door of Allah, and Masters of the Command of Allah, and the Face of Allah which He can be accessed, and Side of Allah, and Eye of Allah, and Treasurers of His Knowledge, Majestic is His Majesty, and the Givers of it
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 2. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Ahmad Bin Bishr, from Hassan Al Jarmal, from hashim Bin Abu Ammar who said, 'I heard Amir Al-Momineen (a.s.) saying: '**I am an eye of Allah, and I am a Side of Allah, and I am a Hand of Allah, and I am a door of Allah.**' [cite: 936, 938]
arabicText: 2- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ بِشْرٍ عَنْ حَسَّانَ الْجَمَالِ عَنْ هَاشِمِ بْنِ أَبِي عَمَّارٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ع يَقُولُ أَنَا عَيْنُ اللَّهِ وَ أَنَا جَنَّبُ اللهِ وَ أَنَا يَدُ اللَّهِ وَ أَنَا بَابُ اللَّهِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 2. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Ahmad Bin Bishr, from Hassan Al Jarmal, from hashim Bin Abu Ammar who said,
