It is narrated to us by Al Hussein Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Ja'far Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Isa Al Qummi, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman, from Abdullah Bin Sinan, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding His (a.z.w.j.) Words: "**And We had Covenanted to Adam before** [20:115]... **Words regarding Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), and Ali (a.s.), and Al-Hassan (a.s.), and Al-Hussein (a.s.) and the Imams (a.s.) from their offspring, but he forgot** [20:115]—that is how Allah (a.z.w.j.) Revealed unto Muhammad (s.a.w.a.)."
arabicText: 4- حَدَّثَنَا الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى الْقُمِّيِّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع فِي قَوْلِهِ وَ لَقَدْ عَهِدْنَا إِلى آدَمَ مِنْ قَبْلُ كَلِمَاتٍ فِي مُحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلِي وَ الْحَسَنِ وَ الْحُسَيْنِ وَ الْأَئِمَّةِ مِنْ ذُرِّيَّتِهِمْ فَنَسِيَ هَكَذَا وَ اللَّهِ أُنْزِلَتْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ ص.
thaqalaynSanad: 4. It is narrated to us by Al Hussein Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Ja'far Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Isa Al Qummi, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman, from Abdullah Bin Sinan, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding His (a.z.w.j.) Words: "And We had Covenanted to Adam before [20:115]..."
thaqalaynMatn: "**Words regarding Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), and Ali (a.s.), and Al-Hassan (a.s.), and Al-Hussein (a.s.) and the Imams (a.s.) from their offspring, but he forgot** [20:115]—that is how Allah (a.z.w.j.) Revealed unto Muhammad (s.a.w.a.)."

chapter: Chapter 7: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Specialised the Imams (a.s.) From Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) With, From the Wilayah of the Determined Ones (Ul Al-Azam) Prophets for Them (a.s.) Regarding the Covenant and Others
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 5. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Aamir, from Abu Abdullah Al Barqy, from Al Hussein Bin Usman, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Al Sumali who said, 'Abu Ja'far (a.s.) said: '**Surely, Ali (a.s.) is a Sign of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), and Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) called to the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.)**.'
arabicText: 5- حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عَامِرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْبَرْقِيِّ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفُضَيْلِ عَنِ الثَّمَالِي قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ع إِنَّ عَلِيَا آيَةٌ لِمُحَمَّدٍ ص وَ إِنَّ مُحَمَّداً يَدْعُو إِلَى وَلَايَةِ عَلِيٌّ ع.
thaqalaynSanad: 5. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Aamir, from Abu Abdullah Al Barqy, from Al Hussein Bin Usman, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Al Sumali who said,
thaqalaynMatn: 'Abu Ja'far (a.s.) said: '**Surely, Ali (a.s.) is a Sign of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), and Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) called to the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.)**.'

chapter: Chapter 7: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Specialised the Imams (a.s.) From Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) With, From the Wilayah of the Determined Ones (Ul Al-Azam) Prophets for Them (a.s.) Regarding the Covenant and Others
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 6. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Musa, from Ali Bin Hassan, from Abdul Rahman Bin Kaseer, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted: "And when your Lord Seized from the Children of Adam, their offspring from their backs" [7:172]—up to the end of the Verse. He (a.s.) said: "**Allah (a.z.w.j.) Extracted from the back of Adam (a.s.), his offspring up to the Day of Judgment, and they came out like the particles. He (a.z.w.j.) Introduced them to Himself (a.z.w.j.), and had it not been for that, no one would recognise his Lord (a.z.w.j.). Then He (a.z.w.j.) Said: 'Am I not your Lord?' They said, 'Yes' [7:172], and this is Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) My Rasool and Ali (a.s.) Amir Al-Momineen My Caliph and My Trustee.**"
arabicText: 6- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مُوسَى عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ حَسَّانَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ كَثِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللهِ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى وَ إِذْ أَخَذَ رَبُّكَ مِنْ بَنِي آدَمَ مِنْ ظُهُورِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ إِلَى آخِرِ الْآيَةِ قَالَ أَخْرَجَ اللهُ مِنْ ظَهْرِ آدَمَ ذُرِّيَّتَهُ إِلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ فَخَرَجُوا كَالذَّرْ فَعَرَّفَهُمْ نَفْسَهُ وَ لَوْ لَا ذَلِكَ لَمْ يَعْرِفْ أَحَدٌ رَبَّهُ ثُمَّ قَالَ أَلَسْتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ قَالُوا بَلَى وَ إِنَّ هَذَا مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولِي وَ عَلِيٌّ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ خَلِيفَتِي وَ أَمِينِي.
thaqalaynSanad: 6. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Musa, from Ali Bin Hassan, from Abdul Rahman Bin Kaseer, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted: "And when your Lord Seized from the Children of Adam, their offspring from their backs" [7:172]—up to the end of the Verse.
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**Allah (a.z.w.j.) Extracted from the back of Adam (a.s.), his offspring up to the Day of Judgment, and they came out like the particles. He (a.z.w.j.) Introduced them to Himself (a.z.w.j.), and had it not been for that, no one would recognise his Lord (a.z.w.j.). Then He (a.z.w.j.) Said: 'Am I not your Lord?' They said, 'Yes' [7:172], and this is Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) My Rasool and Ali (a.s.) Amir Al-Momineen My Caliph and My Trustee.**"

chapter: Chapter 7: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Specialised the Imams (a.s.) From Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) With, From the Wilayah of the Determined Ones (Ul Al-Azam) Prophets for Them (a.s.) Regarding the Covenant and Others
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 7. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Al Nazar Bin Suweyd, from Khalid Bin Hammad and Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Al Sumali, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said: 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Revealed to His Prophet (s.a.w.a.): "**Therefore adhere with that which is Revealed unto you, surely you are upon a Straight Path**" [43:43]. He (a.s.) said: "**You (s.a.w.a.) are upon the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.), and Ali (a.s.) is the Straight Path.**"
arabicText: 7- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنِ النَّضْرِ بْنِ سُوَيْدٍ عَنْ خَالِدِ بْنِ حَمَّادٍ وَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفُضَيْلِ عَنِ الثَّمَالِي عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: أَوْحَى اللَّهُ إِلَى نَبِيِّهِ فَاسْتَمْسِكُ بِالَّذِي أُوحِيَ إِلَيْكَ إِنَّكَ عَلى صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ قَالَ إِنَّكَ عَلَى وَلَايَةِ عَلِيٌّ وَ عَلِيٌّ هُوَ الصِّرَاطَ الْمُسْتَقِيمُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 7. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Al Nazar Bin Suweyd, from Khalid Bin Hammad and Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Al Sumali, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Allah (a.z.w.j.) Revealed to His Prophet (s.a.w.a.): "**Therefore adhere with that which is Revealed unto you, surely you are upon a Straight Path**" [43:43]. He (a.s.) said: "**You (s.a.w.a.) are upon the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.), and Ali (a.s.) is the Straight Path.**"'

chapter: Chapter 7: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Specialised the Imams (a.s.) From Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) With, From the Wilayah of the Determined Ones (Ul Al-Azam) Prophets for Them (a.s.) Regarding the Covenant and Others
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 8. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Aamir, from Abu Abdullah Al Barqy, from Al Hussein Bin Usman, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Abu Hamza who said, 'Abu Ja'far (a.s.) said: '**Ali (a.s.) is a Sign for Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), and that Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) called to the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.).**'
arabicText: 8- حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنْ عَامِرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْبَرْقِيِّ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفُضَيْلِ عَنْ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ع إِنَّ عَلِياً عَ آيَةٌ لِمُحَمَّدٍ وَ إِنَّ مُحَمَّداً يَدْعُو إِلَى وَلَايَةِ عَلِيٌّ ع.
thaqalaynSanad: 8. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Aamir, from Abu Abdullah Al Barqy, from Al Hussein Bin Usman, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Abu Hamza who said,
thaqalaynMatn: 'Abu Ja'far (a.s.) said: '**Ali (a.s.) is a Sign for Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), and that Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) called to the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.).**'

chapter: Chapter 7: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Has Specialised the Imams (a.s.) From Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) With, From the Wilayah of the Determined Ones (Ul Al-Azam) Prophets for Them (a.s.) Regarding the Covenant and Others
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 9. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hussein Bin Musa, from Ali Bin Hassan, from Abdul Rahman Bin Kaseer, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding Words of Mighty and Majestic: "**And when your Lord Seized from the Children of Adam, their offspring from their backs and Made them testify against their own selves: 'Am I not your Lord?'**" [7:172]. He (a.s.) Said: "**Allah (a.z.w.j.) Brought out from the forehead of Adam (a.s.) his progeny up to the Day of Qiyamah like particles. They knew Him (a.z.w.j.) themselves, and had it not been for that, no one would have recognised his Lord (a.z.w.j.). And Said: 'Am I not your Lord?' They said, 'Yes.' He (a.z.w.j.) Said: 'And this here is Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) the Rasool of Allah (a.z.w.j.), and Ali (a.s.) the Emir of the Momineen.'**"
arabicText: 9- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مُوسَى عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ حَسَّانَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ كَثِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللهِ ع في قَوْلِهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَ وَ إِذْ أَخَذَ رَبُّكَ مِنْ بَنِي آدَمَ مِنْ ظُهُورِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ وَ أَشْهَدَهُمْ عَلى أَنْفُسِهِمْ أَلَسْتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ قَالَ أَخْرَجَ اللهُ مِنْ ظَهْرِ آدَمَ ذُرِّيَّتَهُ إِلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ كَالدَّرِّ فَعَرَّفَهُمْ نَفْسَهُ وَ لَوْ لا ذلك لم يعرف أَحَدٌ رَبَّهُ وَ قَالَ أَلَسْتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ قَالُوا بَلَى وَ أَنَّ مُحَمَّداً رَسُولُ اللَّهِ وَ عَلِيًّا أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ.
thaqalaynSanad: 9. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hussein Bin Musa, from Ali Bin Hassan, from Abdul Rahman Bin Kaseer, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding Words of Mighty and Majestic: "And when your Lord Seized from the Children of Adam, their offspring from their backs and Made them testify against their own selves: 'Am I not your Lord?'" [7:172].
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) Said: "**Allah (a.z.w.j.) Brought out from the forehead of Adam (a.s.) his progeny up to the Day of Qiyamah like particles. They knew Him (a.z.w.j.) themselves, and had it not been for that, no one would have recognised his Lord (a.z.w.j.). And Said: 'Am I not your Lord?' They said, 'Yes.' He (a.z.w.j.) Said: 'And this here is Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) the Rasool of Allah (a.z.w.j.), and Ali (a.s.) the Emir of the Momineen.'**"

chapter: Chapter 8: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Specialised the Imams (a.s.) From Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), From the Wilayah of the Prophets for Them (a.s.) Regarding the Covenant and Others and What They (a.s.) Taught From That
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. It is narrated to us by Ibn Yazeed, from Ibn Mahboub, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Abu Al-Hussein (a.s.) having said: '**Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) is written in the entirety of the Parchments of the Prophets (a.s.), and Allah (a.z.w.j.) never Sent a Prophet (a.s.) except with the Prophet-hood of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) and successorship of Ali (a.s.).**'
arabicText: 1- حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ يَزِيدَ عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفُضَيْلِ عَنْ أَبِي الحَسَنِ ع قَالَ : وَلايَةٌ عَلي مَكْتُوبَةٌ فِي جَمِيعِ صُحُفِ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَ لَنْ يَبْعَثَ اللَّهُ نَبِيَا إِلَّا بِنُبُوَّةٍ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ وَصِيَّةِ عَلِيَّ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمَا.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. It is narrated to us by Ibn Yazeed, from Ibn Mahboub, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Abu Al-Hussein (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: '**Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) is written in the entirety of the Parchments of the Prophets (a.s.), and Allah (a.z.w.j.) never Sent a Prophet (a.s.) except with the Prophet-hood of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) and successorship of Ali (a.s.).**'

chapter: Chapter 8: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Specialised the Imams (a.s.) From Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), From the Wilayah of the Prophets for Them (a.s.) Regarding the Covenant and Others and What They (a.s.) Taught From That
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 2. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Abbas, from Ibn Al Mugheira, from Abu Hafs, from Abu Haroun Al Abady, from Abu Saeed Al Khudry who said, 'I heard Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) saying: "**O Ali (a.s.)! Allah (a.z.w.j.) did not Send a Prophet except and He (a.z.w.j.) has Called him to your Wilayah, willingly or unwillingly.**"'
arabicText: 2- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْعَبَّاسِ عَنِ ابْنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ عَنْ أَبِي حَفْصٍ عَنْ أَبِي هَارُونَ الْعَبْدِي عَنْ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ الْخُدْرِيِّ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ص يَقُولُ يَا عَلِيُّ مَا بَعَثَ اللَّهُ نَبِيّاً إِلَّا وَ قَدْ دَعَاهُ إِلَى وَلَا يَتِكَ طَائِعاً أَوْ كَارِها.
thaqalaynSanad: 2. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Abbas, from Ibn Al Mugheira, from Abu Hafs, from Abu Haroun Al Abady, from Abu Saeed Al Khudry who said, 'I heard Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) saying:
thaqalaynMatn: "**O Ali (a.s.)! Allah (a.z.w.j.) did not Send a Prophet except and He (a.z.w.j.) has Called him to your Wilayah, willingly or unwillingly.**"

chapter: Chapter 8: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Specialised the Imams (a.s.) From Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), From the Wilayah of the Prophets for Them (a.s.) Regarding the Covenant and Others and What They (a.s.) Taught From That
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 3. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel, and Al Hassan Bin Rashid, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted: "**Did We not Expand your chest for you?**" [94:1], said: "**By the Wilayah of Amir-Al-Momineen (a.s.).**"
arabicText: 3- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ جَمِيلٍ وَ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ رَاشِدٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَالَى أَ لَمْ نَشْرَحْ لَكَ صَدْرَكَ قَالَ فَقَالَ بِوَلَايَةِ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلِيٌّ ع.
thaqalaynSanad: 3. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel, and Al Hassan Bin Rashid, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) regarding Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted: "Did We not Expand your chest for you?" [94:1],
thaqalaynMatn: said: "**By the Wilayah of Amir-Al-Momineen (a.s.).**"

chapter: Chapter 8: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Specialised the Imams (a.s.) From Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), From the Wilayah of the Prophets for Them (a.s.) Regarding the Covenant and Others and What They (a.s.) Taught From That
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 4. It is narrated to us by Al-Hassan Bin Ali Bin Al Numan, from Yahya Bin Abu Zakariya, from his father, and Muhammad Bin Sama'at, from Fayz Bin Abu Shayba, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said, 'I heard Abu Ja'far (a.s.) saying: '**Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted Took a Covenant of the Prophets (a.s.) upon the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) and Took a Pact of the Prophets (a.s.) with the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.).**'
arabicText: 4- حَدَّثَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ النُّعْمَانِ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي زَكَرِيَّا عَنْ أَبِيهِ وَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سَمَاعَةَ عَنْ فَيْضِ بْنِ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جعْفَرٍ ع يَقُولُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَالَى أَخَذَ مِيثَاقَ النَّبِيِّينَ عَلى وَلَايَةِ عَليَّ وَ أَخَذَ عَهْدَ النَّبِيِّينَ بِوَلَايَةِ عَلِي.
thaqalaynSanad: 4. It is narrated to us by Al-Hassan Bin Ali Bin Al Numan, from Yahya Bin Abu Zakariya, from his father, and Muhammad Bin Sama'at, from Fayz Bin Abu Shayba, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,
thaqalaynMatn: 'I heard Abu Ja'far (a.s.) saying: '**Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted Took a Covenant of the Prophets (a.s.) upon the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.) and Took a Pact of the Prophets (a.s.) with the Wilayah of Ali (a.s.).**'

chapter: Chapter 8: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Specialised the Imams (a.s.) From Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), From the Wilayah of the Prophets for Them (a.s.) Regarding the Covenant and Others and What They (a.s.) Taught From That
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 5. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin saeed, from one of his companions, from Hanan Bin Sadeyr, from Salama Bin Al Hannat, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Mighty and Majestic: "**The Trustworthy Spirit descended with it [26:193] Upon your heart for you to become from the warners [26:194] In clear Arabic language**" [26:195]. He (a.s.) said: "**It is the Wilayah of Amir Al-Momineen (a.s.).**"
arabicText: 5- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِهِ عَنْ حَنَانِ بْنِ سَدِيرٍ عَنْ سَلَمَةَ بْنِ الْخَنَّاطِ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَ نزل به الرُّوحُ الْأَمِينُ عَلى قَلْبِكَ لِتَكُونَ مِنَ الْمُنْذِرِينَ بِلِسَانٍ عَرَبِي مُبِينٍ قَالَ هِيَ الْوَلَايَةُ لِأَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ.
thaqalaynSanad: 5. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin saeed, from one of his companions, from Hanan Bin Sadeyr, from Salama Bin Al Hannat, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Mighty and Majestic: "The Trustworthy Spirit descended with it [26:193] Upon your heart for you to become from the warners [26:194] In clear Arabic language" [26:195].
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**It is the Wilayah of Amir Al-Momineen (a.s.).**"

chapter: Chapter 8: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Specialised the Imams (a.s.) From Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), From the Wilayah of the Prophets for Them (a.s.) Regarding the Covenant and Others and What They (a.s.) Taught From That
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 6. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Al Abbas Bin Marouf, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Hanan Bin Sadeyr, from Salim, from Abu Muhammad who said: 'I said to Abu Ja'far (a.s.), "Inform me about the Wilayah, did Jibraeel (a.s.) descended with it from the Presence of Lord (a.z.w.j.) of the worlds on the day of Al-Ghadeer?" He (a.s.) said: "**'The Trustworthy Spirit descended with it [26:193] Upon your heart for you to become from the warners [26:194] In clear Arabic language [26:195]. And surely it is in the Scriptures of the former ones' [26:196]. It is the Wilayah of Amir Al-Momineen (a.s.).**"
arabicText: 6- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ عَنِ الْعَبَّاسِ بْنِ مَعْرُوفِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبِ عَنْ حَنَانِ بْنِ سَدِيرٍ عَنْ سَالِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع أَخْبِرْنِي عَنِ الْوَلَايَةِ أَنَزَلَ بِمَا جَبْرَئِيلُ مِنْ عِنْدِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ يَوْمَ الْعَدِيرِ فَقَالَ نَزَلَ بِهِ الرُّوحُ الْأَمِينُ عَلى قَلْبِكَ لِتَكُونَ مِنَ الْمُنْذِرِينَ بِلِسَانٍ عَرَبِي مُبِينٍ وَ إِنَّهُ لَفِي زُبُرِ الْأَوَّلِينَ قَالَ هِيَ الْوَلَايَةُ لِأَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ.
thaqalaynSanad: 6. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Al Abbas Bin Marouf, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Hanan Bin Sadeyr, from Salim, from Abu Muhammad who said: 'I said to Abu Ja'far (a.s.), "Inform me about the Wilayah, did Jibraeel (a.s.) descended with it from the Presence of Lord (a.z.w.j.) of the worlds on the day of Al-Ghadeer?"
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**'The Trustworthy Spirit descended with it [26:193] Upon your heart for you to become from the warners [26:194] In clear Arabic language [26:195]. And surely it is in the Scriptures of the former ones' [26:196]. It is the Wilayah of Amir Al-Momineen (a.s.).**"

chapter: Chapter 8: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Specialised the Imams (a.s.) From Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), From the Wilayah of the Prophets for Them (a.s.) Regarding the Covenant and Others and What They (a.s.) Taught From That
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 7. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Ibn Ameyra, from Al Hazramy, from Huzeyfa Bin Aseyd who said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: "**The Prophet-hood of a Prophet (a.s.) was not completed in the (realm of the) particles until it was presented to him (a.s.), my Wilayah and Wilayah of People (a.s.) of my Household, and they (a.s.) were resembled for him (a.s.), so he (a.s.) (had to) acknowledge with obeying them (a.s.) and being in their (a.s.) Wilayah.**"
arabicText: 7- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنِ ابْنِ عَمِيرَهُ عَنْ الْحَضْرَمِي عَنْ حُذَيْفَةَ بْنِ أَسِيدٍ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَا تَكَامَلَتِ النُّبُوَّهُ لِنَبِيَّ فِي الْأَظِلَّةِ حَتَّى عُرِضَتْ عَلَيْهِ وَلَا يَنِي وَ وَلَايَةٌ أَهْلِ بَيْنِي وَ مَثْلُوا لَهُ فَأَقَرُّوا بِطَاعَتِهِمْ وَ وَلَا يَتِهِمْ.
thaqalaynSanad: 7. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Ibn Ameyra, from Al Hazramy, from Huzeyfa Bin Aseyd who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: "**The Prophet-hood of a Prophet (a.s.) was not completed in the (realm of the) particles until it was presented to him (a.s.), my Wilayah and Wilayah of People (a.s.) of my Household, and they (a.s.) were resembled for him (a.s.), so he (a.s.) (had to) acknowledge with obeying them (a.s.) and being in their (a.s.) Wilayah.**"'

chapter: Chapter 8: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Specialised the Imams (a.s.) From Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), From the Wilayah of the Prophets for Them (a.s.) Regarding the Covenant and Others and What They (a.s.) Taught From That
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 8. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Safwan Bin Yahya and Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Safwan, from Ibn Muskan, from Hujr Bin Zaida, from Humran, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted: "**Say: O People of the Book! You wouldn't be upon anything until you observe the Torah and the Evangel and what is Revealed to you from your Lord**" [5:68]. He (a.s.) said: "**It is the Wilayah of Amir Al-Momineen (a.s.).**"
arabicText: 8- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ يَحْيَى وَ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ عَنِ ابْنِ مُسْكَانَ عَنْ حُجْرِ بْنِ زَائِدَةً عَنْ حُمْرَانَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالى يا أَهْلَ الْكِتَابِ لَسْتُمْ عَلَى شَيْءٍ حَتَّى تُقِيمُوا التَّوْرَاة وَالْإِنجِيلَ وَ ما أُنْزِلَ إِلَيْكُمْ مِنْ رَبِّكُمْ وَ لَيَزِيدَنَّ كَثِيراً مِنْهُمْ مَا أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ مِنْ رَبِّكَ طُغْياناً وَكُفْراً قَالَ هِيَ وَلَايَةُ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ع.
thaqalaynSanad: 8. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Safwan Bin Yahya and Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Safwan, from Ibn Muskan, from Hujr Bin Zaida, from Humran, from Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted: "Say: O People of the Book! You wouldn't be upon anything until you observe the Torah and the Evangel and what is Revealed to you from your Lord" [5:68].
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**It is the Wilayah of Amir Al-Momineen (a.s.).**"

chapter: Chapter 8: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Specialised the Imams (a.s.) From Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), From the Wilayah of the Prophets for Them (a.s.) Regarding the Covenant and Others and What They (a.s.) Taught From That
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 9. It is narrated to us by Abu Al Jowza, from Al Husayn Bin Ulwan, from Sa'ad Bin Tareyf who said, 'Abu Ja'far (a.s.) said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: '**Indeed! Jibraeel (a.s.) came to me and said: "O Muhammad (s.a.w.a.)! Your Lord (a.z.w.j.) Commands you with loving Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) and Commands you with his Wilayah."**'
arabicText: 9- حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْجَوْزَاءِ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عُلْوَانَ عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ طَرِيفٍ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص أَلَا إِنَّ جَبْرَئِيلَ أَتَانِي فَقَالَ يَا مُحَمَّدُ رَبُّكَ يَأْمُرُكَ يَحْبُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ وَ يَأْمُرُكَ بِوَلَا يَتِهِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 9. It is narrated to us by Abu Al Jowza, from Al Husayn Bin Ulwan, from Sa'ad Bin Tareyf who said,
thaqalaynMatn: 'Abu Ja'far (a.s.) said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: '**Indeed! Jibraeel (a.s.) came to me and said: "O Muhammad (s.a.w.a.)! Your Lord (a.z.w.j.) Commands you with loving Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) and Commands you with his Wilayah."**'

chapter: Chapter 9: Another Regarding Wilayah of the Imams (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. It is narrated to us by Al Sindy Bin Muhammad, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from Abdul A'ala who said, 'Abu Abdullah (a.s.) said: '**A Prophet was not Made a Prophet at all except by recognising our rights and our merits over the ones besides us**.'
arabicText: 1- حَدَّثَنَا السَّنْدِيُّ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ يَعْقُوبَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع مَا نُبِّي نَبِيٌّ قَطُّ إِلَّا بِمَعْرِفَةِ حَقْنَا وَ بِفَضْلِنَا عَلَى مَنْ سِوَانًا.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. It is narrated to us by Al Sindy Bin Muhammad, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from Abdul A'ala who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Abu Abdullah (a.s.) said: '**A Prophet was not Made a Prophet at all except by recognising our rights and our merits over the ones besides us**.'

chapter: Chapter 9: Another Regarding Wilayah of the Imams (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 2. It is narrated to us by Ali Bin Ismail, from Muhammad Bin Amro, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from Abdul A'ala, from Abu Baseer who said, 'I heard Abu Abdullah (a.s.) saying: '**There is none from a Prophet Made a Prophet, nor from a Messenger Made a Messenger except by our Wilayah, and by our grace from the ones besides us**.'
arabicText: 2- حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ يَعْقُوبَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع يَقُولُ مَا مِنْ نَبِيَّ نُبِّئُ وَ لا مِنْ رَسُولٍ أُرْسِلَ إِلَّا بِوَلَا يَتِنَا وَ بِفَضْلِنَا عَمَّنْ سِوَانًا.
thaqalaynSanad: 2. It is narrated to us by Ali Bin Ismail, from Muhammad Bin Amro, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from Abdul A'ala, from Abu Baseer who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I heard Abu Abdullah (a.s.) saying: '**There is none from a Prophet Made a Prophet, nor from a Messenger Made a Messenger except by our Wilayah, and by our grace from the ones besides us**.'

chapter: Chapter 9: Another Regarding Wilayah of the Imams (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 3. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from Abu Baseer, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said: '**There is none from a Prophet Made to be a Prophet, nor a Messenger Sent, except with our Wilayah and our superiority over the ones besides us**.'
arabicText: 3- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِيسَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ يَعْقُوبَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللهِ ع قَالَ: مَا مِنْ نَبِيَّ نُبِّي وَ لَا مِنْ رَسُولِ أُرْسِلَ إِلَّا بِوَلَا يَتِنَا وَ تَفْضِيلِنَا عَلَى مَنْ سِوَانًا.
thaqalaynSanad: 3. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from Abu Baseer,
thaqalaynMatn: 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said: '**There is none from a Prophet Made to be a Prophet, nor a Messenger Sent, except with our Wilayah and our superiority over the ones besides us**.'

chapter: Chapter 9: Another Regarding Wilayah of the Imams (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 4. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from Abdul A'ala who said, 'I heard Abu Abdullah (a.s.) saying: '**No Prophet was Made a Prophet at all except with recognition of our rights, and our merits over the ones besides us**.'
arabicText: 4- حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ يَعْقُوبَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللهِ ع يَقُولُ ما تنبأ ني قط إِلَّا بِمَعْرِفَةِ حَقْنَا وَ بِفَضْلِنَا عَلَى مَنْ سِوَانًا.
thaqalaynSanad: 4. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from Abdul A'ala who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I heard Abu Abdullah (a.s.) saying: '**No Prophet was Made a Prophet at all except with recognition of our rights, and our merits over the ones besides us**.'

chapter: Chapter 9: Another Regarding Wilayah of the Imams (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 5. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from Abu Baseer, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said: '**There is none from a Prophet Made to be a Prophet, nor from a Messenger Sent with a Message except by our Wilayah, and our merits over the ones besides us**.'
arabicText: 5- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِيسَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ يَعْقُوبَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللهِ ع أَنَّهُ قَالَ : مَا مِنْ نَبِيَّ نَبِّي وَ لَا مِنْ رَسُولٍ أُرْسِلَ إِلَّا بِوَلا يَتِنَا وَ بِفَضْلِنَا عَلَى مَنْ سِوَانًا.
thaqalaynSanad: 5. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from Abu Baseer,
thaqalaynMatn: 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said: '**There is none from a Prophet Made to be a Prophet, nor from a Messenger Sent with a Message except by our Wilayah, and our merits over the ones besides us**.'

chapter: Chapter 9: Another Regarding Wilayah of the Imams (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 6. It is narrated to us by Ibn Yazeed, from Yahya Bin al Mubarik, from Ibn Jabala, from Humeyd Bin Shuayb, from Jabir who said, 'Abu Ja'far (a.s.) said: '**Our Wilayah is Wilayah of Allah which no Prophet was Sent except with it**.'
arabicText: 6- حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ يَزِيدَ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ الْمُبَارَكِ عَنِ ابْنِ حَبَلَةَ عَنْ حُمَيْدِ بْنِ شُعَيْبٍ عَنْ جَابِرٍ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ع وَلَا يَتُنَا وَلَايَةُ اللَّهِ الَّتِي لَمْ يَبْعَثْ نَبِيَا قَطُّ إِلَّا بنا
thaqalaynSanad: 6. It is narrated to us by Ibn Yazeed, from Yahya Bin al Mubarik, from Ibn Jabala, from Humeyd Bin Shuayb, from Jabir who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Abu Ja'far (a.s.) said: '**Our Wilayah is Wilayah of Allah which no Prophet was Sent except with it**.'

chapter: Chapter 9: Another Regarding Wilayah of the Imams (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 7. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Wuheyb Bin Hafs, from Abu Baseer who said, 'Abu Ja'far (a.s.) said: '**Our Wilayah is the Wilayah of Allah which Allah did not Send any Prophet at all except with it**.'
arabicText: 7- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ وُهَيْبِ بْنِ حَفْصٍ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ع وَلَا يَتُنَا وَلَا يَهُ اللهِ الَّتِي لَمْ يَبْعَثِ اللَّهُ نَبِيًّا قَطُّ إِلَّا بِمَا.
thaqalaynSanad: 7. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Hussein, from Wuheyb Bin Hafs, from Abu Baseer who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Abu Ja'far (a.s.) said: '**Our Wilayah is the Wilayah of Allah which Allah did not Send any Prophet at all except with it**.'

chapter: Chapter 9: Another Regarding Wilayah of the Imams (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 8. It is narrated to us by Hamza Bin Ya'la, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Abu Hamza Al Sumali, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said: '**Our Wilayah is the Wilayah of Allah which Allah did not Send any Prophet at all except with it**.'
arabicText: 8- حَدَّثَنَا حَمْزَةُ بْنُ يَعْلَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفُضَيْلِ عَنْ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ الثَّمَانِي عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع أَنَّهُ قَالَ : وَلَا يَتُنَا وَلَايَةُ اللَّهِ الَّتِي لَمْ يَبْعَثْ نَبِيَّاً قَطُّ إِلَّا بِمَا.
thaqalaynSanad: 8. It is narrated to us by Hamza Bin Ya'la, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Abu Hamza Al Sumali,
thaqalaynMatn: 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said: '**Our Wilayah is the Wilayah of Allah which Allah did not Send any Prophet at all except with it**.'

chapter: Chapter 9: Another Regarding Wilayah of the Imams (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 9. It is narrated to us by Salama Bin Al Khattab, from Ali Bin Sayf Bin Ameyra, from Al Abbas Bin Aamir, from Ahmad Bin Rizq Al Gushany, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Rahman, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said: '**Our Wilayah is the Wilayah of Allah which Allah did not Send any Prophet at all except with it**.'
arabicText: 9- حَدَّثَنَا سَلَمَةُ بْنُ الْخَطَابِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ سَيْفِ بْنِ عَمِيرَةً عَنِ الْعَبَّاسِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ رِزْقِ الْعُشَانِي عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع أَنَّهُ قَالَ : وَلَا يَتُنَا وَلَا يَهُ اللَّهِ الَّتِي لَمْ يَبْعَثْ نَبِيا قَطُّ إِلَّا بِهَا.
thaqalaynSanad: 9. It is narrated to us by Salama Bin Al Khattab, from Ali Bin Sayf Bin Ameyra, from Al Abbas Bin Aamir, from Ahmad Bin Rizq Al Gushany, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Rahman,
thaqalaynMatn: 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said: '**Our Wilayah is the Wilayah of Allah which Allah did not Send any Prophet at all except with it**.'

chapter: Chapter 10: Another Regarding Wilayah of Amir Al Momineen (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. It is narrated to us by Ibn Marouf, from Sa'dan, from Sabbah Al Muzny, from Al Haris Bin Haseyr, from Habbat Al Arny who said, 'Amir Al-Momineen (a.s.) said: '**Allah Presented my Wilayah unto the inhabitants of the skies and to the inhabitants of the earth. It was accepted by the one who accepted, and denied by the one who denied. Yunus denied it, so Allah Imprisoned him in the belly of the whale until he acknowledged with it**.'
arabicText: 1- حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ مَعْرُوفٍ عَنْ سَعْدَانَ عَنْ صَبَاحٍ الْمُزَنِي عَنِ الْحَارِثِ بْنِ حَصِيرَةَ عَنْ حَبَّةَ الْعُرَنِي قَالَ قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَرَضَ وَلَا يَتِي عَلَى أَهْلِ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ عَلَى أَهْلِ الْأَرْضِ أَقرَّ بِمَا مَنْ أَقَرَّ وَ أَنْكَرَهَا مَنْ أَنْكَرَ أَنْكَرَهَا يُونُسُ فَحَبَسَهُ اللَّهُ فِي بَطْنِ الْحُوتِ حَتَّى أَقَرَّ بها.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. It is narrated to us by Ibn Marouf, from Sa'dan, from Sabbah Al Muzny, from Al Haris Bin Haseyr, from Habbat Al Arny who said,
thaqalaynMatn: 'Amir Al-Momineen (a.s.) said: '**Allah Presented my Wilayah unto the inhabitants of the skies and to the inhabitants of the earth. It was accepted by the one who accepted, and denied by the one who denied. Yunus denied it, so Allah Imprisoned him in the belly of the whale until he acknowledged with it**.'

chapter: Chapter 10: Another Regarding Wilayah of Amir Al Momineen (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 2. It is narrated to us by Muhammad bin Al Husayn, from Al Hakam Bin Miskeen, from Ishaq Bin Ammar, from a man, 'From Ja'far Bin Muhammad (a.s.) having said: 'Allah is Saying: **"Surely, We Presented the Entrustment to the skies, and the earth, and the mountains, but they refused to bear it and feared from it, and the human being bore it; he was unjust, ignorant"** [33:72]. He said: '**It is Wilayah of Ali Bin Abu Talib**.'
arabicText: 2- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنِ الْحَكَمِ بْنِ مِسْكِينِ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ رَجُلٍ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ ع قَالَ : إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَقُولُ إِنَّا عَرَضْنَا الْأَمَانَةَ عَلَى السَّماواتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَالْجِبَالِ فَأَبَيْنَ أَنْ يَحْمِلْنَهَا وَأَشْفَقْنَ مِنْهَا وَحَمَلَهَا الْإِنْسانُ إِنَّهُ كَانَ ظَلُومًا جَهُولًا قَالَ هِيَ وَلَا يَهُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ع.
thaqalaynSanad: 2. It is narrated to us by Muhammad bin Al Husayn, from Al Hakam Bin Miskeen, from Ishaq Bin Ammar, from a man, 'From Ja'far Bin Muhammad (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Allah is Saying: **"Surely, We Presented the Entrustment to the skies, and the earth, and the mountains, but they refused to bear it and feared from it, and the human being bore it; he was unjust, ignorant"** [33:72]. He said: '**It is Wilayah of Ali Bin Abu Talib**.'

chapter: Chapter 10: Another Regarding Wilayah of Amir Al Momineen (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 3. It is narrated to us by Ahmad bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Mufassal Bin Salih, from Jabir, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the Words of Allah Blessed and Exalted: **"Surely, We Presented the Entrustment to the skies, and the earth, and the mountains, but they refused to bear it and feared from it"** [33:72] - He said: '**The Wilayah. They refused to bear it disbelieving in it (out of stubbornness), and the human being bore it**; [33:72] and the human being who bore it was Abu so and so.'
arabicText: 3- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مُفَضْلِ بْنِ صَالِحٍ عَنْ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى إِنَّا عَرَضْنَا الْأَمَانَةَ عَلَى السَّماواتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَ الجِبالِ فَأَبَيْنَ أَنْ يَحْمِلْنَهَا وَأَشْفَقْنَ قَالَ الْوَلَايَةُ أَبَيْنَ أَنْ يَحْمِلْنَهَا كُفْراً بمَا وَحَمَلَهَا الْإِنْسانُ وَ الْإِنْسَانُ الَّذِي حَمَلَهَا أَبُو فُلَانٍ.
thaqalaynSanad: 3. It is narrated to us by Ahmad bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Mufassal Bin Salih, from Jabir, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the Words of Allah Blessed and Exalted: "Surely, We Presented the Entrustment to the skies, and the earth, and the mountains, but they refused to bear it and feared from it" [33:72] -
thaqalaynMatn: He said: '**The Wilayah. They refused to bear it disbelieving in it (out of stubbornness), and the human being bore it**; [33:72] and the human being who bore it was Abu so and so.'

chapter: Rare from Chapter 10 Regarding the Wilayah
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Abu Jameela, from Muhammad Al Halby. 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said: '**Allah Mighty and Majestic Presented our Wilayah to the people of the cities but none accepted it except the people of Al-Kufa**.'
arabicText: 1- أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَمِيلَةَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ الحَلَبِي عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللهِ ع قَالَ: إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَرَضَ وَلَا يَتَنَا عَلَى أَهْلِ الْأَمْصَارِ فَلَمْ يَقْبَلُهَا إِلَّا أَهْلُ الْكُوفَةِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Abu Jameela, from Muhammad Al Halby. 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: '**Allah Mighty and Majestic Presented our Wilayah to the people of the cities but none accepted it except the people of Al-Kufa**.'

chapter: Rare from Chapter 10 Regarding the Wilayah
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 2. It is narrated to us by Ibn Marouf, from Hammad, from Rabie, from Muhammad bin Muslim, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding Words of Allah Blessed and Exalted: **"And if they had observed the Torah and the Evangel and what was Revealed to them from their Lord"** [5:66] - it is the Wilayah.'
arabicText: 2- حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ مَعْرُوفٍ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنْ رِبْعِيُّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَالَى وَ لَوْ أَنَّهُمْ أَقَامُوا التَّوْرَاةَ وَ الْإِنْجِيلَ وَ مَا أُنْزِلَ إِلَيْهِمْ مِنْ رَبِّهِمْ قَالَ الْوَلَايَةُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 2. It is narrated to us by Ibn Marouf, from Hammad, from Rabie, from Muhammad bin Muslim, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding Words of Allah Blessed and Exalted: "And if they had observed the Torah and the Evangel and what was Revealed to them from their Lord" [5:66] -
thaqalaynMatn: it is the Wilayah.'

chapter: Rare from Chapter 10 Regarding the Wilayah
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 3. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, and someone else, from Muhammad in Al Fuzeyl, from Abu Hamza Al Sumali, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said: 'I said, "May I be sacrificed for you! The Shias are asking you about the interpretation of this Verse: **'What are they asking about? [78:1] About the Magnificent News'** [78:2]." He said: "**That is up to me. If I so desire to I shall inform them, and if I so Desire, I shall not inform them.**" Then he said: "But, I shall inform you of its interpretation... **It is regarding Amir Al-Momineen. It was so that Amir Al-Momineen was saying: 'There is no Sign of Allah Mighty and Majestic which is greater than Me, and there is no News of Allah greater than Mine, and my Wilayah had been presented unto the previous communities, but they refused to accept it.'**"
arabicText: 3- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ وَ غَيْرِهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفُضَيْلِ عَنْ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ الثَّمَالِي عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: قُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ إِنَّ الشَّيعَةَ يسْأَلُونَكَ عَنْ تَفْسِيرِ هَذِهِ الْآيَةِ عَمَّ يَتَسَاءَلُونَ عَنِ النَّبَإِ الْعَظِيمِ قَالَ فَقَالَ ذَلِكَ الَّتِي إِنْ شِئْتُ أَخْبَرْتُهُمْ وَ إِنْ شِئْتُ لَمْ أَخْبِرْهُمْ قَالَ فَقَالَ لَكِنِّي أُخْبِرُكَ بِتَفْسِيرِهَا قَالَ فَقُلْتُ عَمَّ يَتَسَاءَلُونَ قَالَ فَقَالَ هِيَ فِي أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ع قَالَ كَانَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَقُولُ مَا لِلَّهِ آيَةٌ أَكْبَرُ مِنِّي وَ لَا لِلَّهِ مِنْ نَبَإِ عَظِيمٍ أَعْظَمُ مِنِّي وَ لَقَدْ عُرِضَتْ وَلَا يَتِي عَلَى الْأُمَمِ الْمَاضِيَةِ فَأَبَتْ أَنْ تَقْبَلَهَا قَالَ قُلْتُ لَهُ قُلْ هُوَ نَبَاً عَظِيمٌ أَنْتُمْ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضُونَ قَالَ هُوَ وَ اللَّهِ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ع.
thaqalaynSanad: 3. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, and someone else, from Muhammad in Al Fuzeyl, from Abu Hamza Al Sumali, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I said, "May I be sacrificed for you! The Shias are asking you about the interpretation of this Verse: **'What are they asking about? [78:1] About the Magnificent News'** [78:2]." He said: "**That is up to me. If I so desire to I shall inform them, and if I so Desire, I shall not inform them.**" Then he said: "But, I shall inform you of its interpretation... **It is regarding Amir Al-Momineen. It was so that Amir Al-Momineen was saying: 'There is no Sign of Allah Mighty and Majestic which is greater than Me, and there is no News of Allah greater than Mine, and my Wilayah had been presented unto the previous communities, but they refused to accept it.'**"'

chapter: Rare from Chapter 10 Regarding the Wilayah
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 4. It is narrated to us by Ibn Yazeed, from Ibn Sinan, from Uteyba Baya Al Qasab, from Abu Baseer who said, 'I heard Abu Abdullah (a.s.) saying: '**Our Wilayah was Presented to the skies and the earth and the mountains and the cities. None accepted it (like) the acceptance of the people of Al-Kufa**.'
arabicText: 4- حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ يَزِيدَ عَنِ ابْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ عُتَيْبَةَ بَيَّاعِ الْقَصَبِ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع يَقُولُ إِنَّ وَلَا يَتَنَا عُرِضَتْ عَلَى السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضِ وَ الْجِبَالِ وَ الْأَمْصَارِ مَا قَبِلَهَا قَبُولَ أَهْلِ الْكُوفَةِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 4. It is narrated to us by Ibn Yazeed, from Ibn Sinan, from Uteyba Baya Al Qasab, from Abu Baseer who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'I heard Abu Abdullah (a.s.) saying: '**Our Wilayah was Presented to the skies and the earth and the mountains and the cities. None accepted it (like) the acceptance of the people of Al-Kufa**.'

chapter: Rare from Chapter 10 Regarding the Wilayah
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 5. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Aamir, from Abu Abdullah Al Barqy, from Al Husayn Bin Usman, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Abu Hamiza who said, 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about Words of Allah Blessed and Exalted: **"and the one who commits Kufr with the Eman his work would be confiscated, and in the Hereafter he would be of the losers"** [5:5]. He said: '**Its interpretation in the esoteric of the Quran means ones who disbelieves (commits Kufr) with the Wilayah of Ali, and Ali, he is the Eman**.' I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about Words of Allah the Exalted: **"and the Kafir has always been a backer against his Lord"** [25:55]. He said: '**Its interpretation upon esoteric of the Quran means Ali, he is his lord regarding the Wilayah and the obedience, and the Lord, He is the Creator Who cannot be described**.' And Abu Ja'far (a.s.) said: '**Ali is a Sign for Muhammad, and that Muhammad called to the Wilayah of Ali.**'
arabicText: 5- حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عَامِرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْبَرْقِي عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفُضَيْلِ عَنْ أَبِي حَمْزَهُ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَالَى وَ مَنْ يَكْفُرْ بِالْإِيمَانِ فَقَدْ حَبِطَ عَمَلُهُ وَ هُوَ فِي الْآخِرَةِ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ قَالَ تَفْسِيرُهَا فِي بَطْنِ الْقُرْآنِ يَعْنِي مَنْ يَكْفُرْ بِوَلَايَةِ عَلِيَّ وَ عَلِيٌّ هُوَ الْإِيمَانُ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى وَكَانَ الْكَافِرُ عَلَى رَبِّهِ ظَهِيراً قَالَ تَفْسِيرُهَا عَلَى بَطْنِ الْقُرْآنِ يَعْنِي عَلِيٌّ هُوَ رَبُّهُ فِي الْوَلَايَةِ وَ الطَّاعَةِ وَ الرَّبُّ هوَ الْخَالِقُ الَّذِي لَا يُوصَفُ وَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ع إِنَّ عَلِيَا آيَةٌ لِمُحَمَّدٍ وَ إِنَّ مُحَمَّداً يَدْعُو إِلَى وَلَايَةِ عَلِيَّ.
thaqalaynSanad: 5. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Aamir, from Abu Abdullah Al Barqy, from Al Husayn Bin Usman, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzeyl, from Abu Hamiza who said,
thaqalaynMatn: 'I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about Words of Allah Blessed and Exalted: **"and the one who commits Kufr with the Eman his work would be confiscated, and in the Hereafter he would be of the losers"** [5:5]. He said: '**Its interpretation in the esoteric of the Quran means ones who disbelieves (commits Kufr) with the Wilayah of Ali, and Ali, he is the Eman**.' I asked Abu Ja'far (a.s.) about Words of Allah the Exalted: **"and the Kafir has always been a backer against his Lord"** [25:55]. He said: '**Its interpretation upon esoteric of the Quran means Ali, he is his lord regarding the Wilayah and the obedience, and the Lord, He is the Creator Who cannot be described**.' And Abu Ja'far (a.s.) said: '**Ali is a Sign for Muhammad, and that Muhammad called to the Wilayah of Ali.**'

chapter: Chapter 11: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Took as Covenant of the Momineen for the Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) with the Wilayah, and Created Them from His Noor, and Dyed Them from His Mercy, and They are Looking Through the Noor of Allah
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Isa, from Suleyman Al Ja'fari who said, 'I was in the presence of Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.). He said: '**O Suleyman! Fear the insight of the Momin for he looks by the Noor of Allah**.' I was silent until I achieved privacy, so I said, 'May I be sacrificed for you! I heard you saying: "Fear the insight of the Momineen for he looks by the Noor of Allah"?' He said: '**Yes, O Suleyman! Allah Created the Momin from His Noor, and Dyed them in His Mercy, and Took their Covenant for us with the Wilayah; and the Momin is a brother of the Momin of his father and his mother. His father is the Noor and his mother is the Mercy. And rather, he looks by that Noor which he has been Created from**.'
arabicText: 1- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِيسَى عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ الْجَعْفَرِي قَالَ: كُنتُ عِنْدَ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ع قَالَ يَا سُلَيْمَانُ اتَّقِ فِرَاسَةَ الْمُؤْمِنِ فَإِنَّهُ يَنْظُرُ بِنُورِ اللَّهِ فسَكَتَ حَتَّى أَصَبْتُ حَلْوَةً فَقُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ سَمِعْتُكَ تَقُولُ اتَّقِ فِرَاسَةَ الْمُؤْمِنِ فَإِنَّهُ يَنظُرُ بِنُورِ اللَّهِ قَالَ نَعَمْ يَا سُلَيْمَانُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ خَلَقَ الْمُؤْمِنَ مِنْ نُورِهِ وَ صَبَغَهُمْ فِي رَحْمَتِهِ وَ أَخَذَ مِيثَاقَهُمْ لَنَا بِالْوَلَايَةِ وَ الْمُؤْمِنُ أَخو الْمُؤْمِن لِأَبِيهِ وَ أُمِّهِ أَبُوهُ النُّورُ وَ أُمُّهُ الرَّحْمَةُ وَ إِنَّمَا يَنظُرُ بِذَلِكَ النُّورِ الَّذِي خُلِقَ مِنْهُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Isa, from Suleyman Al Ja'fari who said, 'I was in the presence of Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.). He said:
thaqalaynMatn: '**O Suleyman! Fear the insight of the Momin for he looks by the Noor of Allah**.' I was silent until I achieved privacy, so I said, 'May I be sacrificed for you! I heard you saying: "Fear the insight of the Momineen for he looks by the Noor of Allah"?' He said: '**Yes, O Suleyman! Allah Created the Momin from His Noor, and Dyed them in His Mercy, and Took their Covenant for us with the Wilayah; and the Momin is a brother of the Momin of his father and his mother. His father is the Noor and his mother is the Mercy. And rather, he looks by that Noor which he has been Created from**.'

chapter: Chapter 11: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Took as Covenant of the Momineen for the Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) with the Wilayah, and Created Them from His Noor, and Dyed Them from His Mercy, and They are Looking Through the Noor of Allah
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 2. It is narrated to us by Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Muawiya, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman, from his father, from Isa Bin Aslam, from Muawiya Bin Ammar who said, 'I said to Abu Abdullah (a.s.), "May I be sacrificed for you (a.s.)! This Hadeeth which I heard from you (a.s.), what is its interpretation?" He (a.s.) said: "And what is it?" He said, "'The Momin looks by the Noor of Allah (a.z.w.j.).'" He (a.s.) said: "**O Muawiya! Allah (a.z.w.j.) Created the Momineen from His Noor, and dyed them in His Mercy, and Took their Covenant for us (a.s.) with the Wilayah upon His (a.z.w.j.) Recognition on the day He (a.z.w.j.) Introduced Himself. Thus, the Momin is a brother of the Momin of this father and his mother. His father is the Noor and his mother the Mercy, and rather he looks with the Noor which he is Created from.**"
arabicText: 2- حَدَّثَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُعَاوِيَةَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عِيسَى بْنِ أَسْلَمَ عَنْ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ الَّذِي سَمِعْتُهُ مِنْكَ مَا تَفْسِيرُهُ قَالَ وَ مَا هُوَ قَالَ إِنَّ الْمُؤْمِنَ يَنْظُرُ بِنُورِ اللَّهِ فَقَالَ يَا مُعَاوِيَةُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ خَلَقَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ مِنْ نُورِهِ وَ صَبَغَهُمْ فِي رَحْمَتِهِ وَ أَخَذَ مِيثَاقَهُمْ لَنَا بِالْوَلَايَةِ عَلَى مَعْرِفَتِهِ يَوْمَ عَرَّفَهُمْ نَفْسَهُ فَالْمُؤْمِنُ أَخُو الْمُؤْمِنِ لِأَبِيهِ وَ أُمِّهِ أَبُوهُ النُّورُ وَ أُمُّهُ الرَّحْمَةُ وَ إِنَّمَا يَنْظُرُ بِذَلِكَ النُّورِ الَّذِي خُلِقَ مِنْهُ.
thaqalaynSanad: 2. It is narrated to us by Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Muawiya, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman, from his father, from Isa Bin Aslam, from Muawiya Bin Ammar who said: 'I said to Abu Abdullah (a.s.), "May I be sacrificed for you (a.s.)! This Hadeeth which I heard from you (a.s.), what is its interpretation?" He (a.s.) said: "And what is it?" He said, "'The Momin looks by the Noor of Allah (a.z.w.j.).'"
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**O Muawiya! Allah (a.z.w.j.) Created the Momineen from His Noor, and dyed them in His Mercy, and Took their Covenant for us (a.s.) with the Wilayah upon His (a.z.w.j.) Recognition on the day He (a.z.w.j.) Introduced Himself. Thus, the Momin is a brother of the Momin of this father and his mother. His father is the Noor and his mother the Mercy, and rather he looks with the Noor which he is Created from.**"

chapter: Chapter 11: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Took as Covenant of the Momineen for the Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) with the Wilayah, and Created Them from His Noor, and Dyed Them from His Mercy, and They are Looking Through the Noor of Allah
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 3. It is narrated to us by Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman, from his father, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said: "**Allah (a.z.w.j.) Made Shias for us (a.s.), Making them from His Noor, and Dyed them in His Mercy, and Took their Covenant for us (a.s.) with the Wilayah upon His (a.z.w.j.) Recognition on the day He (a.z.w.j.) Introduced Himself. He (a.z.w.j.) is the Accepter from their good deeds, and the Overlooker from their evil deeds. One who does not meet Allah (a.z.w.j.) with what he is upon, a good deed would not be Accepted from him, and an evil deed would not be Overlooked from him.**"
arabicText: 3- حَدَّثَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: إِنَّ اللَّهَ جَعَلَ لَنَا شِيعَةً فَجَعَلَهُمْ مِنْ نُورِهِ وَ صَبَغَهُمْ فِي رَحْمَتِهِ وَ أَخَذَ مِيثَاقَهُمْ لَنَا بِالْوَلايَةِ عَلَى مَعْرِفَتِهِ يَوْمَ عَرَّفَهُمْ نَفْسَهُ فَهُوَ الْمُتَقَبِّلُ مِنْ مُحْسِنِهِمُ الْمُتَحَاوِرُ عَنْ مُسِينِهِمْ مَنْ لَمْ يَلْقَ اللهَ مَا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ لَمْ يَتَقَبَّلْ مِنْهُ حَسَنَةٌ وَ لَمْ يَتَجَاوَزُ عَنْهُ سَيِّئَةً.
thaqalaynSanad: 3. It is narrated to us by Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman, from his father, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: "**Allah (a.z.w.j.) Made Shias for us (a.s.), Making them from His Noor, and Dyed them in His Mercy, and Took their Covenant for us (a.s.) with the Wilayah upon His (a.z.w.j.) Recognition on the day He (a.z.w.j.) Introduced Himself. He (a.z.w.j.) is the Accepter from their good deeds, and the Overlooker from their evil deeds. One who does not meet Allah (a.z.w.j.) with what he is upon, a good deed would not be Accepted from him, and an evil deed would not be Overlooked from him.**"

chapter: Chapter 12: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Took, Covenants of the Creatures for the Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) with the Wilayah for Them (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Salih Bin Uqba, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad Al Jufy, from Abu Ja'far, from Uqba, 'Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said: '**Allah (a.z.w.j.) Created the creatures. He Created the one He Loved from what He Loved, and Loved that He Creates him from the clay of Paradise. And He Created the one He Hated from what He Hated, and what He Hated was that He Creates him from the clay of the Fire. Then He Sent them into the shadows'**. He (the narrator) said, 'I said, 'Which thing is the shadows?' He (a.s.) said: '**Do you not see when there is a shadow of something in the sun, and it isn't anything? Then He Sent the Prophets (a.s.) among them, calling them to the acknowledgment with Allah (a.z.w.j.), and it is His Word: "And if you were to ask them who created them, they would certainly say, 'Allah'" [43:87]. Then He Called them to the acknowledgment with the Prophets (a.s.). Some of them acknowledged and some of them denied. Then He Called them to our Wilayah (a.s.), so by Allah, he acknowledged with it the One He Loved, and he denied it, one He Hated, and it is His Word: "but they did not believe due to what they had belied with from before" [10:74]**.' Then Abu Ja'far (a.s.) said: '**The Belying was from then.**'
arabicText: 1- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنْ صَالِحٍ بْنِ عُقْبَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْجُعْفِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَنْ عُقْبَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: إِنَّ اللَّهَ خَلَقَ الخَلْق فَخَلَقَ مَنْ أَحَبُّ مَا أَحَبُّ وَكَانَ أَحَبَّ أَنْ يَخْلُقَهُ مِنْ طِينَةِ الجَنَّةِ وَ خَلَقَ مَنْ أَبْغَضَ مِمَّا أَبْغَضَ وَكَانَ مَا أَبْغَضَ أَنْ يَخْلُقَهُ مِنْ طِينَةٍ النار ثُمَّ بَعَثَهُمْ فِي الظُّلالِ قَالَ قُلْتُ أَيُّ شَيْءٍ الظُّلَالُ قَالَ أَلَمْ تَرَ إِذَا ظُللَ فِي الشَّمْسِ شَيْءٌ وَ لَيْسَ بِشَيْءٍ ثُمَّ بَعَثَ فِيهِمُ النَّبِيِّينَ يَدْعُونَهُمْ إِلَى الْإِقْرَارِ بِاللَّهِ وَ هُوَ قَوْلُهُ وَ لَئِنْ سَأَلْتَهُمْ مَنْ خَلَقَهُمْ لَيَقُولُنَّ اللَّهُ ثُمَّ دَعَاهُمْ إِلَى الْإِقْرَارِ بِالنَّبِيِّينَ فَأَقَرَّ بَعْضُهُمْ وَ أَنْكَرَ بَعْضُهُمْ ثُمَّ دَعَاهُمْ إِلَى وَلَا يَتِنَا فَأَقَرَّ وَ اللَّهِ بِمَا مَنْ أَحَبَّ وَ أَنْكَرَهَا مَنْ أَبْغَضَ وَ هُوَ قَوْلُهُ فَما كانُوا لِيُؤْمِنُوا بِمَا كَذَّبُوا بِهِ مِنْ قَبْلُ ثُمَّ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ع كَانَ التَّكْذِيبُ ثَمَّةَ.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Salih Bin Uqba, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad Al Jufy, from Abu Ja'far, from Uqba, 'Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: '**Allah (a.z.w.j.) Created the creatures. He Created the one He Loved from what He Loved, and Loved that He Creates him from the clay of Paradise. And He Created the one He Hated from what He Hated, and what He Hated was that He Creates him from the clay of the Fire. Then He Sent them into the shadows'**. He (the narrator) said, 'I said, 'Which thing is the shadows?' He (a.s.) said: '**Do you not see when there is a shadow of something in the sun, and it isn't anything? Then He Sent the Prophets (a.s.) among them, calling them to the acknowledgment with Allah (a.z.w.j.), and it is His Word: "And if you were to ask them who created them, they would certainly say, 'Allah'" [43:87]. Then He Called them to the acknowledgment with the Prophets (a.s.). Some of them acknowledged and some of them denied. Then He Called them to our Wilayah (a.s.), so by Allah, he acknowledged with it the One He Loved, and he denied it, one He Hated, and it is His Word: "but they did not believe due to what they had belied with from before" [10:74]**.' Then Abu Ja'far (a.s.) said: '**The Belying was from then.**'

chapter: Chapter 12: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Took, Covenants of the Creatures for the Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) with the Wilayah for Them (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 2. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Al Husayn Bin Nueym Al Sahhaf who said, 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted: "so from you is a Kafir and from you is a Momin" [64:2]. He (a.s.) said: "**By Allah! And Allah (a.z.w.j.) Recognised their Eman by their Wilayah for us (a.s.), and their Kufr with it on the day Allah (a.z.w.j.) took the Covenant upon them in the lineage of Adam (a.s.) and they were particles.**"
arabicText: 2- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبِ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ نُعَيمِ الصَّحَافِ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللهِ ع عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَالَى فَمِنْكُمْ كَافِرٌ و مِنْكُمْ مُؤْمِنٌ فَقَالَ عَرَفَ اللَّهُ وَ اللَّهِ إِيمَانَهُمْ بِوَلَا يَتِنَا وَكُفْرَهُمْ بِمَا يَوْمَ أَخَذَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمُ الْمِيثَاقَ فِي صُلْبِ آدَمَ وَ هُمْ ذُرّ.
thaqalaynSanad: 2. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Al Husayn Bin Nueym Al Sahhaf who said: 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted: "so from you is a Kafir and from you is a Momin" [64:2].
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**By Allah! And Allah (a.z.w.j.) Recognised their Eman by their Wilayah for us (a.s.), and their Kufr with it on the day Allah (a.z.w.j.) took the Covenant upon them in the lineage of Adam (a.s.) and they were particles.**"

chapter: Chapter 12: What Allah (a.z.w.j.) Took, Covenants of the Creatures for the Imams (a.s.) of Progeny (a.s.) of Muhammad (s.a.w.a.) with the Wilayah for Them (a.s.)
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 3. It is narrated to us by Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, and Muhammad Bin Jamhour, from Abdullah Bin Abdul Rahman, from Al Haysam Bin Waqid, from Abu Yusuf Al Bazaz, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.), he (the narrator) said, 'Abu Abdullah (a.s.) recited to us this Verse: "Therefore remember the Favour of Allah" [7:74]. He (a.s.) said: "**Do you know what is the Favour of Allah?**" I said, 'No'. He (a.s.) said: "**It is the most magnificent Bounty of Allah (a.z.w.j.) upon His creatures, and it is our Wilayah (a.s.).**"
arabicText: 3- حَدَّثَنَا الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جُمْهُورٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنِ الهَيْثَمِ بْنِ وَاقِدٍ عَنْ أَبِي يُوسُفَ الْبَزَّازِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: تَلَا عَلَيْنَا أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع هَذِهِ الْآيَةَ فَاذْكُرُوا آلاء اللَّهِ قَالَ أَتَدْرِي مَا آلَاءُ اللَّهِ قُلْتُ لَا قَالَ هِيَ أَعْظَمُ نِعَمِ اللَّهِ عَلَى خَلْقِهِ وَ هُوَ وَلَا يَتُنَا.
thaqalaynSanad: 3. It is narrated to us by Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, and Muhammad Bin Jamhour, from Abdullah Bin Abdul Rahman, from Al Haysam Bin Waqid, from Abu Yusuf Al Bazaz, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.), he (the narrator) said, 'Abu Abdullah (a.s.) recited to us this Verse: "Therefore remember the Favour of Allah" [7:74].
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**Do you know what is the Favour of Allah?**" I said, 'No'. He (a.s.) said: "**It is the most magnificent Bounty of Allah (a.z.w.j.) upon His creatures, and it is our Wilayah (a.s.).**"

chapter: Chapter 13: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), They (a.s.) are the Witnesses of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Among His (a.z.w.j.) Creatures with What is with Them (a.s.), From the Permissibles and the Prohibitions
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Ibrahim Bin Muhammad in the book of Bundar Bin Aasim, from Umar Bin Hanzala who said, 'I said to Abu Abdullah (a.s.), "And like that, We Made you (Imams) as an intermediary community in order for you (Imams) to become witnesses upon the people" [2:143]. He (a.s.) said: "**They are the Imams (a.s.).**"
arabicText: 1- حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ فِي كِتَابِ بُنْدَارَ بْنِ عَاصِمٍ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ حَنْظَلَةَ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع وَكَذَلِكَ جَعَلْنَاكُمْ أُمَّةً وسطاً لِتَكُونُوا شهداء عَلَى النَّاسِ قَالَ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ ع.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. It is narrated to us by Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Ibrahim Bin Muhammad in the book of Bundar Bin Aasim, from Umar Bin Hanzala who said: 'I said to Abu Abdullah (a.s.), "And like that, We Made you (Imams) as an intermediary community in order for you (Imams) to become witnesses upon the people" [2:143].
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**They are the Imams (a.s.).**"

chapter: Chapter 13: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), They (a.s.) are the Witnesses of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Among His (a.z.w.j.) Creatures with What is with Them (a.s.), From the Permissibles and the Prohibitions
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 3. It is narrated to us by Yaqoub Bin Yazeed, and Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Umar Bin Uzina, from Bureyd Bin Muawiya who said, 'I said to Abu Ja'far (a.s.), 'The Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted: "And like that, We Made you (Imams) as an intermediary community in order for you (Imams) to become witnesses upon the people" [2:143]'. He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the Intermediary Imams (a.s.), and we (a.s.) are the witnesses of Allah (a.z.w.j.) upon His Creatures, and His (a.z.w.j.) Divine Authorities in His earth.**"
arabicText: 3- حَدَّثَنَا يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ وَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ أَذَيْنَةَ عَنْ بُرَيْدِ بْنِ مُعَاوِيَةَ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع قَوْلُ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى وَ كذلِكَ جَعَلْنَاكُمْ أُمَّةً وَسَطاً لِتَكُونُوا شُهَداءَ عَلَى النَّاسِ قَالَ نَحْنُ الْأَئِمَّةُ الْوَسَطُ وَ نَحْنُ شُهَدَاءُ اللهِ عَلَى خَلْقِهِ وَ حُجَّتُهُ فِي أَرْضِهِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 3. It is narrated to us by Yaqoub Bin Yazeed, and Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Umar Bin Uzina, from Bureyd Bin Muawiya who said: 'I said to Abu Ja'far (a.s.), 'The Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) the Exalted: "And like that, We Made you (Imams) as an intermediary community in order for you (Imams) to become witnesses upon the people" [2:143]'.
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**We (a.s.) are the Intermediary Imams (a.s.), and we (a.s.) are the witnesses of Allah (a.z.w.j.) upon His Creatures, and His (a.z.w.j.) Divine Authorities in His earth.**"

chapter: Chapter 13: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), They (a.s.) are the Witnesses of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Among His (a.z.w.j.) Creatures with What is with Them (a.s.), From the Permissibles and the Prohibitions
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 4. It is narrated to us by this chain, from Ja'far Bin Bashir, from Amro Bin Abu Al Miqdam, from Maymun Al Ban, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted: "And like that, We Made you (Imams) as an intermediary community in order for you (Imams) to become witnesses upon the people" [2:143]. He (the narrator) said: 'Just, in order to be witnesses upon the people'. He (a.s.) said: "**The Imams (a.s.).**" He (a.s.) said: "**Upon the Imams (a.s.).**"
arabicText: 4- حَدَّثَنَا بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ بَشِيرٍ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ أَبِي الْمِقْدَامِ عَنْ مَيْمُونٍ الْبَانِ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى وَ كَذَلِكَ جَعَلْنَاكُمْ أُمَّةً وَسَطاً لِتَكُونُوا شُهَدَاءَ عَلَى النَّاسِ قَالَ عَدْلًا لِيَكُونُوا شُهَدَاءَ عَلَى النَّاسِ قَالَ الْأَئِمَّةُ وَ يَكُونَ الرَّسُولُ عَلَيْكُمْ شَهِيداً قَالَ عَلَى الْأَئِمَّةِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 4. It is narrated to us by this chain, from Ja'far Bin Bashir, from Amro Bin Abu Al Miqdam, from Maymun Al Ban, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) regarding the Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted: "And like that, We Made you (Imams) as an intermediary community in order for you (Imams) to become witnesses upon the people" [2:143]. He (the narrator) said: 'Just, in order to be witnesses upon the people'.
thaqalaynMatn: He (a.s.) said: "**The Imams (a.s.).**" He (a.s.) said: "**Upon the Imams (a.s.).**"

chapter: Chapter 13: Regarding the Imams (a.s.), They (a.s.) are the Witnesses of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Among His (a.z.w.j.) Creatures with What is with Them (a.s.), From the Permissibles and the Prohibitions
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 6. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al husayn Bin Saeed, from Hammad, from Ibrahim Bin Umar, from Suleym Bin Qays, 'From Amir Al-Momineen (a.s.) having said: '**Allah (a.z.w.j.) Cleaned us (a.s.) and Fortified us (a.s.) and made us (a.s.) as witnesses upon His (a.z.w.j.) creatures and His (a.z.w.j.) divine Authorities in His (a.z.w.j.) earth, and made us (a.s.) to be with the Quran and Made the Quran to be with us (a.s.). We (a.s.) will not separate from it and it will not separate from us (a.s.).**'
arabicText: 6- حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ عُمَرَ عَنْ سُلَيْمِ بْنِ قَيْسٍ عَنْ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ قَالَ: إِنَّ اللَّهَ طَهَّرَنَا وَ عَصَمَنَا وَ جَعَلَنَا شُهَدَاءَ عَلَى خَلْقِهِ وَحُجَّتَهُ فِي أَرْضِهِ وَ جَعَلَنَا مَعَ الْقُرْآنِ وَ جَعَلَ الْقُرْآنَ مَعَنَا لَا نُفَارِقُهُ وَ لَا يُفَارِقْنَا.
thaqalaynSanad: 6. It is narrated to us by Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al husayn Bin Saeed, from Hammad, from Ibrahim Bin Umar, from Suleym Bin Qays, 'From Amir Al-Momineen (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: '**Allah (a.z.w.j.) Cleaned us (a.s.) and Fortified us (a.s.) and made us (a.s.) as witnesses upon His (a.z.w.j.) creatures and His (a.z.w.j.) divine Authorities in His (a.z.w.j.) earth, and made us (a.s.) to be with the Quran and Made the Quran to be with us (a.s.). We (a.s.) will not separate from it and it will not separate from us (a.s.).**'

chapter: Chapter 14: Regarding Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.), He (s.a.w.a.) Recognised What He (s.a.w.a.) Had Seen in the (Realms of) the Shadows and the Particles, and Other
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 1. Ahmad Bin Muhammad and Yaqoub Bin Yazeed narrated, from al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Fazzal, from Abu Jameela, from Muhammad Bin Al Halby, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said: '**Allah (a.z.w.j.) Resembled for me my (s.a.w.a.) community in the clay, and Taught me (s.a.w.a.) their names, all of them, just as had He (a.z.w.j.) Taught Adam (a.s.) the names, all of them [2:31]. The bearers of the flags passed by me (s.a.w.a.) and I sought Forgiveness for Ali (a.s.) and his (a.s.) Shias.** My (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Promised me (s.a.w.a.) a quality regarding Shias of Ali (a.s.).' It was said, 'O Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.)! And what is it?' He (s.a.w.a.) said: '**The Forgiveness from them for the ones who believe and fear. Neither a small nor big (sin) from them would be left out, and for them the evil deeds would be replaced by the good deeds.**'
arabicText: 1- أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَمِيلَةَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحَلَبِي عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: إِنَّ اللَّهَ مَثْلَ لِي أُمَّنِي فِي الطِّينِ وَ عَلَّمَنِي أَسْمَاءَهُمْ كُلَّهَا كَمَا عَلَّمَ آدَمَ الْأَسْمَاءَ كُلَّهَا فَمَرَّ بِي أَصْحَابُ الرَّايَاتِ فَاسْتَغْفَرْتُ لِعَلِيَّ وَ شِيعَتِهِ إِنَّ رَبِّي وَعَدَنِي فِي شِيعَةِ عَلِيٌّ حَصْلَةً قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ وَ مَا هِيَ قَالَ الْمَغْفِرَةٌ مِنْهُمْ لِمَنْ آمَنَ وَ اتَّقَى لَا يُغَادِرُ مِنْهُمْ صَغِيرَةً و لَا كَبِيرَةً و لَهُمْ تُبَدَّلُ السَّيِّئَاتُ حَسَنَاتٍ.
thaqalaynSanad: 1. Ahmad Bin Muhammad and Yaqoub Bin Yazeed narrated, from al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Fazzal, from Abu Jameela, from Muhammad Bin Al Halby, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: '**Allah (a.z.w.j.) Resembled for me my (s.a.w.a.) community in the clay, and Taught me (s.a.w.a.) their names, all of them, just as had He (a.z.w.j.) Taught Adam (a.s.) the names, all of them [2:31]. The bearers of the flags passed by me (s.a.w.a.) and I (s.a.w.a.) sought Forgiveness for Ali (a.s.) and his (a.s.) Shias.** My (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.) Promised me (s.a.w.a.) a quality regarding Shias of Ali (a.s.).' It was said, 'O Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.)! And what is it?' He (s.a.w.a.) said: '**The Forgiveness from them for the ones who believe and fear. Neither a small nor big (sin) from them would be left out, and for them the evil deeds would be replaced by the good deeds.**'

chapter: Chapter 14: Regarding Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.), He (s.a.w.a.) Recognised What He (s.a.w.a.) Had Seen in the (Realms of) the Shadows and the Particles, and Other
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 2. Al Husayn Bin Mahboub narrated, from Salih Bin Sahl, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.): 'One of the Quraysh said to Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.), "By which thing do you (s.a.w.a.) precede the Prophets (a.s.) and you (s.a.w.a.) have been Sent as their end one and the last of them?" He (s.a.w.a.) said: "**I (s.a.w.a.) was the first one to acknowledge with my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.), and the first one to answer when Allah (a.z.w.j.) Took the Covenant of the Prophets (a.s.): and Made them testify against their own selves: 'Am I not your Lord?' They said, 'Yes, we testify' [7:172], and I (s.a.w.a.) was the first Prophet (a.s.) who said: 'Yes.' Thus, I (s.a.w.a.) preceded them (all) with the acknowledgment with Allah (a.z.w.j.).**"
arabicText: 2- الْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبِ عَنْ صَالِحٍ بْنِ سَهْلٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع إِنَّ بَعْضَ قُرَيْشٍ قَالَ لِرَسُولِ اللهِ ص بِأَيِّ شَيْءٍ سَبَقَتَ الْأَنْبِيَاءَ وَ أَنْتَ بُعِثْتَ آخِرَهُمْ وَ خَاتمهُمْ قَالَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ أَوَّلَ مَنْ أَقَرَّ بِرَبِّي وَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ أَجَابَ حَيْثُ أَحَذَ اللَّهُ مِيثَاقَ النَّبِيِّينَ وَ أَشْهَدَهُمْ عَلَى أَنْفُسِهِمْ أَلَسْتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ قَالُوا بَلَى وَ كُنْتُ أَنَا أَوَّلَ نَبِيِّ قَالَ بَلَى فَسَبَقْتُهُمْ بِالْإِقْرَارِ بِاللَّهِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 2. Al Husayn Bin Mahboub narrated, from Salih Bin Sahl, 'From Abu Abdullah (a.s.): 'One of the Quraysh said to Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.), "By which thing do you (s.a.w.a.) precede the Prophets (a.s.) and you (s.a.w.a.) have been Sent as their end one and the last of them?"
thaqalaynMatn: He (s.a.w.a.) said: "**I (s.a.w.a.) was the first one to acknowledge with my (s.a.w.a.) Lord (a.z.w.j.), and the first one to answer when Allah (a.z.w.j.) Took the Covenant of the Prophets (a.s.): and Made them testify against their own selves: 'Am I not your Lord?' They said, 'Yes, we testify' [7:172], and I (s.a.w.a.) was the first Prophet (a.s.) who said: 'Yes.' Thus, I (s.a.w.a.) preceded them (all) with the acknowledgment with Allah (a.z.w.j.).**"

chapter: Chapter 14: Regarding Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.), He (s.a.w.a.) Recognised What He (s.a.w.a.) Had Seen in the (Realms of) the Shadows and the Particles, and Other
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 4. It is narrated to us by Al Abbas Bin Marouf, from hammad Bin Isa, from Abu Al Jaroud, from Abu Baseer, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said one day, and in his (s.a.w.a.) presence was a group of his (s.a.w.a.) companions: "O Allah (a.z.w.j.)! My (s.a.w.a.) brothers have met me (s.a.w.a.) twice." The ones from his (s.a.w.a.) companions around him (s.a.w.a.) said, "Are we not your (s.a.w.a.) brothers, O Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.)?" He (s.a.w.a.) said: "**No, you are my (s.a.w.a.) companions, and my (s.a.w.a.) brothers are a people from the end of times. They will believe in me (s.a.w.a.) and they would not have seen me (s.a.w.a.). Allah (a.z.w.j.) Introduced them with their names and the names of their fathers from before He (a.z.w.j.) Extracted them from the lineages of their fathers and the wombs of their mothers. For each one of them, remaining upon his Religion would be more difficult than shaping a metal during the dark night or like grabbing upon the fiery ember. They are the lamps for the darkness. Allah (a.z.w.j.) will Save them from every Fitna of the darkness of the earth.**"
arabicText: 4- حَدَّثَنَا الْعَبَّاسُ بْنُ مَعْرُوفٍ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ أَبِي الْحَارُودِ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ص ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ وَ عِنْدَهُ جَمَاعَةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِهِ اللَّهُمَّ لَقَنِي إِخْوَانِي مَرَّتَيْنِ فَقَالَ مَنْ حَوْلَهُ مِنْ أَصْحَابِهِ أَمَا نَحْنُ إِخْوَانُكَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَ فَقَالَ لَا إِنَّكُمْ أَصْحَابِي وَ إِخْوَانِي قَوْمٌ مِنْ آخِرِ الزَّمَانِ آمَنُوا بِي وَ لَمْ يَرَوْنِي لَقَدْ عَرَّفَنِيهِمُ اللَّهُ بِأَسْمَائِهِمْ وَ أَسْمَاءِ آبَائِهِمْ مِنْ قَبْلِ أَنْ يُخْرِجَهُمْ مِنْ أَصْلَابِ آبَائِهِمْ وَ أَرْحَامِ أُمَّهَاتِهِمْ لَأَحَدُهُمْ أَشَدُّ بَقِيَّةً عَلَى دِينِهِ مِنْ حَرْطِ الْقَتَادِ فِي اللَّيْلَةِ الظُّلْمَاءِ أَوْ كَالْقَابِض عَلَى جَمْرِ الْغَضَا أُولَئِكَ مَصَابِيحُ الدُّجَى يُنْجِيهِمُ اللَّهُ مِنْ كُلِّ فِتْنَةٍ غَيْرَاءَ مُظْلِمَةٍ.
thaqalaynSanad: 4. It is narrated to us by Al Abbas Bin Marouf, from hammad Bin Isa, from Abu Al Jaroud, from Abu Baseer, 'From Abu Ja'far (a.s.) having said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said one day, and in his (s.a.w.a.) presence was a group of his (s.a.w.a.) companions: "O Allah (a.z.w.j.)! My (s.a.w.a.) brothers have met me (s.a.w.a.) twice." The ones from his (s.a.w.a.) companions around him (s.a.w.a.) said, "Are we not your (s.a.w.a.) brothers, O Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.)?" He (s.a.w.a.) said: "**No, you are my (s.a.w.a.) companions, and my (s.a.w.a.) brothers are a people from the end of times. They will believe in me (s.a.w.a.) and they would not have seen me (s.a.w.a.). Allah (a.z.w.j.) Introduced them with their names and the names of their fathers from before He (a.z.w.j.) Extracted them from the lineages of their fathers and the wombs of their mothers. For each one of them, remaining upon his Religion would be more difficult than shaping a metal during the dark night or like grabbing upon the fiery ember. They are the lamps for the darkness. Allah (a.z.w.j.) will Save them from every Fitna of the darkness of the earth.**"'

chapter: Chapter 14: Regarding Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.), He (s.a.w.a.) Recognised What He (s.a.w.a.) Had Seen in the (Realms of) the Shadows and the Particles, and Other
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 5. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Abdullah Jabalah, from Muawiya Bin Ammar, 'From Ja'far (a.s.), from his (a.s.) father (a.s.), from his (a.s.) grandfather (a.s.) who said: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: "O Ali (a.s.)! **My (s.a.w.a.) community had been resembled for me (s.a.w.a.) in the clay until I (s.a.w.a.) saw their young ones and their old ones as spirits before He (a.z.w.j.) Created the bodies, and I (s.a.w.a.) passed by you (a.s.) and your (a.s.) Shias, and I (s.a.w.a.) sought Forgiveness for you all (Shias).**" Ali (a.s.) said: "O Prophet (s.a.w.a.) of Allah (a.z.w.j.)! Increase for me (a.s.) regarding them." He (s.a.w.a.) said: "Yes, O Ali (a.s.)! **You (a.s.) and your (a.s.) Shias will emerge from their graves and their faces would be like the full moon on the night of the full moon, and the difficulties would have been relieved from you, and the grief(s) would be gone from you. You all will be shaded beneath the Throne. The people would fear and you will not be fearing, and the people would grieve, and you will not be grieving, and a meal would be placed for you while the people would be in the Reckoning.**"
arabicText: 5- حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ جَبَلَةَ عَنْ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ جَعْفَرٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ جَدِّهِ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص يَا عَلِيُّ لَقَدْ مُثْلَتْ لِي أُمَّتِي فِي الطِّينِ حَتَّى رَأَيْتُ صَغِيرَهُمْ وَكَبِيرَهُمْ أَرْوَاحاً قَبْلَ أَنْ يُخْلَقَ الْأَحْسَادُ وَ إِنِّي مَرَرْتُ بِكَ وَ بِشِيعَتِكَ فَاسْتَغْفَرْتُ لَكُمْ فَقَالَ عَلِيٌّ يَا نَبِيَّ اللَّهِ زِدْنِي فِيهِمْ قَالَ نَعَمْ يَا عَلِيٌّ تَخْرُجُ أَنْتَ وَ شِيعَتُكَ مِنْ قُبُورِهِمْ وَ وُجُوهُكُمْ كَالْقَمَرِ لَيْلَةَ الْبَدْرِ وَ قَدْ فُرحَتْ عَنْكُمُ الشَّدَائِدُ وَ ذَهَبَتْ عَنْكُمُ الْأَحْزَانُ تَسْتَظِلُّونَ تَحْتَ الْعَرْشِ يَخَافُ النَّاسُ وَ لَا تَخَافُونَ وَيَحْزَنُ النَّاسُ وَ لَا تَحْزَنُونَ وَ تُوضَعُ لَكُمْ مَائِدَةٌ وَ النَّاسُ فِي الْحِسَابِ.
thaqalaynSanad: 5. It is narrated to us by Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Abdullah Jabalah, from Muawiya Bin Ammar, 'From Ja'far (a.s.), from his (a.s.) father (a.s.), from his (a.s.) grandfather (a.s.) who said:
thaqalaynMatn: 'Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.) said: "O Ali (a.s.)! **My (s.a.w.a.) community had been resembled for me (s.a.w.a.) in the clay until I (s.a.w.a.) saw their young ones and their old ones as spirits before He (a.z.w.j.) Created the bodies, and I (s.a.w.a.) passed by you (a.s.) and your (a.s.) Shias, and I (s.a.w.a.) sought Forgiveness for you all (Shias).**" Ali (a.s.) said: "O Prophet (s.a.w.a.) of Allah (a.z.w.j.)! Increase for me (a.s.) regarding them." He (s.a.w.a.) said: "Yes, O Ali (a.s.)! **You (a.s.) and your (a.s.) Shias will emerge from their graves and their faces would be like the full moon on the night of the full moon, and the difficulties would have been relieved from you, and the grief(s) would be gone from you. You all will be shaded beneath the Throne. The people would fear and you will not be fearing, and the people would grieve, and you will not be grieving, and a meal would be placed for you while the people would be in the Reckoning.**"'

chapter: Chapter 14: Regarding Rasool-Allah (s.a.w.a.), He (s.a.w.a.) Recognised What He (s.a.w.a.) Had Seen in the (Realms of) the Shadows and the Particles, and Other
author: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan al-Ṣaffār
englishText: 6. It is narrated to us by one of our companions, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Ali Bin Asbat, from Ali Bin Ma'mar, from his father who said: 'I asked Abu Abdullah (a.s.) about the Words of Allah (a.z.w.j.) Blessed and Exalted: "This one is a Warner from the former Warners" (53:56). He (a.s.) said: "**Meaning by it Muhammad (s.a.w.a.), where he (s.a.w.a.) called them for the acknowledgment with Allah (a.z.w.j.) in the first (world of the) particles.**"
